    16                          !zone caml_CODEGEN {
    17                          ;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18                          ;;	CODE GENERATION
    19                          ;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    20                          
    21                          	;; 	caml_INTERP undefined:	generate native code
    22                          	;; 	caml_INTERP = 1:	generate bytecode for interpretation
    23                          
    24                          ;; Check for out-of-range argument
    25                          !macro range .min, .arg, .max, .txt {
    26                            !if (.arg < .min) | (.arg > .max) {
    27                          	!error .txt + " = ", .arg, " out of range [", .min, ", ", .max, "]"
    28                            }
    29                          }
    30                          
    31                          ;; These shouldn't be necessary: ocamlc should have already given up
    32                          !macro	i82	{!serious "\nbreadcaml> ERROR: Objects and classes not implemented"}
    33                          !macro	i8d .t	{!serious "\nbreadcaml> ERROR: Objects and classes not implemented"}
    34                          !macro	i8e	{!serious "\nbreadcaml> ERROR: Objects and classes not implemented"}
    35                          
    37                          !ifndef	caml_INTERP {
    38                          	;; --------------------------------------------------------------------
    39                          	;; 	NATIVE CODE GENERATION
    40                          	;; --------------------------------------------------------------------
    41                          
    42                          ;; Macros in opcode order, but dependencies
    43                          
    44                          ;; i00-i12 depend on i08
    45                          !macro	i08 .n {				;ACCESS n
    46                          	+range 0, .n, $7FFF, "ACC n: n"	
    47                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
    48                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
    49                            !if .n2l > 0 {
    50                          	LDY # .n2l
    51                            }
    52                            !if .n2h = 0 {
    53                          	!set	caml_gen_ACCL = 1
    54                          	JSR ACCL
    55                            } elif .n2h = 1 {
    56                          	!set	caml_gen_ACCL = 1
    57                          	INC SP + 1
    58                          	JSR ACCL
    59                          	DEC SP + 1
    60                            } else {
    61                          	!set	caml_gen_ACCH = 1
    62                          	LDA # .n2h
    63                          	JSR ACCH
    64                            }
    65                          }
    66                          !macro	i00	{+i08 0}			;ACCi -> ACC i
    67                          !macro	i01	{+i08 1}
    68                          !macro	i02	{+i08 2}
    69                          !macro	i03	{+i08 3}
    70                          !macro	i04	{+i08 4}
    71                          !macro	i05	{+i08 5}
    72                          !macro	i06	{+i08 6}
    73                          !macro	i07	{+i08 7}
    74                          
    75                          ;; i0a-i12, i1a-i1e, i31-i34, i36, i38, i3c-i3d, i68-i6c depend on i09
    76                          !macro	i09 {					;PUSH
    77                          	!set	caml_gen_PUSH = 1
    78                          	JSR PUSH
    79                          }
    80                          !macro	i0a	{+i09}				;PUSHACC0 -> PUSH
    81                          !macro	i0b	{+i09 : +i08 1}			;PUSHACCi -> PUSH; ACC i
    82                          !macro	i0c	{+i09 : +i08 2}
    83                          !macro	i0d	{+i09 : +i08 3}
    84                          !macro	i0e	{+i09 : +i08 4}
    85                          !macro	i0f	{+i09 : +i08 5}
    86                          !macro	i10	{+i09 : +i08 6}
    87                          !macro	i11	{+i09 : +i08 7}
    88                          !macro	i12 .n	{+i09 : +i08 .n}		;PUSHACC n -> PUSH; ACC n
    89                          !macro	i13 .n {				;POP n
    90                          	+range 0, .n, $7FFF, "POP n: n"
    91                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
    92                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
    93                            !if .n = 0 {
    94                          	;NOP
    95                            } elif .n = 1 {
    96                          	!set	caml_gen_POP1 = 1
    97                          	JSR POP1
    98                            } else {
    99                          	LDA # .n2l
   100                              !if .n2h > 0 {
   101                          	LDY # .n2h
   102                              }
   103                          	!set	caml_gen_POPN = 1
   104                          	JSR POPN
   105                            }
   106                          }
   107                          !macro	i14 .n {				;ASSIGN n
   108                          	+range 0, .n, $7FFF, "ASSIGN n: n"
   109                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
   110                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
   111                          	!set	caml_gen_ASSIGNL = 1
   112                            !if .n2l > 0 {
   113                          	LDY # .n2l
   114                            }
   115                            !if .n2h = 0 {
   116                          	JSR ASSIGNL
   117                            } elif .n2h = 1 {
   118                          	INC SP + 1
   119                          	JSR ASSIGNL
   120                          	DEC SP + 1
   121                            } else {
   122                          	!set	caml_gen_ASSIGNH = 1
   123                          	LDA # .n2h
   124                          	JSR ASSIGNH
   125                          	STX SP + 1
   126                            }
   127                          }
   128                          
   129                          ;; i15-i1e depend on i19
   130                          !macro	i19 .n {				;ENVACC n
   131                          	+range 0, .n, $FE, "ENVACC n: n"
   132                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
   133                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
   134                          	!set	caml_gen_ENVACC = 1
   135                            !if .n2l > 0 {
   136                          	LDY # .n2l
   137                            }
   138                            !if .n2h > 0 {
   139                          	INC ENV + 1
   140                          	JSR ENVACC
   141                          	DEC ENV + 1
   142                            } else {
   143                          	JSR ENVACC
   144                            }
   145                          }
   146                          !macro	i15	{+i19 1}			;ENVACCi -> ENVACC i
   147                          !macro	i16	{+i19 2}
   148                          !macro	i17	{+i19 3}
   149                          !macro	i18	{+i19 4}
   150                          !macro	i1a	{+i09 : +i19 1}			;PUSHENVACCi -> PUSH; ENVACC i
   151                          !macro	i1b	{+i09 : +i19 2}
   152                          !macro	i1c	{+i09 : +i19 3}
   153                          !macro	i1d	{+i09 : +i19 4}
   154                          !macro	i1e .n	{+i09 : +i19 .n}		;PUSHENVACC n -> PUSH; ENVACC n
   155                          !macro	i1f .adr {				;PUSHRETADDR adr
   156                          	!set	caml_gen_PHRET = 1
   157                          	LDA # <.adr
   158                          	LDX # >.adr
   159                          	JSR PHRET
   160                          }
   161                          
   162                          ;; i21-i23 depend on i20
   163                          !macro	i20 .n {				;APPLY n
   164                          	+range 1, .n, $7F, "APPLY n: n"
   165                          	!set	caml_gen_APPLY = 1
   166                          	LDY # 2 * .n - 1
   167                            !if .n <= 3 {
   168                          	!set	caml_gen_APPLY13 = 1
   169                          	JSR APPLY13				;JMP & push retadr-1 on hw stack
   170                            } else {
   171                          	JMP APPLY
   172                            }
   173                          }
   174                          !macro	i21	{+i20 1}			;APPLYi -> APPLY i
   175                          !macro	i22	{+i20 2}
   176                          !macro	i23	{+i20 3}
   177                          
   178                          ;; i25-i27 depend on i24
   179                          !macro	i24 .n, .s {				;APPTERM n s
   180                          	+range 1, .n, $7F, "APPTERM n s: n"
   181                          	+range .n, .s, $7F, "APPTERM n s: s"
   182                          	!set	caml_gen_APPTRM1 = 1
   183                          	LDX # 2 * (.s - .n)
   184                            !if .n = 1 {
   185                          	INY
   186                          	JMP APPTRM1
   187                            } else {
   188                          	!set	caml_gen_APPTRMN = 1
   189                          	LDA # 2 * (.n - 1)
   190                          	JMP APPTRMN
   191                            }
   192                          }
   193                          !macro	i25 .s	{+i24 1,.s}			;APPTERMi s -> APPTERM i s
   194                          !macro	i26 .s	{+i24 2,.s}
   195                          !macro	i27 .s	{+i24 3,.s}
   196                          !macro	i28 .n {				;RETURN n
   197                          	+range 0, .n, $7F, "RETURN n: n"
   198                          	!set	caml_gen_RETURN = 1
   199                          	!set	caml_gen_GORETURN = 1
   200                            !if .n = 0 {
   201                          	TYA
   202                            } else {
   203                          	LDA # 2 * .n
   204                            }
   205                          	JMP RETURN
   206                          }
   207                          !macro	i29 {					;RESTART
   208                          	!set	caml_gen_RESTART = 1
   209                          	!set	caml_restart_len = @end - *	;needed by GRAB routine
   210                          	JSR RESTART
   211                          @end
   212                          }
   213                          !macro	i2a .n {				;GRAB n
   214                          	+range 0, .n, $7C, "GRAB n: n"
   215                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   216                          	!set	caml_gen_GRAB = 1
   217                          	!set	caml_gen_GORETURN = 1
   218                          	!set	caml_grab_len = @end - *	;needed by GRAB routine
   219                          	LDA # .v
   220                          	JSR GRAB
   221                          @end
   222                          }
   223                          !macro	i2b .n, .ptr {				;CLOSURE n ptr
   224                          	+range 0, .n, $7F, "CLOSURE n p: n"
   225                          	LDX # .n
   226                          	LDA # <.ptr
   227                          	LDY # >.ptr
   228                          	!set	caml_gen_CLOSURE = 1
   229                          	JSR CLOSURE
   230                          }
   231                          !macro	i2c .f, .v, .o, .t {			;CLOSUREREC f v o t
   232                          	+range 1, .f, $80, "CLOSUREREC f v o t: f"
   233                          	+range 0, .v, $FE, "CLOSUREREC f v o t: v"
   234                          	+range 1, 2 * .f - 1 + .v, $FF, "CLOSUREREC f v o t: 2f-1+v"
   235                          	!set	caml_gen_CLOSREC = 1
   236                          	LDA # <.data
   237                          	LDY # >.data
   238                          	JSR CLOSREC
   239                          	JMP +
   240                          	!byte .v, .f
   241                          .data	!word .o, .t
   242                          +
   243                          }
   244                          
   245                          ;; i2d-i2f, i31-i34 depend on i30
   246                          !macro	i30 .n {				;OFFSETCLOSURE n
   247                          	+range -$FE, .n, $FE, "OFFSETCLOSURE n: n"
   248                          	+range 0, .n mod 2, 0, "OFFSETCLOSURE n: n mod 2"
   249                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
   250                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
   251                            !if .n2h > 0 {
   252                          	LDX # .n2h
   253                              }
   254                            !if .n = 0 {
   255                          	!set	caml_gen_OFSCL0 = 1
   256                          	JSR OFSCL0
   257                            } else {
   258                          	!set	caml_gen_OFSCLN = 1
   259                          	LDA # .n2l
   260                          	JSR OFSCLN
   261                            }
   262                          }
   263                          !macro	i2d	{+i30 -2}			;OFFSETCLOSUREi -> OFFS... i
   264                          !macro	i2e	{+i30 0}
   265                          !macro	i2f	{+i30 2}
   266                          !macro	i31	{+i09 : +i30 -2}		;PUSHOFFSETCLOSUREi -> PUSH;...
   267                          !macro	i32	{+i09 : +i30 0}
   268                          !macro	i33	{+i09 : +i30 2}
   269                          !macro	i34 .n	{+i09 : +i30 .n}		;PUSHOFFSETCLOSURE n-> PUSH;...
   270                          
   271                          ;; i36-i38 depend on i35
   272                          !macro	i35 .n {				;GETGLOBAL n
   273                          	+range 0, .n, $7FFF, "GETGLOBAL n: n"
   274                            !if .n < caml_exn_no {
   275                          	LDA # < caml_std_exn[.n]
   276                          	STA ACCU
   277                          	LDA # > caml_std_exn[.n]
   278                          	STA ACCU + 1
   279                            } else {
   280                          	.ofs = 2 * (.n - caml_exn_no)
   281                          	LDA caml_glob_table + .ofs
   282                          	STA ACCU
   283                          	LDA caml_glob_table + .ofs + 1
   284                          	STA ACCU + 1
   285                            }
   286                          }
   287                          !macro	i36 .n	{+i09 : +i35 .n}		;PUSHGETGOBAL n -> PUSH; ...
   288                          
   289                          ;; i37-138, i43-i46 depend on i47
   290                          !macro	i47 .n {				;GETFIELD n
   291                          	+range 0, .n, $FE, "GETFIELD n: n"
   292                          	!set	caml_gen_GETFLD0 = 1
   293                            !if .n = 0 {
   294                          	JSR GETFLD0
   295                            } else {
   296                          	!set	caml_gen_GETFLDN = 1
   297                          	LDA # .n
   298                          	JSR GETFLDN
   299                            }
   300                          }
   301                          !macro	i37 .n,.m {+i35 .n : +i47 .m}		;GETGLOBALFIELD n m -> GETGL...
   302                          !macro	i38 .n,.m {+i09 : +i35 .n : +i47 .m}	;PUSHGETGLOBALFIELD n m->PUSH...
   303                          !macro	i39 .n {				;SETGLOBAL n
   304                          	+range caml_exn_no, .n, $7FFF, "SETGLOBAL n: n"
   305                          	.ofs = 2 * (.n - caml_exn_no)
   306                          	!set	caml_gen_SETGLB = 1
   307                          	LDA # <(caml_glob_table + .ofs)
   308                          	LDX # >(caml_glob_table + .ofs)
   309                          	JSR SETGLB
   310                          }
   311                          
   312                          ;; i3a, i3c-i3d depend on i3b
   313                          !macro	i3b .n {				;ATOM n
   314                          	+range 0, .n, 0, "ATOM n: n"		;only ATOM(0) allowed
   315                          	LDA # <caml_atom0
   316                          	STA ACCU
   317                          	LDA # >caml_atom0
   318                          	STA ACCU + 1
   319                          }
   320                          !macro	i3a	{+i3b 0}			;ATOM0 -> ATOM 0
   321                          !macro	i3c	{+i09 : +i3b 0}			;PUSHATOM0 -> PUSH; ATOM 0
   322                          !macro	i3d .n	{+i09 : +i3b .n}		;PUSHATOM n -> PUSH; ATOM n
   323                          
   324                          ;; i3f-i41 depend on i3e
   325                          !macro	i3e .size, .tag {			;MAKEBLOCK s t
   326                          	+range 1, .size, $FF, "MKBLK s t: s"
   327                          	+range 0, .tag, $FF, "MKBLK s t: t"
   328                          	!set	caml_gen_MKBLK = 1
   329                          	LDX # .size
   330                          	LDA # .tag
   331                          	JSR MKBLK
   332                          }
   333                          !macro	i3f .t	{+i3e 1,.t}			;MAKEBLOCK1 t -> MAKEBLOCK 1 t
   334                          !macro	i40 .t	{+i3e 2,.t}			;MAKEBLOCK2 t -> MAKEBLOCK 2 t
   335                          !macro	i41 .t	{+i3e 3,.t}			;MAKEBLOCK3 t -> MAKEBLOCK 3 t
   336                          !macro	i42 .s {				;MAKEFLOATBLOCK s
   337                          	+range 1, .s, $FF div Double_wosize, "MAKEFLOATBLOCK s: s"
   338                          	!set	caml_gen_MKFBLK = 1
   339                          	LDX # .s * Double_wosize
   340                          	JSR MKFBLK
   341                          }
   342                          !macro	i43	{+i47 0}			;GETFIELDi -> GETFIELD i
   343                          !macro	i44	{+i47 1}
   344                          !macro	i45	{+i47 2}
   345                          !macro	i46	{+i47 3}
   346                          !macro	i48 .n {				;GETFLOATFIELD n
   347                          	+range 0, .n, $FF div Double_wosize, "GETFLOATFIELD n: n"
   348                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n * Double_wosize)
   349                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n * Double_wosize)
   350                          	!set	caml_gen_GETFFLD0 = 1
   351                            !if .n2h > 0 {
   352                          	INC ACCU + 1
   353                            }
   354                            !if .n2l > 0 {
   355                          	!set	caml_gen_GETFFLDN = 1
   356                          	LDA # .n2l
   357                          	JSR GETFFLDN
   358                            } else {
   359                          	JSR GETFFLD0
   360                            }
   361                          }
   362                          
   363                          ;; i49-i4c depend on i4d
   364                          !macro	i4d .n {				;SETFIELD n
   365                          	+range 0, .n, $FE, "SETFLD n: n"
   366                          	!set	caml_gen_SETFLD0 = 1
   367                            !if .n = 0 {
   368                          	JSR SETFLD0
   369                            } else {
   370                          	!set	caml_gen_SETFLDN = 1
   371                          	LDA # .n
   372                          	JSR SETFLDN
   373                            }
   374                          }
   375                          !macro	i49	{+i4d 0}			;SETFIELDi -> SETFIELD i
   376                          !macro	i4a	{+i4d 1}
   377                          !macro	i4b	{+i4d 2}
   378                          !macro	i4c	{+i4d 3}
   379                          !macro	i4e .n {				;SETFLOATFIELD n
   380                          	+range 0, .n, $FF div Double_wosize, "SETFLOATFIELD n: n"
   381                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n * Double_wosize)
   382                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n * Double_wosize)
   383                          	!set	caml_gen_SETFFLD0 = 1
   384                            !if .n2h > 0 {
   385                          	INC ACCU + 1
   386                            }
   387                            !if .n2l > 0 {
   388                          	!set	caml_gen_SETFFLDN = 1
   389                          	LDA # .n2l
   390                          	JSR SETFFLDN
   391                            } else {
   392                          	JSR SETFFLD0
   393                            }
   394                          }
   395                          !macro	i4f {					;VECTLENGTH
   396                          	!set	caml_gen_VECLEN = 1
   397                          	JSR VECLEN
   398                          }
   399                          !macro	i50 {					;GETVECTITEM
   400                          	!set	caml_gen_GETVEC = 1
   401                          	JSR GETVEC
   402                          }
   403                          !macro	i51 {					;SETVECTITEM
   404                          	!set	caml_gen_SETVEC = 1
   405                          	JSR SETVEC
   406                          }
   407                          
   408                          ;; i94 depends on i52
   409                          !macro	i52 {					;GETBYTESCHAR
   410                          	!set	caml_gen_GETCHR = 1
   411                          	JSR GETCHR
   412                          }
   413                          !macro	i53 {					;SETBYTESCHAR
   414                          	!set	caml_gen_SETCHR = 1
   415                          	JSR SETCHR
   416                          }
   417                          !macro	i54 .p {				;BRANCH p
   418                          	JMP .p
   419                          }
   420                          !macro	i55 .p {				;BRANCHIF p
   421                          	LDA ACCU
   422                          	LSR
   423                          	ORA ACCU + 1
   424                          	BEQ +
   425                          	JMP .p
   426                          +
   427                          }
   428                          !macro	i56 .p {				;BRANCHIFNOT p
   429                          	LDA ACCU
   430                          	LSR
   431                          	ORA ACCU + 1
   432                          	BNE +
   433                          	JMP .p
   434                          +
   435                          }
   436                          !macro	i57 .n, .tab {				;SWITCH n tab
   437                          	+range 0, .n, $FF, "SWITCH n t: n"
   438                            !if (0 < .n) & (.n < len(.tab)) {		;both iptrs & pptrs present,
   439                          	LDA ACCU				;select the appropriate
   440                          	AND # 1					;jumptable section
   441                          	BEQ .pptrs
   442                            }
   443                            !if 0 < .n {
   444                            	!set	caml_gen_SWITCHI = 1		;iptrs: pointers are stored in
   445                          	LDA # <(.adr - 1)			;ACCU = offset + 1,
   446                          	LDX # >(.adr - 1)			;so base address = .adr - 1
   447                          	JMP SWITCHI				;tab[0]...tab[n-1],
   448                            }
   449                          .pptrs
   450                            !if .n < len(.tab) {
   451                            	!set	caml_gen_SWITCHP = 1		;pptrs: pointers are stored in
   452                          	LDA # <(.adr + 2 * .n)			;Tag(ACCU) = offset,
   453                          	LDX # >(.adr + 2 * .n)			;so base address = .adr + 2 * .n
   454                          	JMP SWITCHP				;tab[n]...tab[len-1],
   455                            }
   456                          	!align $01, $00				;avoid JMP($xxFF) bug
   457                          .adr	!word .tab				;jumptable
   458                          }
   459                          !macro	i58 {					;BOOLNOT
   460                          	!set	caml_gen_BOOLNOT = 1
   461                          	JSR BOOLNOT
   462                          }
   463                          !macro	i59 .p {				;PUSHTRAP p
   464                          	!set	caml_gen_PHTRP = 1
   465                          	LDA # <.p
   466                          	LDX # >.p
   467                          	JSR PHTRP
   468                          }
   469                          !macro	i5a {					;POPTRAP
   470                          	!set	caml_gen_POPTRP = 1
   471                          	JSR POPTRP
   472                          }
   473                          
   474                          ;; i92-i93 depend on i5b
   475                          !macro	i5b {					;RAISE
   476                          	JMP RAISE
   477                          }
   478                          !macro	i5c { }					;CHECKSIGNALS = NOP
   479                          
   480                          ;; i5d-i61 depend on i62
   481                          !macro	i62 .p, .n {				;CCALL p n
   482                          	+range 0, .p, $FF, "CCALL p n: p"
   483                          	+range 1, .n, $FF, "CCALL p n: n"
   484                          	!set	caml_gen_CCALL = 1
   485                          	LDX # .p				;load routine's index
   486                          	LDA # .n - 1				;load # of args on stack
   487                          	JSR CCALL
   488                          }
   489                          !macro	i5d .p	{+i62 .p, 1}			;CCALLi p -> CCALL p i
   490                          !macro	i5e .p	{+i62 .p, 2}
   491                          !macro	i5f .p	{+i62 .p, 3}
   492                          !macro	i60 .p	{+i62 .p, 4}
   493                          !macro	i61 .p	{+i62 .p, 5}
   494                          
   495                          ;; i63-i66, i68-i6c depend on i67
   496                          !macro	i67 .n {				;CONSTINT n
   497                          	+range -$4000, .n, $7FFF, "CONSTINT n: n"
   498                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   499                          	LDA # <.v
   500                          	STA ACCU
   501                            !if >.v = 0 {
   502                          	STY ACCU + 1
   503                            } else {
   504                          	LDA # >.v
   505                          	STA ACCU + 1
   506                            }
   507                          }
   508                          !macro	i63	{+i67 0}			;CONSTi -> CONSTINT i
   509                          !macro	i64	{+i67 1}
   510                          !macro	i65	{+i67 2}
   511                          !macro	i66	{+i67 3}
   512                          !macro	i68	{+i09 : +i67 0}			;PUSHCONSTi -> PUSH;...
   513                          !macro	i69	{+i09 : +i67 1}
   514                          !macro	i6a	{+i09 : +i67 2}
   515                          !macro	i6b	{+i09 : +i67 3}
   516                          !macro	i6c .n	{+i09 : +i67 .n}		;PUSHCONSTINT n -> PUSH;...
   517                          !macro	i6d {					;NEGINT
   518                          	!set	caml_gen_NEGINT = 1
   519                          	JSR NEGINT
   520                          }
   521                          !macro	i6e {					;ADDINT
   522                          	!set	caml_gen_ADDINT = 1
   523                          	JSR ADDINT
   524                          }
   525                          !macro	i6f {					;SUBINT
   526                          	!set	caml_gen_SUBINT = 1
   527                          	JSR SUBINT
   528                          }
   529                          !macro	i70 {					;MULINT
   530                          	!set	caml_gen_MULINT = 1
   531                          	JSR MULINT
   532                          }
   533                          !macro	i71 {					;DIVINT
   534                          	!set	caml_gen_DIVINT = 1
   535                          	!set	caml_gen_DIVMOD = 1
   536                          	JSR DIVINT
   537                          }
   538                          !macro	i72 {					;MODINT
   539                          	!set	caml_gen_MODINT = 1
   540                          	!set	caml_gen_DIVMOD = 1
   541                          	JSR MODINT
   542                          }
   543                          !macro	i73 {					;ANDINT
   544                          	!set	caml_gen_ANDINT = 1
   545                          	JSR ANDINT
   546                          }
   547                          !macro	i74 {					;ORINT
   548                          	!set	caml_gen_ORINT = 1

   562                          }
   563                          !macro	i78 {					;ASRINT

   568                          !macro	i79 {					;EQ

   593                          !macro	i7e {					;GEINT

   597                          }
   598                          !macro	i7f .n {				;OFFSETINT n
   599                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "OFFSETINT n: n"
   600                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
   601                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
   602                          	!set	caml_gen_OFSINT = 1
   603                            !if .n2h > 0 {
   604                          	LDY # .n2h
   605                            }
   606                          	LDA # .n2l
   607                          	JSR OFSINT
   608                          }
   609                          !macro	i80 .n {				;OFFSETREF n
   610                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "OFFSETREF n: n"
   611                          	.n2h = >(2 * .n)
   612                          	.n2l = <(2 * .n)
   613                          	!set	caml_gen_OFSREF = 1
   614                            !if .n2h > 0 {
   615                          	LDY # .n2h
   616                            }
   617                          	LDA # .n2l
   618                          	JSR OFSREF
   619                          }
   620                          !macro	i81 {					;ISINT
   621                          	!set	caml_gen_ISINT = 1
   622                          	JSR ISINT
   623                          }
   624                          !macro	i83 .n, .p {				;BEQ n p
   625                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "BEQ n p: n"
   626                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   627                          	LDA ACCU
   628                          	CMP # <.v
   629                          	BNE +
   630                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   631                            !if >.v > 0 {
   632                          	CMP # >.v
   633                            }
   634                          	BNE +
   635                          	JMP .p
   636                          +
   637                          }
   638                          !macro	i84 .n, .p {				;BNEQ n p
   639                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "BNEQ n p: n"
   640                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   641                          	LDA ACCU
   642                          	CMP # <.v
   643                          	BEQ +
   644                          -	JMP .p
   645                          +	LDA ACCU + 1
   646                            !if >.v > 0 {
   647                          	CMP # >.v
   648                            }
   649                          	BNE -
   650                          }
   651                          !macro	i85 .n, .p {				;BLTINT n p
   652                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "BLTINT n p: n"
   653                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   654                          	!set	caml_gen_SGNCMP = 1
   655                          	LDA # <.v
   656                            !if >.v > 0 {
   657                          	LDY # >.v
   658                            }
   659                          	JSR SGNCMP
   660                          	BPL +
   661                          	JMP .p
   662                          +
   663                          }
   664                          !macro	i86 .n, .p {				;BLEINT n p
   665                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "BLEINT n p: n"
   666                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   667                          	!set	caml_gen_SGNCMP = 1
   668                          	LDA # $FE & <.v
   669                            !if >.v > 0 {
   670                          	LDY # >.v
   671                            }
   672                          	JSR SGNCMP
   673                          	BPL +
   674                          	JMP .p
   675                          +
   676                          }
   677                          !macro	i87 .n, .p {				;BGTINT n p
   678                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "BGTINT n p: n"
   679                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   680                          	!set	caml_gen_SGNCMP = 1
   681                          	LDA # $FE & <.v
   682                            !if >.v > 0 {
   683                          	LDY # >.v
   684                            }
   685                          	JSR SGNCMP
   686                          	BMI +
   687                          	JMP .p
   688                          +
   689                          }
   690                          !macro	i88 .n, .p {				;BGEINT n p
   691                          	+range -$4000, .n, $3FFF, "BGEINT n p: n"
   692                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   693                          	!set	caml_gen_SGNCMP = 1
   694                          	LDA # <.v
   695                            !if >.v > 0 {
   696                          	LDY # >.v
   697                            }
   698                          	JSR SGNCMP
   699                          	BMI +
   700                          	JMP .p
   701                          +
   702                          }
   703                          !macro	i89 {					;ULTINT
   704                          	!set	caml_gen_ULTINT = 1
   705                          	JSR ULTINT
   706                          }
   707                          !macro	i8a {					;UGEINT
   708                          	!set	caml_gen_UGEINT = 1
   709                          	JSR UGEINT
   710                          }
   711                          !macro	i8b .n, .p {				;BULTINT n p
   712                          	+range -$4000, .n, $7FFF, "BULTINT n p: n"
   713                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   714                          	LDA # <.v
   715                          	CMP ACCU
   716                            !if >.v > 0 {
   717                          	LDA # >.v
   718                            } else {
   719                          	TYA
   720                            }
   721                          	SBC ACCU + 1
   722                          	BCS +
   723                          	JMP .p
   724                          +
   725                          }
   726                          !macro	i8c .n, .p {				;BUGEINT n p
   727                          	+range -$4000, .n, $7FFF, "BUGEINT n p: n"
   728                          	+Val_Int ~.v, .n
   729                          	LDA # <.v
   730                          	CMP ACCU
   731                            !if >.v > 0 {
   732                          	LDA # >.v
   733                            } else {
   734                          	TYA
   735                            }
   736                          	SBC ACCU + 1
   737                          	BCC +
   738                          	JMP .p
   739                          +
   740                          }
   741                          !macro	i8f {					;STOP
   742                          	JMP STOP
   743                          }
   744                          !macro	i90	{}				;EVENT = NOP
   745                          !macro	i91	{}				;BREAK = NOP
   746                          !macro	i92	{+i5b}				;RERAISE -> RAISE
   747                          !macro	i93	{+i5b}				;RAISENOTRACE -> RAISE
   748                          !macro	i94	{+i52}				;GETSTRINGCHAR -> GETBYTESCHAR
   749                          
   750                          } ;ifndef caml_INTERP
   751                          
   753                          !ifdef caml_INTERP {
   754                          	;; --------------------------------------------------------------------
   755                          	;; 	BYTECODE GENERATION
   756                          	;; --------------------------------------------------------------------
   757                          
   758                          	;;  $5c, $90, $91			ignored
   759                          	;;  $82, $8d, $8e			error (operations on objects)
   760                          	;;  $0a, $3b, $3d, $92, $93, $94	replaced by other opcodes
   761                          
   762                          ;; Macros in opcode order
   763                          	
   764                          !macro i00  {	!set	caml_gen_ACC0_OFSREF=1
   765                          		!set	caml_gen_ACC07=1
   766                          		!set	caml_gen_ACCL=1
   767                          		!by $00 }
   768                          !macro i01  {	!set	caml_gen_ACC1_ISINT=1
   769                          		!set	caml_gen_ACC07=1
   770                          		!set	caml_gen_ACCL=1
   771                          		!by $01 }
   772                          !macro i02  {	!set	caml_gen_ACC07=1
   773                          		!set	caml_gen_ACCL=1
   774                          		!by $02 }
   775                          !macro i03  {	!set	caml_gen_ACC3_BEQ=1
   776                          		!set	caml_gen_ACC07=1
   777                          		!set	caml_gen_ACCL=1
   778                          		!by $03 }
   779                          !macro i04 {	!set	caml_gen_ACC4_BNEQ=1
   780                          		!set	caml_gen_ACC07=1
   781                          		!set	caml_gen_ACCL=1

    29  134c a62c               	LDX ACCU

    31  1350 203ef1             -       JSR C64_GETIN				;A:=get char from keyboard queue

    34  1356 d0f8               	BNE -

    41                          IOtools_videoram_read
    42                                  ;; ACCU is address, relative to start of video RAM; 0 <= ACCU <= 999
    43  135f 462d                       LSR ACCU + 1
    44  1361 662c                       ROR ACCU                                ;ACCU := Int_val(ACCU)
    45  1363 a904                       LDA # >1024                             ;1024 = start of video RAM
    46  1365 18                         CLC
    47  1366 652d                       ADC ACCU + 1
    48  1368 852d                       STA ACCU + 1                            ;ACCU := address to peek
    49  136a a000                       LDY # 0

    51  136e 842d                       STY ACCU + 1                            ;ACCUh := 0

    55  1374 262d                       ROL ACCU + 1                            ;ACCUh := >Val_int(A)

    20                          						;code (SMC in comments)

    22                          !macro	caml_grow_stack .w {			;Increase stack by .w words,
    23                            	LDA SP					;.w < 128.
    24                            !if .w = 1 {
    25                            	BNE +
    26                          	DEC SP + 1
    27                          	LDA SP + 1
    28                          	CMP # >caml_stack_start
    29                          	BCS +
    30                          	JMP caml_stack_overflow
    31                          +  	DEC SP
    32                            	DEC SP
    33                            } else {
    34                          	SEC
    35                          	SBC # 2 * .w
    36                          	STA SP
    37                          	BCS +
    38                          	DEC SP + 1
    39                          	LDA SP + 1
    40                          	CMP # >caml_stack_start
    41                          	BCS +
    42                          	JMP caml_stack_overflow
    43                          + }
    44                          }
    45                          
    46                          caml_stack_overflow
    47                          	+caml_raise Stack_overflow

    48                          	
    49                          ;; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50                          ;; The following routines are annotated with (sort of) Hoare Triples to
    51                          ;; highlight which conditions must be met at entry and which will stand at
    52                          ;; exit (beware of Y<>0, see the comment on caml_init in loader.asm).
    53                          ;; Annotations refer to native code (caml_INTERP=<undef>).
    54                          ;; Code to be assembled only ifdef caml_INTERP is indented one tab-stop more.
    55                          ;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56                          
    57                          !macro	NEXT {					;process next instruction
    58                            !ifdef caml_INTERP {
    59                          		JMP caml_interp_fetch
    60                            } else {
    61                          	RTS
    62                            }
    63                          }
    64                          
    65                          !macro	JUMP_CODEPTR @code {			;jump to @code pointer
    66                            !ifdef caml_INTERP {
    67                          		JMP caml_interp_fetch
    68                            } else {
    69                          	JMP (@code)
    70                            }
    71                          }
    72

    74                          !ifdef caml_gen_ACCL {			;{Y = <2n}
    75  13b4 b12e               	LDA (SP),Y				;Read SP[n], lo byte
    76  13b6 852c               	STA ACCU				;and save it in ACCU
    77  13b8 c8                 	INY					;Increment index
    78  13b9 b12e               	LDA (SP),Y				;Read SP[n], hi byte
    79  13bb 852d               	STA ACCU + 1				;and save it in ACCU+1
    80  13bd a000               	LDY # 0					;Reset Y
    81                          	+NEXT				;

   118  13f8 c62e                 	DEC SP					;Decrement the stack pointer, lo

   626  162b 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   627  162d c8                 	INY
   628  162e a52d               	LDA ACCU + 1
   629  1630 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   630  1632 a558               +	LDA BLK + 1				;ACCU := block address, A:=BLK
   631  1634 852d               	STA ACCU + 1
   632  1636 a557               	LDA BLK
   633  1638 852c               	STA ACCU
   634  163a e002               	CPX # 2
   635  163c 9025               	BCC ++					;If n <= 1 then exit
   636  163e 6903               	ADC # 4	- 1				;(-1 as carry is set)
   637  1640 8557               	STA BLK					;BLK := &Field(BLK,2)
   638  1642 9002               	BCC +
   639  1644 e658               	INC BLK + 1
   640  1646 ca                 +	DEX
   641  1647 8647               	STX @NM1
   642  1649 a000               	LDY # 0					;for i := 0 to n - 2
   643  164b b12e               -	LDA (SP),Y				; Field(BLK,2+i) := SP[i]
   644  164d 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   645  164f c8                 	INY
   646  1650 b12e               	LDA (SP),Y
   647  1652 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   648  1654 c8                 	INY
   649  1655 ca                 	DEX
   650  1656 d0f3               	BNE -
   651  1658 a547               	LDA @NM1				;Pop n - 1 elements
   652  165a 0a                 	ASL
   653                          	;CLC					;C clear as 2*@NM1 < 256
   654  165b 652e               	ADC SP
   655  165d 852e               	STA SP
   656  165f 9002               	BCC ++
   657  1661 e62f               	INC SP + 1
   658  1663 a000               ++	LDY # 0
   659                          	+NEXT				;

   659                          {Y = 0}

   662                          CLOSREC						;NATIVE CODE & INTERPRETER
   663                          !ifdef caml_gen_CLOSREC {
   664                          	@NVAR	= TMP
   665                          	@NFUN	= TMP + 1
   666                          	@ADR	= TMP + 2
   667                            !ifdef caml_INTERP {				;$2c .v .f .data=fun1 [funs]
   668                          		@DATA = PC
   669  1668 203d1d             		JSR caml_interp_getarg
   670  166b 8545               		STA @NVAR
   671  166d 203d1d             		JSR caml_interp_getarg		;Now @DATA=PC points to .data
   672  1670 8546               		STA @NFUN
   673                            } else {				;{A = <.data, Y = >.data}
   674                            	@DATA = TMP + 4
   675                          	STA @DATA
   676                          	DEY
   677                          	STY @DATA + 1				;Now @DATA points to .data - $100
   678                          	LDY # -2				;Now @DATA + Y points to .v
   679                          	LDA (@DATA),Y				;Read .v
   680                          	STA @NVAR				; and save it
   681                          	INY
   682                          	LDA (@DATA),Y				;Read .f
   683                          	STA @NFUN				; and save it
   684                          	INY					;Set Y = 0
   685                          	INC @DATA + 1				;Now @DATA points to .data
   686                            }
   687  1672 0a                 	ASL					;Compute the size of the
   688  1673 18                 	CLC					; closure block as
   689  1674 6545               	ADC @NVAR				; 2×@NFUN+@NVAR-1 words (<=255)
   690  1676 aa                 	TAX					;(here A may be 0 if f=128,v=0)
   691  1677 ca                 	DEX					;(last step, X=255 if f=128,v=0)
   692  1678 a9f7               	LDA # Closure_tag			;Load appropriate tag
   693  167a 20111f             	JSR caml_alloc				; and allocate the closure
   694  167d a545               	LDA @NVAR				;If @NVAR>0 then push ACCU on the
   695  167f f003               	BEQ +					; stack (it'll be popped out and
   696  1681 20e313             	JSR PUSH				; inserted into the closure)
   697  1684 a557               +	LDA BLK
   698  1686 852c               	STA ACCU				;ACCU := closure address
   699  1688 8547               	STA @ADR				;@ADR := closure address
   700  168a a558               	LDA BLK + 1
   701  168c 852d               	STA ACCU + 1
   702  168e 8548               	STA @ADR + 1
   703  1690 a646               	LDX @NFUN				;Set loop counter
   704  1692 d01d               	BNE @code		     		;JMP @code (loop entry)
   705  1694 a9f9               @ifx	LDA # Infix_tag				; Put an infix tag in lo byte of
   706  1696 9157               	STA (BLK),Y				;  Field(BLK,2i-1), i=@NFUN-X+1
   707  1698 c8                 	INY
   708  1699 98                 	TYA			       		; Compute the offset: Y is odd,
   709  169a 4a                 	LSR					;  LSR:ADC is (Y+1)/2="distance"
   710  169b 6900               	ADC # 0					;  in word from main closure;
   711  169d 9157               	STA (BLK),Y			   	;  write it into hi byte.
   712  169f c8                 	INY					; An Y overflow may occur here:
   713  16a0 d004               	BNE +					;  if so,
   714  16a2 e658               	INC BLK + 1				;  increment hi bytes of
   715  16a4 e638               	INC @DATA + 1				;  both pointers.
   716  16a6 a537               +	LDA @DATA				; Decrement DATA by 2
   717  16a8 38                 	SEC					;  as only 2 bytes from the .t
   718  16a9 e902               	SBC # 2					;  tab will be copied every 4
   719  16ab 8537               	STA @DATA				;  increments of Y index.
   720  16ad b002               	BCS @code
   721  16af c638               	DEC @DATA + 1
   722  16b1 b137               @code	LDA (@DATA),Y				;Loop entry: populate fun fields
   723  16b3 9157               	STA (BLK),Y				; Load code ptr, lo by; store it
   724  16b5 c8                 	INY					;  in Field(BLK,2i-2),i=@NFUN-X+1
   725  16b6 b137               	LDA (@DATA),Y
   726  16b8 9157               	STA (BLK),Y				; As above, hi byte
   727  16ba c8                 	INY
   728  16bb ca                 	DEX					; Decrement loop counter (i++)
   729  16bc d0d6               	BNE @ifx				;Loop until X = 0 (i > @NFUN)
   730                            !ifdef caml_INTERP {
   731  16be 98                 		TYA
   732  16bf 18                 		CLC
   733  16c0 6537               		ADC PC
   734  16c2 8537               		STA PC				;PC:=@DATA+Y=PC+Y=.data+2×f
   735  16c4 9002               		BCC +
   736  16c6 e638               		INC PC + 1
   737                          + }
   738  16c8 98                 	TYA					;Set BLK to point to next field
   739  16c9 18                 	CLC
   740  16ca 6557               	ADC BLK
   741  16cc 8557               	STA BLK
   742  16ce 9002               	BCC +
   743  16d0 e658               	INC BLK + 1
   744  16d2 a645               +	LDX @NVAR
   745  16d4 f01f               	BEQ @grwstk				;If @NVAR = 0 then exit
   746  16d6 a000               	LDY # 0
   747  16d8 b12e               @vars	LDA (SP),Y				;Loop: copy vars from stack to
   748  16da 9157               	STA (BLK),Y				; Fld(2f-1),…,Fld(2f+v-2)
   749  16dc c8                 	INY
   750  16dd b12e               	LDA (SP),Y
   751  16df 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   752  16e1 c8                 	INY
   753  16e2 d004               	BNE +
   754  16e4 e62f               	INC SP + 1
   755  16e6 e658               	INC BLK + 1
   756  16e8 ca                 +	DEX
   757  16e9 d0ed               	BNE @vars
   758  16eb 98                 	TYA					;Pop @NVAR elts
   759  16ec 18                 	CLC
   760  16ed 652e               	ADC SP
   761  16ef 852e               	STA SP
   762  16f1 9002               	BCC @grwstk
   763  16f3 e62f               	INC SP + 1
   764  16f5 a546               @grwstk	LDA @NFUN
   765  16f7 0a                 	ASL
   766  16f8 a8                 	TAY
   767  16f9 b009               	BCS +				        ;branch if @NFUN=128
   768  16fb 49ff               	EOR # $FF
   769  16fd 38                 	SEC
   770  16fe 652e               	ADC SP
   771  1700 852e               	STA SP					;SP := SP-2*@NFUN
   772  1702 b00b               	BCS ++
   773  1704 c62f               +	DEC SP + 1
   774  1706 a52f               	LDA SP + 1
   775  1708 c99c               	CMP # >caml_stack_start
   776  170a b003               	BCS ++
   777  170c 4ca913             	JMP caml_stack_overflow
   778  170f 88                 ++	DEY				    	;Init counter: Y=2*@NFUN-1
   779  1710 a548               @pshadr	LDA @ADR + 1				;Loop: push onto the stack
   780  1712 912e               	STA (SP),Y				; each function address;
   781  1714 88                 	DEY					; the 1st one is in @ADR,
   782  1715 f010               	BEQ +					; the others are 4 bytes 
   783  1717 a547               	LDA @ADR				; far each other,
   784  1719 912e               	STA (SP),Y
   785  171b 88                 	DEY
   786  171c 18                 	CLC
   787  171d 6904               	ADC # 4					; so add 4 to @ADR at each
   788  171f 8547               	STA @ADR				; step
   789  1721 90ed               	BCC @pshadr
   790  1723 e648               	INC @ADR + 1
   791  1725 b0e9               	BCS @pshadr				;JMP @pshadr
   792  1727 a547               +	LDA @ADR				;Last byte
   793  1729 912e               	STA (SP),Y
   794                          	+NEXT				;

  1049                          	STA ACCU
  1050                          	LDA BLK + 1
  1051                          	STA ACCU + 1				;ACCU := newblock
  1052                          	;; Field(ACCU,1+i...3+i) := Float(SP[i]), 0 <= i < size/Double_wosize
  1053                          -	TXA
  1054                          	SEC
  1055                          	SBC # Double_wosize
  1056                          	BEQ ++					;no elements to pop
  1057                          	TAX
  1058                          	LDA BLK					;TMP := addr of next float field
  1059                          	CLC
  1060                          	ADC # Double_wosize
  1061                          	BCC +
  1062                          	INC BLK + 1
  1063                          +	LDA (SP),Y
  1064                          	STA TMP
  1065                          	INC SP
  1066                          	LDA (SP),Y
  1067                          	STA TMP + 1				;pop from stack
  1068                          	INC SP
  1069                          	BNE +
  1070                          	INC SP + 1
  1071                          +	+caml_move_float TMP, BLK		;Float(BLK):=Float(TMP)
  1072                          	JMP -
  1073                          ++	+NEXT				;{Y = 0}
  1074                          }
  1075                          
  1076                          GETFLDN						;NATIVE CODE & INTERPRETER
  1077                          !ifdef	caml_gen_GETFLDN {
  1078                            !ifdef caml_INTERP {

  1080                            }					;{A = n}

  1472                          PHTRP						;NATIVE CODE & INTERPRETER	
  1473                          !ifdef caml_gen_PHTRP {
  1474                            !ifdef caml_INTERP {
  1475                          		JSR caml_interp_getarg
  1476                          		STA TMP
  1477                          		JSR caml_interp_getarg
  1478                          		STA TMP + 1
  1479                            } else {				;{A = <ptr, X = >ptr}
  1480                          	STA TMP					;save address
  1481                          	STX TMP + 1
  1482                            }
  1483                          	+caml_grow_stack 4
  1484                          	LDY # 6
  1485                          	LDA XARGS				;push trap frame on stack:
  1486                          	STA (SP),Y				;SP[3] := XARGS
  1487                          	DEY
  1488                          	LDA ENV + 1
  1489                          	STA (SP),Y
  1490                          	DEY
  1491                          	LDA ENV
  1492                          	STA (SP),Y				;SP[2] := ENV
  1493                          	DEY

  1495                          	STA (SP),Y
  1496                          	DEY
  1497                          	LDA TRAPSP
  1498                          	STA (SP),Y				;SP[1] := TRAPSP
  1499                          	DEY
  1500                          	LDA TMP + 1
  1501                          	STA (SP),Y
  1502                          	DEY
  1503                          	LDA TMP
  1504                          	STA (SP),Y				;SP[0] := address
  1505                          	LDA SP + 1
  1506                          	STA TRAPSP + 1
  1507                          	LDA SP
  1508                          	STA TRAPSP				;TRAPSP := SP
  1509                          	+NEXT				;{Y = 0}

  1664                          !macro	ARLOGOP @OP {			;{Y = 0}
  1665                          	LDA ACCU
  1666                            !if	 @OP = '+' { AND # $FE : CLC : ADC (SP),Y
  1667                            } elif @OP = '-' { SEC : SBC (SP),Y : ORA # 1
  1668                            } elif @OP = '&' { AND (SP),Y
  1669                            } elif @OP = '|' { ORA (SP),Y
  1670                            } elif @OP = 'X' { EOR (SP),Y : ORA # 1
  1671                            } else {!serious "ARLOGOP: Invalid argument"}
  1672                          	STA ACCU
  1673                          	INC SP
  1674                          	LDA ACCU + 1
  1675                            !if	 @OP = '+' { ADC (SP),Y
  1676                            } elif @OP = '-' { SBC (SP),Y
  1677                            } elif @OP = '&' { AND (SP),Y
  1678                            } elif @OP = '|' { ORA (SP),Y
  1679                            } elif @OP = 'X' { EOR (SP),Y
  1680                            } else {!serious "ARLOGOP: Invalid argument"}
  1681                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1682                          	INC SP
  1683                          	BNE +
  1684                          	INC SP + 1
  1685                          +	+NEXT				;{Y = 0}
  1686                          }

  1703                          !macro	SHFOP @OP {			;{Y = 0}
  1704                          	LDA (SP),Y				;load Val_Int(b)
  1705                          	INC SP					;pop(1)
  1706                          	INC SP
  1707                          	BNE +
  1708                          	INC SP + 1
  1709                          +	LSR					;compute b from Val_Int(b)
  1710                          	AND # $0F				;extract lo nibble
  1711                          	BEQ +					;=0? nothing to be shifted
  1712                          	TAX					;bit counter
  1713                          	LDA ACCU
  1714                            !if	 @OP = "<<"  { AND # $FE }		;clear lsb
  1715                          - !if	 @OP = "<<"  { ASL : ROL ACCU + 1
  1716                            } elif @OP = ">>"  { LSR ACCU + 1 : ROR
  1717                            } elif @OP = "->>" { SEC : ROR ACCU + 1 : ROR
  1718                            } else {!serious "SHFOP: Invalid argument"}
  1719                          	DEX
  1720                          	BNE -
  1721                          	ORA # 1
  1722                          	STA ACCU
  1723                          +	+NEXT				;{Y = 0}
  1724                          }

  1790                          DIVMOD				       		;NATIVE CODE & INTERPRETER
  1791                          !ifdef caml_gen_DIVMOD {		;{Y = 0}

  1793                          	@DSR	= TMP + 2			;Divisor. Dividend in ACCU.
  1794                          	@SIGNS	= TMP + 4			;bit 7,6 = quot,rem signs flags

  1822  19f5 b12e               	LDA (SP),Y				;load hi byte

  1831  1a05 e62f               	INC SP + 1				;pop

  1835  1a0c d01b               	BNE @divide				;   no: start division

  1852  1a33 ca                 	DEX
  1853  1a34 d0f7               	BNE -					;check next bit
  1854  1a36 00                 	BRK					;NOT REACHED as ACCU <> Val_zero
  1855  1a37 062c               -	ASL ACCU				;ACCU_0 := 0, shift the
  1856  1a39 262d               	ROL ACCU + 1				;   highest bit of ACCU into
  1857  1a3b 2645               +	ROL .REM				;   R and make room in ACCU
  1858  1a3d 2646               	ROL .REM + 1				;   for next quotient's bit
  1859  1a3f 38                 	SEC	
  1860  1a40 a545               	LDA .REM
  1861  1a42 e547               	SBC @DSR				;  Try subtraction R - N
  1862  1a44 a8                 	TAY
  1863  1a45 a546               	LDA .REM + 1
  1864  1a47 e548               	SBC @DSR + 1
  1865  1a49 9006               	BCC +	
  1866  1a4b 8546               	STA .REM + 1				;  If subtraction succeeds
  1867  1a4d 8445               	STY .REM				;   then save result in R
  1868  1a4f e62c               	INC ACCU				;   and record a 1 in ACCU
  1869  1a51 ca                 +	DEX
  1870  1a52 d0e3               	BNE -					;Continue loop
  1871  1a54 a000               	LDY # 0					;reset Y
  1872  1a56 2449               	BIT @SIGNS				;return N = Q sign, V = R sign,
  1873  1a58 38                 	SEC					;C = 1 (Dividend <> 0),
  1874  1a59 60                 	RTS				;{.REM=|Remainder|, ACCU=|Quotient|,
  1875                          }					;	CNV=flags, Y = 0}
  1876                          
  1877                          DIVINT
  1878                          !ifdef caml_gen_DIVINT {		;{Y = 0}
  1879  1a5a 20c519             	JSR DIVMOD				;Compute Q = |A| div |B|
  1880  1a5d 901a               	BCC ++					;ACCU=Dividend=Val_zero, exit
  1881  1a5f 3007               	BMI +					;Need to negate Quotient?
  1882                          	;SEC					;no: ACCU := Val_Int(Q) = 2Q+1
  1883  1a61 262c               	ROL ACCU
  1884  1a63 262d               	ROL ACCU + 1
  1885                          	+NEXT				;

  2068                          !macro ULTGEINT @LTGE {			;{Y = 0}
  2069                          	INY
  2070                            !if @LTGE = "ULTINT" {
  2071                          	LDA ACCU + 1
  2072                          	CMP (SP),Y
  2073                            } elif @LTGE = "UGEINT" {
  2074                          	LDA (SP),Y
  2075                          	CMP ACCU + 1
  2076                            } else {!serious "ULTGEINT: invalid arg"}
  2077                          	BCC ++
  2078                          	BNE +
  2079                          	DEY
  2080                          	LDA ACCU
  2081                          	CMP (SP),Y
  2082                            !if @LTGE = "<" {
  2083                          	BCC ++
  2084                            } elif @LTGE = ">=" {
  2085                          	BCS ++
  2086                            } else {!serious "ULTGEINT: invalid arg"}

  2088                          	BNE +					;JMP +
  2089                          ++	LDA # Val_true
  2090                          +	STA ACCU
  2091                          	STY ACCU + 1
  2092                          	INC SP
  2093                          	INC SP
  2094                          	BNE +
  2095                          	INC SP + 1
  2096                          +	LDY # 0
  2097                          	+NEXT				;{Y = 0}

  2200  1c10 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT
  2201  1c13 c8                 	INY
  2202  1c14 b145               	LDA (@VAL),Y				; Get size(VAL)
  2203  1c16 8548               	STA @SIZE				;  and save it
  2204  1c18 c647               	DEC @PRFL				; PRFL := $FF
  2205  1c1a a546               -	LDA @VAL + 1				; Loop on size(VAL):
  2206  1c1c 48                 	PHA					;  Push VAL,hi onto h/w stack
  2207  1c1d a545               	LDA @VAL
  2208  1c1f 48                 	PHA					;  Push VAL,lo onto h/w stack
  2209  1c20 c8                 	INY
  2210  1c21 b145               	LDA (@VAL),Y				;  Get current Field(VAL), lo
  2211  1c23 aa                 	TAX
  2212  1c24 c8                 	INY
  2213  1c25 b145               	LDA (@VAL),Y				;   and hi byte
  2214  1c27 8645               	STX @VAL				;  VAL := Field(VAL)
  2215  1c29 8546               	STA @VAL + 1
  2216  1c2b 98                 	TYA
  2217  1c2c 48                 	PHA				 	;  Push Y onto h/w stack
  2218  1c2d 20cf1b             	JSR @pr_val				;  Rec.call pr_val(VAL,PRFL=$FF)
  2219  1c30 68                 	PLA					;  Pop Y register from h/w stack
  2220  1c31 a8                 	TAY
  2221  1c32 68                 	PLA					;  Pop VAL,lo from h/w stack
  2222  1c33 8545               	STA @VAL
  2223  1c35 68                 	PLA					;  Pop VAL,hi from h/w stack 
  2224  1c36 8546               	STA @VAL + 1
  2225  1c38 c648               	DEC @SIZE				;  Decrement counter
  2226  1c3a f00d               	BEQ +					; Exit if all fields are printed
  2227  1c3c a92c               	LDA # ','				;  Print ','
  2228  1c3e 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT
  2229  1c41 a920               	LDA # ' '				;  Print ' '
  2230  1c43 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT
  2231  1c46 4c1a1c             	JMP -					; Continue loop
  2232  1c49 a929               +	LDA # ')'				; Print ')'
  2233  1c4b 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT
  2234  1c4e 60                 	RTS					; Return.
  2235                          
  2236                          	;; Print the string pointed by VAL
  2237  1c4f a000               @pr_str	LDY # 0
  2238  1c51 b145               -	LDA (@VAL),Y				;A := VAL[Y]
  2239  1c53 f00a               	BEQ +					;Exit if null
  2240  1c55 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT				;Print VAL[Y]
  2241  1c58 c8                 	INY
  2242  1c59 d0f6               	BNE -
  2243  1c5b e646               	INC @VAL + 1
  2244  1c5d d0f2               	BNE -
  2245  1c5f 60                 +	RTS
  2246                          
  2247                          	;; Print the integer in VAL
  2248  1c60 2446               @pr_int	BIT @VAL + 1
  2249  1c62 1012               	BPL +
  2250  1c64 38                 	SEC					;If VAL < 0,
  2251  1c65 a902               	LDA # Val_zero + 1
  2252  1c67 e545               	SBC @VAL				; negate it
  2253  1c69 8545               	STA @VAL
  2254  1c6b a900               	LDA # 0
  2255  1c6d e546               	SBC @VAL + 1
  2256  1c6f 8546               	STA @VAL + 1
  2257  1c71 a92d               	LDA # '-'				; and print '-'.
  2258  1c73 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT
  2259  1c76 4646               +	LSR @VAL + 1				;Get rid of trailing 1
  2260  1c78 6645               	ROR @VAL
  2261  1c7a a930               	LDA # '0'
  2262  1c7c 8549               	STA @SKP0				;Ignore initial 0s
  2263  1c7e a203               	LDX # 3					;For X := 3 downto 0
  2264  1c80 854a               --	STA @DGT				; DGT := '0'
  2265  1c82 a545               -	LDA @VAL				; Loop
  2266  1c84 38                 	SEC
  2267  1c85 fdad1c             	SBC @lo10,X				;  A:Y := VAL - 10^(X+1)
  2268  1c88 a8                 	TAY
  2269  1c89 a546               	LDA @VAL + 1
  2270  1c8b fdb11c             	SBC @hi10,X
  2271  1c8e 9008               	BCC +					; Exit_loop if A:Y < 0
  2272  1c90 8445               	STY @VAL				;  VAL := A:Y
  2273  1c92 8546               	STA @VAL + 1
  2274  1c94 e64a               	INC @DGT				;  DGT :=nxt(DGT) ('1','2',...)
  2275  1c96 d0ea               	BNE -					; End_Loop
  2276  1c98 a54a               +	LDA @DGT				; If not(DGT = '0' & SKP0 = '0')
  2277  1c9a c549               	CMP @SKP0
  2278  1c9c f007               	BEQ +
  2279  1c9e c649               	DEC @SKP0				;  SKP0 := <non_digit_char>
  2280  1ca0 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT				;  Print DGT
  2281  1ca3 a930               	LDA # '0'				;  Set A for next iteration
  2282  1ca5 ca                 +	DEX					;  Decrement counter
  2283  1ca6 10d8               	BPL --					;End_For
  2284  1ca8 0545               	ORA @VAL				;A := '0'|VAL  (last digit)
  2285                          	;JSR C64_CHROUT				;Print it
  2286                          	;RTS					; and return.
  2287  1caa 4ccaf1             	JMP C64_CHROUT				;JMP=JSR+RTS
  2288  1cad 0a64e810           @lo10	!byte <10, <100, <1000, <10000
  2289  1cb1 00000327           @hi10	!byte >10, >100, >1000, >10000
  2290                          
  2292                          !ifdef caml_INTERP {
  2293                          ;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  2294                          ;;	 BYTECODE INTERPRETER SPECIFIC
  2295                          ;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  2296                          
  2297                          		;; "PAIRED OPCODES" DISAMBIGUATION.
  2298                          		;; Two opcodes are paired iff their bits are equal but the msb.
  2299                          		;; Paired opcodes share the same jumptable place (see at end);
  2300                          		;; the fetch-exec routine sets C = msb of fetched opcode.
  2301                          		;; N.b.: the routines placement guarantees that conditional
  2302                          		;; branches targets stay in range [-128, +127]
  2303                          
  2304                          !set PUSH_ULTINT = *
  2305                          !ifdef caml_gen_PUSH_ULTINT {
  2306                            !ifdef caml_gen_PUSH {
  2307                              !ifdef caml_gen_ULTINT {
  2308                          		BCS +
  2309                          		JSR PUSH
  2310                          		+NEXT
  2311                          +		JMP ULTINT
  2312  1cb5 20e313                 } else { 	JSR PUSH
  2313                          		+NEXT }

    58                           !ifdef caml_INTERP {
    59  1cb8 4c3600              JMP caml_interp_fetch
    61                           RTS

  2314                            } else { !set PUSH_ULTINT = ULTINT }
  2315                          }

  2320  1cbd 4cd409             		JMP STOP
  2321                          }

  2326  1cc2 8545               		STA TMP
  2327  1cc4 20e313             		JSR PUSH

  2329  1cc9 4cb413             		JMP ACCL

  2360  1ce1 184c301d           		CLC:JMP caml_interp_skip2or3by	;no BCC, it'll be out-of-range
  2361                          }
  2362

  2368                          		;; fallthrough BULTINT
  2369                              } else { !set PHACC1_BULTINT = PHACC17 }

  2372                          BULTINT

  2435  1cf8 38b035             		SEC:BCS caml_interp_skip2or3by

  2497                          }

  2499                          
  2500                          BRANCH						;Branch to *PC
  2501  1d1e b137               		LDA (PC),Y
  2502  1d20 aa                 		TAX
  2503  1d21 e637               		INC PC
  2504  1d23 d002               		BNE +
  2505  1d25 e638               		INC PC + 1
  2506  1d27 b137               +		LDA (PC),Y
  2507                          		;; fallthrough caml_interp_start
  2508                          caml_interp_start				;ENTRYPOINT: start interpreter
  2509  1d29 8637               		STX PC
  2510  1d2b 8538               		STA PC + 1
  2511  1d2d 4c3600             		JMP caml_interp_fetch

  2513                          caml_interp_skip2or3by				;Skip next 2 + Carry bytes
  2514  1d30 a902               		LDA # 2
  2515  1d32 6537               		ADC PC
  2516  1d34 8537               		STA PC
  2517  1d36 9002               		BCC +

  2529                          		;; The table is page-aligned. The fetch-exec routine sets C=bit7
  2530                          		;; of fetched opcode, then accesses the table using 2*opcode as
  2531                          		;; an index.

  2533  1d46 eaeaeaeaeaeaeaea...		!align	$FF, $00
