    24                          
    25                          	;; CONSTANTS
    26                          .heap_start	= caml_glob_data		;start of heap
    27                          .heap_end	= caml_stack_start		;end of heap + 1
    28                          .halfsz	= ((.heap_end - .heap_start) div 4) * 2	;heap half-size; ensure it's even
    29                          
    30                          	;; VARIABLES
    31  1f00 e224               .CUR_START	!word .heap_start		;current half
    32  1f02 7060               .CUR_END	!word .heap_start + .halfsz	;end of current half
    33  1f04 7060               .OTH_START	!word .heap_start + .halfsz	;other half of the heap
    34  1f06 fe9b               .OTH_END	!word .heap_start + .halfsz * 2	;end of other half
    35                          
    37                          ;; globals - due strategie possibili:
    38                          ;; 1) considero i globals già allocati nello heap, con .heap_start =
    39                          ;;    caml_glob_data e inizializzando HEAP a caml_glob_end: in questo
    40                          ;;    modo, quando c'è una gc i globals vengono spostati da una metà
    41                          ;;    all'altra dello heap, ma la scansione dei puntatori nei blocchi
    42                          ;;    è semplice (sta già nell'algo di Cheney)
    43                          ;; 2) tengo i globals fuori dallo heap, con .heap_start = caml_glob_end:
    44                          ;;    così evito lo spostamento dei globals a ogni gc (che può essere
    45                          ;;    costosa ad es. se ci sono grandi array) ma devo considerare ogni
    46                          ;;    puntatore all'interno di ogni blocco dei globals una radice e
    47                          ;;    modificare l'algo di gc.
    48                          ;; PER ORA SI USA 1)
    49                          
    50                          caml_heap_init
    51                          	;; Initialize the heap pointer. Called by caml_init.
    52  1f08 a910               	LDA # <caml_glob_end			;globals are already allocated
    53  1f0a 8530               	STA HEAP				;so set HEAP after them
    54  1f0c a926               	LDA # >caml_glob_end
    55  1f0e 8531               	STA HEAP + 1
    56  1f10 60                 	RTS
    57                          caml_alloc
    58                          	;; Allocate a block; params: A=tag, X=size>0 (no atoms!)
    59                          	;; Return BLK=block's address, A=X=size, Y=0; or raise Out_of_memory.
    60                          @SZ  	= GC					;1 by - block size
    61                          @TAG 	= GC + 1				;1 by - block tag
    62                          @SCN 	= GC + 2				;2 by scanned block
    63                          @PTR 	= GC + 4				;2 by aux pointer
    64                          @CNT 	= GC + 6				;2 by field counter
    65                          	;; Save the parameters
    66  1f11 8659               	STX @SZ
    67  1f13 855a               	STA @TAG
    68                          	;; C=0: gc not tried yet; C=1: alloc failed, GC done, retrying)
    69  1f15 18                 	CLC
    70  1f16 08                 @retry	PHP					;save GC-done flag on HW stack
    71  1f17 a530               	LDA HEAP
    72  1f19 8557               	STA BLK
    73  1f1b a531               	LDA HEAP + 1
    74  1f1d 8558               	STA BLK + 1
    75                          	;; Increment HEAP by the # of bytes to be allocated
    76  1f1f e8                 	INX					;perform HEAP:=HEAP+2*(size+1):
    77  1f20 d006               	BNE +					;  if size + 1 = 256
    78  1f22 e631               	INC HEAP + 1				;  then incr. HEAPh
    79  1f24 e631               	INC HEAP + 1				;    twice (512 bytes)
    80  1f26 d00f               	BNE @limits				;    BNE=JMP
    81  1f28 8a                 +	TXA					;  else
    82  1f29 0a                 	ASL					;    C:A := 2*(size+1),
    83  1f2a 9003               	BCC +					;    if carry set then
    84  1f2c e631               	INC HEAP + 1				;      add it to HEAPh,
    85  1f2e 18                 	CLC
    86  1f2f 6530               +	ADC HEAP				;    add 2*(size+1)
    87  1f31 8530               	STA HEAP				;    to HEAPl
    88  1f33 9002               	BCC @limits
    89  1f35 e631               	INC HEAP + 1
    90                          	;; If there's enough room, write tag and size into the header and exit
    91  1f37 ad021f             @limits	LDA .CUR_END
    92  1f3a c530               	CMP HEAP
    93  1f3c ad031f             	LDA .CUR_END + 1
    94  1f3f e531               	SBC HEAP + 1				;.CUR_END < HEAP?
    95  1f41 9015               	BCC @gctry				;yes: try a garbage collection
    96  1f43 a55a               	LDA @TAG				;no: write tag and size  
    97  1f45 a000               	LDY # 0
    98  1f47 9157               	STA (BLK),Y				;  header's 1st by. := tag
    99  1f49 e657               	INC BLK					;  (safe, BLK is even)
   100  1f4b a559               	LDA @SZ
   101  1f4d 9157               	STA (BLK),Y			     	;  header's 2nd by. := size
   102  1f4f e657               	INC BLK
   103  1f51 d002               	BNE +
   104  1f53 e658               	INC BLK + 1		       		;  BLK=address of field(0)
   105  1f55 28                 +	PLP					;  pop GC-done flag
   106  1f56 aa                 	TAX					;  RETURN A=X=size, BLK=addr
   107  1f57 60                 	RTS
   108                          	;; else try a GC or, if already done, raise OOM
   109  1f58 28                 @gctry	PLP					;get GC-done flag from HW stack
   110  1f59 b008               	BCS @oom				;check if GC done yet:
   111  1f5b 206e1f             	JSR .caml_garbage_collect		;no: call the garbage collector
   112  1f5e a659               	LDX @SZ					; X := size
   113  1f60 38                 	SEC					; set GC-done flag
   114  1f61 b0b3               	BCS @retry				; then try to allocate again.
   115                          @oom	+caml_raise Out_of_memory	        ;

; ******** macro from /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/loader.asm
   184                          .exn
   185  1f63 a992                LDA # <caml_std_exn[.exn]
   186  1f65 852c                STA ACCU
   187  1f67 a908                LDA # >caml_std_exn[.exn]
   188  1f69 852d                STA ACCU + 1
   189  1f6b 4c8e18              JMP RAISE

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/memory.asm
   115                          yes: raise OOM.
   116                          
   117                          .caml_garbage_collect
   118                          	;; Stop-and-copy garbage collector, based on C.J. Cheney's algorithm
   119                          	;; 1) Swap the current half of the heap with the other one
   120  1f6e ad041f             	LDA .OTH_START				;lo bytes...
   121  1f71 ae001f             	LDX .CUR_START
   122  1f74 8d001f             	STA .CUR_START
   123  1f77 8e041f             	STX .OTH_START
   124  1f7a 8530               	STA HEAP
   125  1f7c ad061f             	LDA .OTH_END
   126  1f7f ae021f             	LDX .CUR_END
   127  1f82 8d021f             	STA .CUR_END
   128  1f85 8e061f             	STX .OTH_END
   129  1f88 ad051f             	LDA .OTH_START + 1			;...and hi bytes
   130  1f8b ae011f             	LDX .CUR_START + 1
   131  1f8e 8d011f             	STA .CUR_START + 1
   132  1f91 8e051f             	STX .OTH_START + 1
   133  1f94 8531               	STA HEAP + 1
   134  1f96 ad071f             	LDA .OTH_END + 1
   135  1f99 ae031f             	LDX .CUR_END + 1
   136  1f9c 8d031f             	STA .CUR_END + 1
   137  1f9f 8e071f             	STX .OTH_END + 1
   138                          	;; 2) Scan all roots, copy each pointed block to the fresh half,
   139                          	;; update each pointer to reference the copy
   140                          	;; --- Accumulator ---
   141  1fa2 a52c               	LDA ACCU
   142  1fa4 2cba09             	BIT caml_is_block			;Is it a pointer?
   143  1fa7 d00f               	BNE +					;Skip if not
   144  1fa9 855b               	STA @SCN
   145  1fab a52d               	LDA ACCU + 1
   146  1fad 855c               	STA @SCN + 1
   147  1faf 208a20             	JSR .caml_gc_fwdptr			;Get fwd ptr (maybe copy blk)
   148  1fb2 9004               	BCC +					;Skip if not a ptr in heap
   149  1fb4 852c               	STA ACCU				;Save fwd pointer, lo
   150  1fb6 862d               	STX ACCU + 1	 			;     and hi byte.
   151                          	;; --- Environment ---
   152  1fb8 a534               +	LDA ENV					;Do as above, for ENV.
   153  1fba 2cba09             	BIT caml_is_block
   154  1fbd d00f               	BNE +
   155  1fbf 855b               	STA @SCN
   156  1fc1 a535               	LDA ENV + 1
   157  1fc3 855c               	STA @SCN + 1
   158  1fc5 208a20             	JSR .caml_gc_fwdptr
   159  1fc8 9004               	BCC +
   160  1fca 8534               	STA ENV
   161  1fcc 8635               	STX ENV + 1
   162                          	;; --- Stack ---
   163  1fce a900               +	LDA # < caml_stack_start		;Do as above for all stack elts:
   164  1fd0 8d6220             	STA @testlo + 1				;set <last_address
   165  1fd3 a99c               	LDA # > caml_stack_start
   166  1fd5 8d6620             	STA @testhi + 1				;set >last_address
   167  1fd8 a900               	LDA # < caml_stack_end
   168  1fda 855d               	STA @PTR				;set <first_address + 1
   169  1fdc a9a0               	LDA # > caml_stack_end
   170  1fde 855e               	STA @PTR + 1				;set >first_address + 1
   171  1fe0 205920             	JSR .caml_gc_scnroot
   172                          	;; --- Globals ---
   173  1fe3 a962               	LDA # < caml_glob_table			;Same, for globals
   174  1fe5 8d6220             	STA @testlo + 1
   175  1fe8 a924               	LDA # > caml_glob_table
   176  1fea 8d6620             	STA @testhi + 1
   177  1fed a9e2               	LDA # < caml_glob_data
   178  1fef 855d               	STA @PTR
   179  1ff1 a924               	LDA # > caml_glob_data
   180  1ff3 855e               	STA @PTR + 1
   181  1ff5 205920             	JSR .caml_gc_scnroot
   182                          	;; 3) Scan all pointers in blocks that have been copied to the fresh
   183                          	;; half of the heap, copy their pointed blocks to the fresh half,
   184                          	;; update each pointer to reference the copy.
   185  1ff8 ad001f             	LDA .CUR_START
   186  1ffb 855d               	STA @PTR
   187  1ffd ad011f             	LDA .CUR_START + 1
   188  2000 855e               	STA @PTR + 1
   189  2002 a55d               --	LDA @PTR				;Loop: scan blocks
   190  2004 c530               	CMP HEAP
   191  2006 a55e               	LDA @PTR + 1
   192  2008 e531               	SBC HEAP + 1
   193  200a b04c               	BCS +++					;Exit loop if @PTR >= HEAP
   194  200c b15d               	LDA (@PTR),Y				; Load tag (Y=0 here)
   195  200e aa                 	TAX					; Save it in X
   196  200f e65d               	INC @PTR			       	; Safe, @PTR is even before INC
   197  2011 b15d               	LDA (@PTR),Y				; Load block size
   198  2013 e65d               	INC @PTR		 		; Set @PTR to point to Field(0)
   199  2015 d002               	BNE +
   200  2017 e65e               	INC @PTR + 1
   201  2019 e0fb               +	CPX # No_scan_tag			; Is tag >= No_scan_tag?
   202  201b 9010               	BCC @scan
   203  201d 0a                 	ASL					; Yes: compute A := 2*size and
   204  201e 9003               	BCC +					;  add it to @PTR.
   205  2020 e65e               	INC @PTR + 1
   206  2022 18                 	CLC
   207  2023 655d               +	ADC @PTR
   208  2025 855d               	STA @PTR
   209  2027 90d9               	BCC --
   210  2029 e65e               	INC @PTR + 1			    	;  Now @PTR->next block's header
   211  202b b0d5               	BCS --					;  Continue the outer loop.
   212  202d 855f               @scan	STA @CNT				; No: set @CNT = # of fields
   213  202f b15d               -	LDA (@PTR),Y				; Loop: scan fields
   214  2031 2cba09             	BIT caml_is_block			;  Is current field a block?
   215  2034 d014               	BNE @next				;  Skip it if not.
   216  2036 855b               	STA @SCN				;  Yes: store it in @SCN, lo by.
   217  2038 c8                 	INY
   218  2039 b15d               	LDA (@PTR),Y
   219  203b 855c               	STA @SCN + 1				;  and hi by.
   220  203d 88                 	DEY
   221  203e 208a20             	JSR .caml_gc_fwdptr			;  Get fwd ptr (maybe copy blk)
   222  2041 9007               	BCC @next				;  Skip if block is out_of_heap
   223  2043 915d               	STA (@PTR),Y				;  Save fwd ptr, lo byte
   224  2045 8a                 	TXA					;  A := fwd ptr, hi byte
   225  2046 c8                 	INY
   226  2047 915d               	STA (@PTR),Y	 			;  Save fwd ptr, hi byte.
   227  2049 88                 	DEY					;  Y=0 now.
   228  204a e65d               @next	INC @PTR				;  Increment @PTR twice to let
   229  204c e65d               	INC @PTR				;  it point to next field.
   230  204e d002               	BNE +
   231  2050 e65e               	INC @PTR + 1
   232  2052 c65f               +	DEC @CNT				;  Decrement loop counter
   233  2054 d0d9               	BNE -					; End of loop: scan fields.
   234  2056 f0aa               	BEQ --					;End of loop: scan blocks.
   235  2058 60                 +++	RTS					;GC done.
   236                          
   237                          .caml_gc_scnroot
   238                          	;; Subroutine: loop on @PTR > last_address and call .caml_gc_fwdptr
   239  2059 a55d               -	LDA @PTR
   240  205b d002               	BNE +
   241  205d c65e               	DEC @PTR + 1
   242  205f c65d               +	DEC @PTR				;@PTR points to curr elt, hi by.
   243  2061 a934               @testlo	LDA # <.dummy				;SMC: real arg is <last_address
   244  2063 c55d               	CMP @PTR
   245  2065 a912               @testhi	LDA # >.dummy				;SMC: real arg is >last_address
   246  2067 e55e               	SBC @PTR + 1
   247  2069 b01e               	BCS +					;Exit loop if all elts scanned
   248  206b b15d               	LDA (@PTR),Y			    	;Get hi byte (Y=0 here)
   249  206d aa                 	TAX					;Save it in X
   250  206e c65d               	DEC @PTR			 	;Safe, @PTR is odd before DEC
   251  2070 b15d               	LDA (@PTR),Y				;Get lo byte
   252  2072 2cba09             	BIT caml_is_block			;Is it a pointer?
   253  2075 d0e2               	BNE -					;If not, skip it
   254  2077 855b               	STA @SCN			    	;Save the pointer, lo byte
   255  2079 865c               	STX @SCN + 1				;and hi byte
   256  207b 208a20             	JSR .caml_gc_fwdptr			;Get fwd ptr (maybe copy blk)
   257  207e 90d9               	BCC -					;Skip if out_of_heap
   258  2080 915d               	STA (@PTR),Y				;Save fwd pointer, lo byte
   259  2082 8a                 	TXA					;(prepare to save hi by: A := X
   260  2083 c8                 	INY					; and adjust Y)
   261  2084 915d               	STA (@PTR),Y	 			;Save hi byte
   262  2086 88                 	DEY					;Y=0 now
   263  2087 f0d0               	BEQ -					;BEQ=JMP, continue loop
   264  2089 60                 +	RTS
   265                          .caml_gc_fwdptr
   266                          	;; Subroutine: if @SCN is allocated in the old half of the heap, copy
   267                          	;; it in the fresh one, set Field(0)=forward pointer, set size=0, then
   268                          	;; return C=1, X:A=fwd ptr, Y=0; if already copied, return C=0, Y=0.
   269  208a a55b               	LDA @SCN				;Check if out-of-heap ptr:
   270  208c cd041f             	CMP .OTH_START
   271  208f a55c               	LDA @SCN + 1
   272  2091 ed051f             	SBC .OTH_START + 1			;@SCN < lower bound?
   273  2094 900d               	BCC +					;yes: exit
   274  2096 a55b               	LDA @SCN
   275  2098 cd061f             	CMP .OTH_END
   276  209b a55c               	LDA @SCN + 1
   277  209d ed071f             	SBC .OTH_END + 1			;@SCN >= higher bound?
   278  20a0 9002               	BCC ++					;no:  go ahead
   279  20a2 18                 	CLC					;yes: clear carry and exit
   280  20a3 60                 +	RTS					;RETURN C=0, Y=0.
   281  20a4 c65c               ++	DEC @SCN + 1				;decrement ptr's hi byte
   282  20a6 a0ff               	LDY # -1				; and set Y in order to
   283  20a8 b15b               @again	LDA (@SCN),Y				; get block size
   284  20aa d00c               	BNE @copy				;if size = 0
   285  20ac e65c               	INC @SCN + 1				;then restore the pointer,
   286  20ae a001               	LDY # 1					;  get fwd ptr from Field(0):
   287  20b0 b15b               	LDA (@SCN),Y				;    get hi byte
   288  20b2 aa                 	TAX					;    and save it in X
   289  20b3 88                 	DEY					;    get lo byte
   290  20b4 b15b               	LDA (@SCN),Y				;    and save it in A
   291  20b6 38                 	SEC					;  set C=1
   292  20b7 60                 	RTS					;  RETURN C=1, X:A=fwdptr, Y=0.
   293  20b8 aa                 @copy	TAX					;else X := size
   294  20b9 a900               	LDA # 0					;  mark this block as visited,
   295  20bb 915b               	STA (@SCN),Y				;    setting its size = 0
   296  20bd 88                 	DEY					;  Y := $FE
   297  20be b15b               	LDA (@SCN),Y				;  A := tag
   298  20c0 c9f9               	CMP # Infix_tag				;  is it an infix block?
   299  20c2 f055               	BEQ @infix				;  yes: skip to proper section.
   300  20c4 e65c               	INC @SCN + 1				;  restore the pointer
   301  20c6 a000               	LDY # 0					;  and Y register
   302  20c8 9130               	STA (HEAP),Y				;  write tag in new block
   303  20ca e630               	INC HEAP
   304  20cc 8a                 	TXA
   305  20cd 9130               	STA (HEAP),Y				;  write size
   306  20cf e630               	INC HEAP				;  now HEAP->Field(0)
   307  20d1 d002               	BNE +
   308  20d3 e631               	INC HEAP + 1
   309  20d5 a530               +	LDA HEAP
   310  20d7 8557               	STA BLK					;  BLK := &Field(0)
   311  20d9 a531               	LDA HEAP + 1
   312  20db 8558               	STA BLK + 1
   313  20dd 8a                 	TXA					;  Add 2*size to HEAP
   314  20de 0a                 	ASL
   315  20df 9003               	BCC +
   316  20e1 e631               	INC HEAP + 1
   317  20e3 18                 	CLC
   318  20e4 6530               +	ADC HEAP
   319  20e6 8530               	STA HEAP
   320  20e8 9002               	BCC +
   321  20ea e631               	INC HEAP + 1
   322  20ec 8a                 +	TXA					;  Prepare to copy all fields:
   323  20ed 0a                 	ASL
   324  20ee a8                 	TAY					;  C:Y := 2*size
   325  20ef 9006               	BCC @lt256				;   2*size < 256by (<128 fields)
   326  20f1 f016               	BEQ @eq256				;   2*size = 256by (=128 fields)
   327  20f3 e65c               	INC @SCN + 1				;   2*size > 256by (>128 fields)
   328  20f5 e658               	INC BLK + 1
   329                          --						;  loop: copy @SCN fields to BLK
   330  20f7 88                 @lt256	DEY
   331  20f8 b15b               -	LDA (@SCN),Y
   332  20fa 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   333  20fc 88                 	DEY
   334  20fd d0f9               	BNE -
   335  20ff b15b               	LDA (@SCN),Y				;   handle Y = 0 apart
   336  2101 9157               	STA (BLK),Y
   337  2103 9007               	BCC @wrtfwd				;  exit loop
   338  2105 c65c               	DEC @SCN + 1
   339  2107 c658               	DEC BLK + 1
   340  2109 18                 @eq256  CLC
   341  210a 90eb               	BCC --
   342  210c c8                 @wrtfwd	INY					;  Y:=1
   343  210d a558               	LDA BLK + 1				;  load fwd pointer, hi
   344  210f 915b               	STA (@SCN),Y				;  write it in field(0), hi
   345  2111 aa                 	TAX					;  and move it in X
   346  2112 88                 	DEY					;  Y := 0
   347  2113 a557               	LDA BLK					;  load fwd pointer, lo
   348  2115 915b               	STA (@SCN),Y				;  and write it in field(0),lo
   349  2117 38                 	SEC					;  set carry before exit
   350  2118 60                 	RTS					;  RETURN (X:A=fwdptr, Y=0)
   351  2119 8a                 @infix	TXA					;A:=X=size=dist.from main blk
   352  211a 8e3821             	STX @dst + 1				;save it for later
   353  211d 0a                 	ASL					;C:A := 2*dist.
   354  211e 8d2921             	STA @dst2lo + 1				;write next SBC's arg.
   355  2121 9002               	BCC +					;perform @SCN:=@SCN-.DST:
   356  2123 c65c               	DEC @SCN + 1				;  decr @SCN_hi if C set
   357  2125 a55b               +	LDA @SCN				;  load @SCN_lo
   358  2127 38                 	SEC
   359  2128 e934               @dst2lo	SBC # <.dummy				;  SMC: subtract <2*dist.
   360  212a 855b               	STA @SCN				;  save result, lo by.
   361  212c b002               	BCS +
   362  212e c65c               	DEC @SCN + 1				;  adjust hi by.
   363  2130 c8                 +	INY					;(@SCN),Y = main block's size
   364  2131 20a820             	JSR @again				;get main block's fwdptr in X:A
   365  2134 8d3f21             	STA @fwdlo + 1				;write next ADC's arg.
   366  2137 a934               @dst	LDA # <.dummy				;SMC: get infix's SIZE
   367  2139 0a                 	ASL					;A := <SIZE*2, C := >SIZE*2 
   368  213a 9002               	BCC @fwdlo				;perform X:A:=X:A+main fwd ptr:
   369  213c e8                 	INX					;  incr X if SIZE*2>255
   370  213d 18                 	CLC
   371  213e 6934               @fwdlo	ADC # <.dummy				;  SMC: add forward ptr, lo byte
   372  2140 9001               	BCC +
   373  2142 e8                 	INX					;  adjust X
   374  2143 38                 +	SEC					;set carry before exit
   375  2144 60                 	RTS					;RETURN(X:A=infix forward ptr)
   376                          caml_shrink_latest_alloc
   377                          	;; Reduce the size of the latest allocated block; new size MUST BE less
   378                          	;; than the original one (no check) and NO GARBAGE COLLECTION occurred
   379                          	;; since the block allocation. Params: X=size>0, Y=0, BLK=address.
   380                          	;; Shrinking is done by updating the new size in the block's header and
   381                          	;; the HEAP pointer.
   382                          	;; Return: A=X=size, Y=0.
   383                          @SZ 	= GC					;2 by - block size in bytes
   384  2145 c658               	DEC BLK	+ 1				;Prepare access to the 'size'
   385  2147 88                 	DEY					; byte in block's header
   386  2148 b157               	LDA (BLK),Y				;Read original size from header
   387  214a 8559               	STA @SZ					; and save it
   388  214c 8a                 	TXA					;A := new size
   389  214d 9157               	STA (BLK),Y				;Write new size into header
   390  214f e658               	INC BLK + 1				;Restore block pointer
   391  2151 c8                 	INY					; and Y register
   392  2152 49ff               	EOR # $FF				;Do an inverse subtraction:
   393  2154 38                 	SEC					; A := @SZ - A
   394  2155 6559               	ADC @SZ					;    = orig.size - new size
   395  2157 0a                 	ASL					;Compute 2 * A
   396  2158 8559               	STA @SZ					;Store result, lo byte, in @SZ
   397  215a 845a               	STY @SZ + 1				;Set @SZ + 1 to 0
   398  215c 265a               	ROL @SZ + 1				;Store result, MSB, in @SZ + 1
   399  215e a530               	LDA HEAP				;Recover unused block bytes by
   400  2160 38                 	SEC					; decrementing the heap pointer
   401  2161 e559               	SBC @SZ					; by 2 * (orig.size - new size)
   402  2163 8530               	STA HEAP				;Store new value, lo byte
   403  2165 a531               	LDA HEAP + 1
   404  2167 e55a               	SBC @SZ + 1
   405  2169 8531               	STA HEAP + 1				;Store new value, hi byte
   406  216b 60                 	RTS					;Return.
   407                          caml_memory_end
   408                          } ;!zone caml_MEMORY
   409                          

; ******** Source: snake.asm

   363                            !set 	caml_AUX__caml_float_loadARG = 1
   364                            !set 	caml_AUX__caml_float_alloc_result = 1
   365                          }
   366                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_div_float {

   370                          }
   371                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_power_float {

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib.asm
     4                           !source "/home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_arrays.asm"

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_arrays.asm
     1                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
     2                          ;; Progetto BreadCaml / The BreadCaml Project
     3                          ;; Copyright (C) 21-Apr-2026 Piero Furiesi
     4                          ;;
     5                          ;; Questo  programma è  software libero;  è possibile  ridistribuirlo e/o
     6                          ;; modificarlo secondo i  termini della GNU General  Public License (GPL)
     7                          ;; versione  2,  come specificato  nel  file  LICENZA-it nella  directory
     8                          ;; principale del progetto.
     9                          ;;
    10                          ;; This program is  free software; you can redistribute  it and/or modify
    11                          ;; it under the terms of the  GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2,
    12                          ;; as specified in the LICENSE-en file in the project root.
    13                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
    14                          
    15                          ;;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16                          ;;; ARRAYS (ocaml-4.04.1/byterun/array.c)
    17                          ;;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18                          !zone caml_ARRAYS {
    19                          
    20                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_make_vect {
    21                          caml_make_vect
    22                          	;; allocate and initialize an array
    23                          	;; ACCU = length
    24                          	;; SP[0] = init
    25                          @NFLO2 	= TMP
    26                          @INIT 	= TMP + 2
    27                          	;; load init
    28                          	INY
    29                          	LDA (SP),Y
    30                          	STA @INIT + 1
    31                          	DEY
    32                          	LDA (SP),Y
    33                          	STA @INIT
    34                          	;; is init a block?
    35                          	BIT caml_is_block			; test @INIT
    36                          	BNE @no_float_array
    37                          	;; tag(init) = Double_tag?
    38                          	LDY # -2
    39                          	DEC @INIT + 1
    40                          	LDA (@INIT),Y
    41                          	INC @INIT + 1
    42                          	LDY # 0
    43                          	CMP # Double_tag
    44                          	BNE @no_float_array
    45                          ;; 	;; is init in heap?
    46                          ;; 	SEC
    47                          ;; 	LDA @INIT
    48                          ;; 	SBC # < caml_heap_start
    49                          ;; 	STA TMP
    50                          ;; 	LDA @INIT + 1
    51                          ;; 	SBC # > caml_heap_start
    52                          ;; 	STA TMP + 1
    53                          ;; 	LDA TMP
    54                          ;; 	CMP # < caml_heap_sz
    55                          ;; 	LDA TMP + 1
    56                          ;; 	SBC # > caml_heap_sz
    57                          ;; 	BCS @no_float_array
    58                          	;; allocate float array 
    59                          	JSR caml_make_float_vect
    60                          	;; init floats
    61                          	LDA @NFLO2			; see caml_make_float_vect
    62                          	LSR
    63                          	TAX				; X = no. of floats
    64                          ;	CLC
    65                          -	+caml_move_float @INIT, BLK
    66                          	LDA # < (2 * Double_wosize)
    67                          	ADC BLK
    68                          	STA BLK
    69                          	LDA # > (2 * Double_wosize)
    70                          	ADC BLK + 1
    71                          	STA BLK + 1
    72                          	DEX
    73                          	BNE -
    74                          	RTS
    75                          @no_float_array
    76                          	;; check length
    77                          	LSR ACCU + 1
    78                          	BNE @error
    79                          	LDA ACCU
    80                          	ROR
    81                          	BNE +
    82                          	;; length = 0, empty array
    83                          	LDA # < caml_atom0
    84                          	STA ACCU
    85                          	LDA # > caml_atom0
    86                          	STA ACCU + 1
    87                          	RTS
    88                          	;; length > 0, allocate array
    89                          +	TAX				; size
    90                          	TYA				; tag = 0
    91                          	JSR caml_alloc
    92                          	LDA BLK
    93                          	STA ACCU
    94                          	LDA BLK + 1
    95                          	STA ACCU + 1
    96                          	;; init fields
    97                          -	LDA @INIT
    98                          	STA (BLK),Y
    99                          	INY
   100                          	LDA @INIT + 1
   101                          	STA (BLK),Y
   102                          	INY
   103                          	BNE +
   104                          	INC BLK + 1
   105                          +	DEX
   106                          	BNE -
   107                          	LDY # 0
   108                          	RTS
   109                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Array.make"
   110                          }
   111                          
   112                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_make_float_vect {
   113                          	;; allocate an array of floats
   114                          	;; ACCU = length
   115                          caml_make_float_vect
   116                          @NFLO2 	= TMP			; see caml_make_vect
   117                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   118                          	BNE @error
   119                          	LDA ACCU
   120                          	;; exn if 3 * index > 255
   121                          	AND # $FE
   122                          	BNE +
   123                          	;; length = 0, empty array
   124                          	LDA # < caml_atom0
   125                          	STA ACCU
   126                          	LDA # > caml_atom0
   127                          	STA ACCU + 1
   128                          	RTS
   129                          	;; length > 0, size is length * 3
   130                          +	STA @NFLO2
   131                          	LSR
   132                          ;	CLC 				;implicit
   133                          	ADC @NFLO2
   134                          	BCS @error
   135                          	;; allocate array of floats
   136                          	TAX				; size
   137                          	LDA # Double_array_tag		; tag
   138                          	JSR caml_alloc
   139                          	LDA BLK
   140                          	STA ACCU
   141                          	LDA BLK + 1
   142                          	STA ACCU + 1
   143                          	RTS
   144                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Array.create_float"
   145                          }
   146                          
   147                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_make_array {
   148                          	;; if init is a block of floats, unbox all elements
   149                          	;; ACCU = init
   150                          caml_make_array
   151                          @FIELD0	= TMP
   152                          @NFLOATS= TMP + 2
   153                          	;; exit if size(init) = 0
   154                          	LDA # >caml_atom0
   155                                  CMP ACCU + 1
   156                                  BNE +
   157                                  LDA # <caml_atom0
   158                                  CMP ACCU
   159                          	BEQ @exit
   160                          	;; exit if Field(init,0) is not a block
   161                          +	INY
   162                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   163                          	STA @FIELD0
   164                          	INY
   165                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   166                          	STA @FIELD0 + 1
   167                          	BIT caml_is_block			; test @FIELD0
   168                          	BNE @exit
   169                          ;; 	;; exit if Field(init,0) is out of heap
   170                          ;;	SEC
   171                          ;;	LDA @FIELD0
   172                          ;;	SBC # < caml_heap_start
   173                          ;;	STA TMP
   174                          ;;	LDA @FIELD0 + 1
   175                          ;;	SBC # > caml_heap_start
   176                          ;;	STA TMP + 1
   177                          ;;	LDA TMP
   178                          ;;	CMP # < caml_heap_sz
   179                          ;;	LDA TMP + 1
   180                          ;;	SBC # > caml_heap_sz
   181                          ;;	BCS @exit
   182                          	;; exit if tag(Field(init,0)) <> Double_tag
   183                          	LDY # -2
   184                          	DEC @FIELD0 + 1
   185                          	LDA (@FIELD0),Y
   186                          	CMP # Double_tag
   187                          	BEQ +
   188                          	LDY # 0
   189                          @exit	RTS
   190                          	;; check length
   191                          +	INY
   192                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   193                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   194                          ;	inc ACCU + 1
   195                          	INY
   196                          	CMP # 255 DIV Double_wosize + 1
   197                          	BCC +
   198                          	+caml_raise Out_of_memory
   199                          	;; size is lenght * 3
   200                          +	STA @NFLOATS
   201                          	ASL
   202                          ;	clc
   203                          	ADC @NFLOATS
   204                          	;; allocate array of floats
   205                          	TAX
   206                          	LDA # Double_array_tag
   207                          	JSR caml_alloc
   208                          	LDA BLK
   209                          	STA ACCU
   210                          	LDA BLK + 1
   211                          	STA ACCU + 1
   212                          	;; init fields
   213                          	INC @FIELD0 + 1			; previously dec'ed
   214                          -	+caml_move_float @FIELD0, BLK
   215                          	DEX
   216                          	BEQ @exit
   217                          	INC @FIELD0
   218                          	INC @FIELD0
   219                          	BNE +
   220                          	INC @FIELD0 + 1
   221                          +	INC BLK
   222                          	INC BLK
   223                          	BNE -
   224                          	INC BLK + 1
   225                          	JMP -
   226                          }
   227                          
   228                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_get {
   229                          caml_array_get
   230                          	;; return an array element
   231                          	;; ACCU = array
   232                          	;; SP[0] = index
   233                          
   234                          	;; load tag
   235                          	LDY # -2
   236                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   237                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   238                          	INY
   239                          	;; check if float
   240                          	CMP # Double_array_tag
   241                          	BNE caml_array_get_addr__loadsize
   242                          	JMP caml_array_get_float__loadsize
   243                          }
   244                          
   245                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_get_addr {
   246                          	;; return an array element (no-float version)
   247                          	;; ACCU = array
   248                          	;; SP[0] = index
   249                          caml_array_get_addr
   250                          	DEY
   251                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   252                          caml_array_get_addr__loadsize
   253                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   254                          	STA TMP                                 ; TMP := size
   255                          	INC ACCU + 1                            ; restore ptr to Field(0)
   256                          	LDY # 1
   257                          	LDA (SP),Y                              ; load index, hi
   258                          	LSR
   259                          	BNE @error                              ; exn if index>255 or index<0
   260                          	BCC +
   261                          	INC ACCU + 1                            ; inc ACCU if index > 127
   262                          +	DEY
   263                          	LDA (SP),Y                              ; load index, lo
   264                          	TAY                                     ; now ACCU+Y points to elt, hi
   265                          	ROR
   266                          	CMP TMP
   267                          	BCS @error                              ; exn if index >= size
   268                          	LDA (ACCU),Y                            ; get array elt, hi
   269                          	TAX
   270                          	DEY
   271                          	LDA (ACCU),Y                            ; get array elt, lo
   272                          	STA ACCU                                ; ACCU <- array[index]
   273                          	STX ACCU + 1
   274                          	LDY # 0
   275                          	RTS
   276                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "index out of bounds"
   277                          }
   278                          
   279                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_get_float {
   280                          	;; return an array element (float-only version)
   281                          	;; ACCU = array
   282                          	;; SP[0] = index
   283                          caml_array_get_float
   284                          	;; load size
   285                          	DEY
   286                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   287                          caml_array_get_float__loadsize
   288                          @SZ	= TMP
   289                          @IDX	= TMP + 1
   290                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   291                          	STA @SZ
   292                          	INC ACCU + 1
   293                          	;; load index, hi
   294                          	LDY # 1
   295                          	LDA (SP),Y
   296                          	BEQ +
   297                          	;; exn if hi > 0
   298                          	JMP @error
   299                          	;; load index, lo
   300                          +	DEY
   301                          	LDA (SP),Y
   302                          	;; exn if 3 * index >= size
   303                          	AND # $FE
   304                          	BEQ +
   305                          	STA @IDX
   306                          	LSR
   307                          	;CLC
   308                          	ADC @IDX
   309                          	BCS @error
   310                          	CMP @SZ
   311                          	BCS @error
   312                          	;; ACCU <- &array[index]
   313                          +	ASL
   314                          	BCC +
   315                          	INC ACCU + 1
   316                          	CLC
   317                          +	ADC ACCU
   318                          	STA ACCU
   319                          	BCC +
   320                          	INC ACCU + 1
   321                          	;; allocate float
   322                          +	LDA # Double_tag
   323                          	LDX # Double_wosize
   324                          	JSR caml_alloc
   325                          	;; copy float
   326                          	+caml_move_float ACCU, BLK
   327                          	;; return float
   328                          	LDA BLK
   329                          	STA ACCU
   330                          	LDA BLK + 1
   331                          	STA ACCU + 1
   332                          	RTS
   333                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "index out of bounds"
   334                          }
   335                          
   336                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_unsafe_get {
   337                          caml_array_unsafe_get
   338                           	;; return an array element (unsafe version)
   339                          	;; ACCU = array
   340                          	;; SP[0] = index
   341                          	LDY # -2
   342                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   343                          	LDA (ACCU),Y                            ; load tag
   344                          	INC ACCU + 1                            ; restore ptr
   345                          	LDY # 0
   346                          	CMP # Double_array_tag                  ; check if float
   347                          	BEQ caml_array_unsafe_get_float         ; yes: special case
   348                          	LDA (SP),Y			        ; Val_int(index), lo
   349                          	STA TMP
   350                          	INY
   351                          	LDA (SP),Y			        ; Val_int(index), hi
   352                          	BEQ +
   353                          	INC ACCU + 1
   354                          +	LDY TMP
   355                          	;; get array element
   356                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			        ; array[index], hi
   357                          	TAX
   358                          	DEY
   359                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			        ; array[index], lo
   360                          	STA ACCU
   361                          	STX ACCU + 1
   362                          	LDY # 0
   363                          	RTS
   364                          }
   365                          
   366                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_unsafe_get_float {
   367                           	;; return an array element (unsafe, float-only version)
   368                          	;; ACCU = array
   369                          	;; SP[0] = index
   370                          caml_array_unsafe_get_float
   371                          	;; load index, lo (ignore hi byte)
   372                          	LDA (SP),Y			; 2*i+1
   373                          	;; calc 3 * i
   374                          	AND # $FE
   375                          	STA TMP
   376                          	LSR
   377                          	CLC
   378                          	ADC TMP
   379                          	;; ACCU <- &array[index]
   380                          	ASL
   381                          	BCC +
   382                          	INC ACCU + 1
   383                          	CLC
   384                          +	ADC ACCU
   385                          	STA ACCU
   386                          	BCC +
   387                          	INC ACCU + 1
   388                          	;; allocate float
   389                          +	LDA # Double_tag
   390                          	LDX # Double_wosize
   391                          	JSR caml_alloc
   392                          	;; copy float
   393                          	+caml_move_float ACCU, BLK
   394                          	;; return float
   395                          	LDA BLK
   396                          	STA ACCU
   397                          	LDA BLK + 1
   398                          	STA ACCU + 1
   399                          	RTS
   400                          }
   401                          
   402                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_set {
   403                          caml_array_set
   404                           	;; set an array element to given value
   405                          	;; ACCU = array
   406                          	;; SP[0] = index
   407                          	;; SP[1] = newval
   408                          
   409                          	;; load tag
   410                          	LDY # -2
   411                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   412                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   413                          	INY
   414                          	;; check if float
   415                          	CMP # Double_array_tag
   416                          	BNE caml_array_set_addr__loadsize
   417                          	JMP caml_array_set_float__loadsize
   418                          }
   419                          
   420                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_set_addr {
   421                           	;; set an array element to given value (no-float version)
   422                          	;; ACCU = array
   423                          	;; SP[0] = Val_int(index)
   424                          	;; SP[1] = newval
   425                          caml_array_set_addr
   426                          	;; load size
   427                          	DEY
   428                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   429                          caml_array_set_addr__loadsize
   430                          @SZ	= TMP
   431                          @NEW	= TMP + 1
   432                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   433                          	STA @SZ
   434                          	INC ACCU + 1
   435                          	;; load newval
   436                          	LDY # 3
   437                          	LDA (SP),Y
   438                          	STA @NEW + 1
   439                          	DEY
   440                          	LDA (SP),Y
   441                          	STA @NEW
   442                          	;; load index, hi
   443                          	DEY
   444                          	LDA (SP),Y
   445                          	;; exn if index > 255 or index < 0
   446                          	LSR
   447                          	BNE @error
   448                          	;; load index, lo
   449                          	DEY
   450                          	LDA (SP),Y
   451                          	ROR
   452                          	;; exn if index >= size
   453                          	CMP @SZ
   454                          	BCS @error
   455                          	;; array[index] <- newval
   456                          	ASL
   457                          	BCC +
   458                          	INC ACCU + 1
   459                          +	TAY
   460                          	LDA @NEW
   461                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   462                          	INY
   463                          	LDA @NEW + 1
   464                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   465                          	;; ACCU <- ()
   466                          	LDY # <Val_unit			;.Y := 1
   467                          	STY ACCU
   468                          	DEY
   469                          	STY ACCU + 1
   470                          	RTS
   471                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "index out of bounds"
   472                          }
   473                          
   474                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_set_float {
   475                           	;; set an array element to given value (float-only version)
   476                          	;; ACCU = array
   477                          	;; SP[0] = index
   478                          	;; SP[1] = newval
   479                          caml_array_set_float
   480                          	;; load size
   481                          	DEY
   482                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   483                          caml_array_set_float__loadsize
   484                          @SZ	= TMP
   485                          @IDX	= TMP + 1
   486                          @NEW 	= TMP + 2
   487                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   488                          	STA @SZ
   489                          	INC ACCU + 1
   490                          	;; load newval
   491                          	LDY # 3
   492                          	LDA (SP),Y
   493                          	STA @NEW + 1
   494                          	DEY
   495                          	LDA (SP),Y
   496                          	STA @NEW
   497                          	;; load index, hi
   498                          	DEY
   499                          	LDA (SP),Y
   500                          	;; exn if hi > 0
   501                          	BNE @error
   502                          	;; load index, lo
   503                          	DEY
   504                          	LDA (SP),Y
   505                          	;; exn if 3 * index >= size
   506                          	AND # $FE
   507                          	STA @IDX
   508                          	LSR
   509                          	CLC
   510                          	ADC @IDX
   511                          	BCS @error
   512                          	CMP @SZ
   513                          	BCS @error
   514                          	;; ACCU <- &array[index]
   515                          +	ASL
   516                          	BCC +
   517                          	INC ACCU + 1
   518                          	CLC
   519                          +	ADC ACCU
   520                          	STA ACCU
   521                          	BCC +
   522                          	INC ACCU + 1
   523                          	;; copy float
   524                          +	+caml_move_float @NEW, ACCU
   525                          	;; ACCU <- ()
   526                          	STY ACCU + 1
   527                          	INY
   528                          	STY ACCU
   529                          	DEY
   530                          	RTS
   531                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "index out of bounds"
   532                          }
   533                          
   534                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_unsafe_set {
   535                          caml_array_unsafe_set
   536                           	;; set an array element to given value (unsafe version)
   537                          	;; ACCU = array
   538                          	;; SP[0] = index
   539                          	;; SP[1] = newval
   540                          
   541                          	;; load tag
   542                          	LDY # -2
   543                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   544                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   545                          	INC ACCU + 1
   546                          	LDY # 0
   547                          	;; check if float
   548                          	CMP # Double_array_tag
   549                          	BEQ caml_array_unsafe_set_float
   550                          	;; FALLTHROUGH caml_array_unsafe_set_addr
   551                          }
   552                          
   553                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_unsafe_set_addr {
   554                           	;; set an array element to given value (unsafe, no-float version)
   555                          	;; ACCU = array
   556                          	;; SP[0] = index
   557                          	;; SP[1] = newval
   558                          caml_array_unsafe_set_addr
   559                          	;; load index
   560                          	LDA (SP),Y			; Val_int(index), lo
   561                          	STA TMP
   562                          	INY
   563                          	LDA (SP),Y			; Val_int(index), hi
   564                          	BEQ +
   565                          	INC ACCU + 1
   566                          	;; load newval
   567                          +	INY
   568                          	LDA (SP),Y
   569                          	TAX
   570                          	INY
   571                          	LDA (SP),Y
   572                          	;; array[index] <- newval
   573                          	LDY TMP
   574                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   575                          	DEY
   576                          	TXA
   577                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   578                          	;; ACCU <- ()
   579                          	LDY # <Val_unit			;.Y := 1
   580                          	STY ACCU
   581                          	DEY
   582                          	STY ACCU + 1
   583                          	RTS
   584                          }
   585                          
   586                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_unsafe_set_float {
   587                           	;; set an array element to given value (unsafe, float-only version)
   588                          	;; ACCU = array
   589                          	;; SP[0] = index
   590                          	;; SP[1] = newval
   591                          caml_array_unsafe_set_float
   592                          	;; load index, lo (ignore hi byte)
   593                          	LDA (SP),Y			; 2*i+1
   594                          	;; calc 3 * i
   595                          	AND # $FE
   596                          	STA TMP
   597                          	LSR
   598                          	CLC
   599                          	ADC TMP
   600                          	;; ACCU <- &array[index]
   601                          	ASL
   602                          	BCC +
   603                          	INC ACCU + 1
   604                          	CLC
   605                          +	ADC ACCU
   606                          	STA ACCU
   607                          	BCC +
   608                          	INC ACCU + 1
   609                          	;; load newval
   610                          +	LDY # 2
   611                          	LDA (SP),Y
   612                          	STA TMP
   613                          	INY
   614                          	LDA (SP),Y
   615                          	STA TMP + 1
   616                          	;; copy float
   617                          	+caml_move_float TMP, ACCU
   618                          	;; ACCU <- ()
   619                          	LDA # <Val_unit
   620                          	STA ACCU
   621                          	STY ACCU + 1			; Y = 0
   622                          	RTS
   623                          }
   624                          
   625                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_blit {
   626                          caml_array_blit
   627                           	;; copy a subarray to other one (source and dest may overlap)
   628                          	;; ACCU = arr1
   629                          	;; SP[0] = ofs1
   630                          	;; SP[1] = arr2
   631                          	;; SP[2] = ofs2
   632                          	;; SP[3] = n
   633                          @NBY 	= TMP + 2
   634                          	;; load tag
   635                          	LDY # -2
   636                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   637                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   638                          	INC ACCU + 1
   639                          	;; check if float
   640                          	CMP # Double_array_tag
   641                          	BNE @no_float
   642                          	;; array of floats, compute source start address
   643                          	LDY # 0
   644                          	STY @NBY + 1
   645                          	LDA (SP),Y			; ofs1, ignore hi byte
   646                          	AND # $FE
   647                          	STA TMP
   648                          	LSR
   649                          	CLC
   650                          	ADC TMP
   651                          	;; ACCU <- &arr1[ofs1]
   652                          	ASL				; A = 6 * ofs1
   653                          	BCC +
   654                          	INC ACCU + 1
   655                          	CLC
   656                          +	ADC ACCU
   657                          	STA ACCU
   658                          	BCC +
   659                          	INC ACCU + 1
   660                          	;; compute destination start address
   661                          +	LDY # 4
   662                          	LDA (SP),Y			; ofs2, ignore hi byte
   663                          	;; calc 3 * index
   664                          	AND # $FE
   665                          	STA TMP
   666                          	LSR
   667                          	CLC
   668                          	ADC TMP
   669                          	;; TMP <- &arr2[ofs2]
   670                          	TAX				; X = 3 * ofs2
   671                          	DEY
   672                          	LDA (SP),Y
   673                          	STA TMP + 1
   674                          	TXA
   675                          	ASL				; A = 6 * ofs2
   676                          	BCC +
   677                          	INC TMP + 1
   678                          	CLC
   679                          +	DEY
   680                          	ADC (SP),Y
   681                          	STA TMP
   682                          	BCC +
   683                          	INC TMP + 1
   684                          	;; @NBY = 6 * n (no. of bytes to be moved)
   685                          +	LDY # 6
   686                          	LDA (SP),Y			; ignore hi byte
   687                          	AND # $FE
   688                          	STA @NBY
   689                          	LSR
   690                          	CLC
   691                          	ADC @NBY
   692                          	STA @NBY
   693                          	BCC +
   694                          	INC @NBY + 1
   695                          +	JMP @copy
   696                          @no_float
   697                          	;; ordinary array, compute source start address
   698                          	LDY # 0
   699                          	CLC
   700                          	LDA (SP),Y
   701                          	ADC ACCU
   702                          	STA ACCU
   703                          	INY
   704                          	LDA (SP),Y
   705                          	ADC ACCU + 1
   706                          	STA ACCU + 1
   707                          	LDA ACCU
   708                          	BNE +
   709                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   710                          +	DEC ACCU
   711                          	;; compute destination start address
   712                          	INY
   713                          	LDA (SP),Y
   714                          	STA TMP
   715                          	INY
   716                          	LDA (SP),Y
   717                          	STA TMP + 1
   718                          	INY
   719                          	CLC
   720                          	LDA TMP
   721                          	ADC (SP),Y
   722                          	STA TMP
   723                          	INY
   724                          	LDA TMP + 1
   725                          	ADC (SP),Y
   726                          	STA TMP + 1
   727                          	LDA TMP
   728                          	BNE +
   729                          	DEC TMP + 1
   730                          +	DEC TMP
   731                          	;; compute no. of bytes to be copied
   732                          	INY
   733                          	LDA @NBY
   734                          	ADC (SP),Y
   735                          	STA @NBY
   736                          	INY
   737                          	LDA @NBY + 1
   738                          	ADC (SP),Y
   739                          	STA @NBY + 1
   740                          	LDA @NBY
   741                          	BNE +
   742                          	DEC @NBY + 1
   743                          +	DEC @NBY
   744                          	;; copy bytes from source to destination
   745                          @copy	LDA ACCU
   746                          	CMP TMP
   747                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   748                          	SBC TMP + 1
   749                          	BCS @cpydn
   750                          	;; ACCU < TMP, copy memory up (arr1[0] last)
   751                          	LSR @NBY + 1
   752                          	LDY @NBY
   753                          	JSR caml_blkcpy
   754                          	;; ACCU <- ()
   755                          @done	STY ACCU + 1			; Y = 0
   756                          	LDA # <Val_unit
   757                          	STA ACCU
   758                          	RTS
   759                          	;; ACCU >= TMP, copy memory down (arr1[0] first)
   760                          @cpydn	LDX @NBY + 1			; 0 or 1
   761                          	BEQ +
   762                          	LDY # 0
   763                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y			; >255 bytes: copy a whole page
   764                          	STA (TMP),Y
   765                          	INY
   766                          	BNE -
   767                          	INC ACCU + 1
   768                          	INC TMP + 1
   769                          +	LDX @NBY
   770                          	BEQ +
   771                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y			; copy the remaining bytes
   772                          	STA (TMP),Y
   773                          	INY
   774                          	DEX
   775                          	BNE -
   776                          +	LDY # 0
   777                          	JMP @done
   778                          }
   779                          
   780                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_sub {
   781                          caml_array_sub
   782                          	;; allocate and return a subarray
   783                          	;; ACCU = a
   784                          	;; SP[0] = ofs
   785                          	;; SP[1] = n
   786                          @NBY 	= TMP
   787                          	;; load tag
   788                          	LDY # -2
   789                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   790                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   791                          	INC ACCU + 1
   792                          	;; check if float
   793                          	CMP # Double_array_tag
   794                          	BNE @no_floats
   795                          	;; array of floats, compute source start address
   796                          	LDY # 0				; ignore hi byte
   797                          	STY @NBY + 1
   798                          	LDA (SP),Y
   799                          	AND # $FE
   800                          	STA TMP
   801                          	LSR
   802                          	CLC
   803                          	ADC TMP
   804                          	;; ACCU <- &arr1[ofs1]
   805                          	ASL				; A = 6 * ofs1
   806                          	BCC +
   807                          	INC ACCU + 1
   808                          	CLC
   809                          +	ADC ACCU
   810                          	STA ACCU
   811                          	BCC +
   812                          	INC ACCU + 1
   813                          	;; @NBY = 6 * n (no. of bytes to be moved)
   814                          +	LDY # 2
   815                          	LDA (SP),Y			; ignore hi byte
   816                          	AND # $FE
   817                          	STA @NBY
   818                          	LSR
   819                          	CLC
   820                          	ADC @NBY
   821                          	STA @NBY
   822                          	BCC +
   823                          	INC @NBY + 1
   824                          	;; allocate subarray
   825                          +	LDA @NBY + 1
   826                          	LSR
   827                          	LDA @NBY
   828                          	ROR
   829                          	TAX
   830                          	LDA # Double_array_tag
   831                          	JSR caml_alloc
   832                          	JMP @copy
   833                          @no_floats
   834                          	;; ordinary array, compute source start address
   835                          	LDY # 0
   836                          	CLC
   837                          	LDA ACCU
   838                          	ADC (SP),Y
   839                          	STA ACCU
   840                          	INY
   841                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   842                          	ADC (SP),Y
   843                          	STA ACCU + 1
   844                          	LDA ACCU
   845                          	BNE +
   846                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   847                          +	DEC ACCU
   848                          	;; compute no. of bytes to be copied
   849                          	INY
   850                          	LDA (SP),Y
   851                          	STA @NBY
   852                          	INY
   853                          	LDA (SP),Y
   854                          	STA @NBY + 1
   855                          	LDA @NBY
   856                          	BNE +
   857                          	DEC @NBY + 1
   858                          +	DEC @NBY
   859                          	;; allocate subarray
   860                          	LDA @NBY + 1
   861                          	LSR
   862                          	LDA @NBY
   863                          	ROR
   864                          	TAX
   865                          	LDA # 0
   866                          	JSR caml_alloc
   867                          	;; copy bytes from source to destination
   868                          @copy	LSR @NBY + 1
   869                          	LDY @NBY
   870                          	JSR caml_blkcpy
   871                          	;; ACCU <- subarray
   872                          @done	LDA BLK
   873                          	STA ACCU
   874                          	LDA BLK + 1
   875                          	STA ACCU + 1
   876                          	RTS
   877                          }
   878                          
   879                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_append {
   880                          caml_array_append
   881                          	;; append two arrays
   882                          	;; ACCU = arr1
   883                          	;; SP[0] = arr2
   884                          @AUX 	= TMP
   885                          @SIZE1 	= TMP + 2
   886                          @SIZE2 	= TMP + 4
   887                          	;; load sizes
   888                          	LDA (SP),Y
   889                          	STA @AUX
   890                          	INY
   891                          	LDA (SP),Y
   892                          	STA @AUX + 1
   893                          	LDY # -1
   894                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   895                          	DEC @AUX + 1
   896                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   897                          	STA @SIZE1
   898                          	LDA (@AUX),Y
   899                          	STA @SIZE2
   900                          	CLC
   901                          	ADC @SIZE1
   902                          	BCC +
   903                          	;; exception if total size > 255
   904                          	INY				; Y = 0
   905                          	JMP @error
   906                          	;; load tag and allocate
   907                          +	DEY
   908                          	TAX				; size
   909                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			; tag
   910                          	JSR caml_alloc
   911                          	;; copy arr1 to dest
   912                          	INC ACCU + 1
   913                          	LDA @SIZE1
   914                          	ASL
   915                          	TAY
   916                          	JSR caml_blkcpy
   917                          	;; ACCU <- arr2
   918                          	LDA @AUX
   919                          	STA ACCU
   920                          	LDA @AUX + 1
   921                          	STA ACCU + 1
   922                          	;; save ptr to result
   923                          	LDA BLK
   924                          	STA @AUX
   925                          	LDA BLK + 1
   926                          	STA @AUX + 1
   927                          	;; TMP <- &TMP[SIZE1]
   928                          +	LDA @SIZE1
   929                          	ASL
   930                          	BCC +
   931                          	INC BLK + 1
   932                          	CLC
   933                          +	ADC BLK
   934                          	STA BLK
   935                          	BCC +
   936                          	INC BLK + 1
   937                          	;; copy arr2 to dest
   938                          +	LDA @SIZE2
   939                          	ASL
   940                          	TAY
   941                          	JSR caml_blkcpy
   942                          	;; ACCU <- AUX
   943                          	LDA @AUX
   944                          	STA ACCU
   945                          	LDA @AUX + 1
   946                          	STA ACCU + 1
   947                          	RTS
   948                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Array.append"
   949                          }
   950                          
   951                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_array_concat {
   952                          caml_array_concat
   953                          	;; concatenate all arrays in a list
   954                          	;; ACCU = list
   955                          @TAG 	= TMP
   956                          @SIZE 	= TMP + 1
   957                          @HEAD 	= TMP + 2
   958                          @TAIL 	= TMP + 4
   959                          @RESULT	= TMP + 2
   960                          	DEY
   961                          	STY @TAG			; @TAG = -1
   962                          	INY
   963                          	STY @SIZE
   964                          	;; return caml_atom0 if list = []
   965                          	LDA ACCU
   966                          	BIT caml_is_block
   967                          	BNE @atom0
   968                          	;; scan list and sum all arrays sizes
   969                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   970                          	STA @HEAD
   971                          	INY
   972                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   973                          	STA @HEAD + 1
   974                          	INY
   975                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   976                          	STA @TAIL
   977                          	INY
   978                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   979                          	STA @TAIL + 1
   980                          	;; get current array size and add it to @SIZE
   981                          -	LDY # -1
   982                          	DEC @HEAD + 1
   983                          	LDA (@HEAD),Y
   984                          	BEQ +
   985                          	CLC
   986                          	ADC @SIZE
   987                          	BCS @error			; raise exn if > 255
   988                          	STA @SIZE
   989                          	;; only once: set @TAG from first non-empty array
   990                          	CPY @TAG			; test if @TAG = -1
   991                          	BNE +
   992                          	DEY
   993                          	LDA (@HEAD),Y
   994                          	STA @TAG
   995                          	INY
   996                          	;; set @HEAD to next list element, @TAIL to rest
   997                          +	INY
   998                          	LDA @TAIL
   999                          	BIT caml_is_block			; end of list?
  1000                          	BEQ @alloc			; yes:	exit loop
  1001                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y			; no:	continue
  1002                          	STA @HEAD
  1003                          	INY
  1004                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y
  1005                          	STA @HEAD + 1
  1006                          	INY
  1007                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y
  1008                          	TAX
  1009                          	INY
  1010                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y
  1011                          	STX @TAIL
  1012                          	STA @TAIL + 1
  1013                          	JMP -
  1014                          	;; allocate destination array
  1015                          @alloc	LDX @SIZE
  1016                          	BEQ @atom0
  1017                          	LDA @TAG
  1018                          	JSR caml_alloc
  1019                          	LDA BLK
  1020                          	STA @RESULT
  1021                          	LDA BLK + 1
  1022                          	STA @RESULT + 1			; save dest address
  1023                          	;; scan list again and append all arrays
  1024                          	LDY # 3
  1025                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1026                          	STA @TAIL + 1
  1027                          	DEY
  1028                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1029                          	STA @TAIL
  1030                          	DEY
  1031                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1032                          	TAX
  1033                          	DEY
  1034                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1035                          	STX ACCU + 1
  1036                          	STA ACCU
  1037                          	;; get current array size
  1038                          -	LDY # -1
  1039                          	DEC ACCU + 1
  1040                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1041                          	BEQ ++				; skip if zero
  1042                          	INC ACCU + 1
  1043                          	TAX
  1044                          	ASL
  1045                          	TAY
  1046                          	;; copy array elements to destination
  1047                          	JSR caml_blkcpy
  1048                          	TXA
  1049                          	;; set BLK pointer to first element to be copied next
  1050                          	ASL
  1051                          	BCC +
  1052                          	CLC
  1053                          	INC BLK + 1
  1054                          +	ADC BLK
  1055                          	STA BLK
  1056                          	BCC ++
  1057                          	INC BLK + 1
  1058                          	;; set ACCU to next list element, @TAIL to rest
  1059                          ++	LDY # 0
  1060                          	LDA @TAIL
  1061                          	BIT caml_is_block		; end of list?
  1062                          	BEQ @eol			; yes:	exit
  1063                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y			; no:	continue
  1064                          	STA ACCU
  1065                          	INY
  1066                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y
  1067                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1068                          	INY
  1069                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y
  1070                          	TAX
  1071                          	INY
  1072                          	LDA (@TAIL),Y
  1073                          	STX @TAIL
  1074                          	STA @TAIL + 1
  1075                          	JMP -				; loop
  1076                          	;; set ACCU = destination array and return
  1077                          @eol	LDA @RESULT
  1078                          	STA ACCU
  1079                          	LDA @RESULT + 1
  1080                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1081                          	RTS
  1082                          @atom0	LDA # < caml_atom0
  1083                          	STA ACCU
  1084                          	LDA # > caml_atom0
  1085                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1086                          	RTS
  1087                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Array.concat"
  1088                          }
  1089                          
  1090                          }      ;; !zone caml_ARRAYS
  1091                          

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib.asm
     5                           !source "/home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_aux_tools.asm"

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_aux_tools.asm
     1                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
     2                          ;; Progetto BreadCaml / The BreadCaml Project
     3                          ;; Copyright (C) 21-Apr-2026 Piero Furiesi
     4                          ;;
     5                          ;; Questo  programma è  software libero;  è possibile  ridistribuirlo e/o
     6                          ;; modificarlo secondo i  termini della GNU General  Public License (GPL)
     7                          ;; versione  2,  come specificato  nel  file  LICENZA-it nella  directory
     8                          ;; principale del progetto.
     9                          ;;
    10                          ;; This program is  free software; you can redistribute  it and/or modify
    11                          ;; it under the terms of the  GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2,
    12                          ;; as specified in the LICENSE-en file in the project root.
    13                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
    14                          
    15                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    16                          ;;; 	AUXILIARY TOOLS
    17                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    18
