    19                          !zone AUX_TOOLS {
    20                          	
    21                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_memcpy {
    22                          	;; copy memory
    23                          	;; TMP, TMP + 1 =  source start address
    24                          	;; TMP + 2, TMP + 3 = destination start address
    25                          	;; TMP + 4, TMP + 5 = number of bytes to move
    26                          	;; used registers: A, X, Y; return Y = 0.
    27                          caml_memcpy
    28                          	@FROM = TMP 			;source address
    29                          	@TO = TMP + 2			;destination address
    30                          	@NUM = TMP + 4			;num bytes
    31  216c a546               	LDA @FROM + 1
    32  216e c548               	CMP @TO + 1
    33  2170 902e               	BCC @caml_memcpy_up
    34  2172 d009               	BNE @caml_memcpy_dn
    35  2174 a545               	LDA @FROM
    36  2176 c547               	CMP @TO
    37  2178 9026               	BCC @caml_memcpy_up
    38  217a d001               	BNE @caml_memcpy_dn
    39  217c 60                 	RTS
    40                          	;; copy memory from a higher address to a lower one
    41                          @caml_memcpy_dn
    42  217d a000               	LDY # 0
    43  217f a64a               	LDX @NUM + 1
    44  2181 f00e               	BEQ +
    45  2183 b145               -	LDA (@FROM),Y 			;move a page at a time
    46  2185 9147               	STA (@TO),Y
    47  2187 c8                 	INY
    48  2188 d0f9               	BNE -
    49  218a e646               	INC @FROM + 1
    50  218c e648               	INC @TO + 1
    51  218e ca                 	DEX
    52  218f d0f2               	BNE -
    53  2191 a649               +	LDX @NUM
    54  2193 f008               	BEQ +
    55  2195 b145               -	LDA (@FROM),Y 			;move the remaining bytes
    56  2197 9147               	STA (@TO),Y
    57  2199 c8                 	INY
    58  219a ca                 	DEX
    59  219b d0f8               	BNE -
    60  219d a000               +	LDY # 0
    61  219f 60                 	RTS
    62                          	;; copy memory from a lower address to a higher one
    63                          @caml_memcpy_up
    64  21a0 a64a               	LDX @NUM + 1  			;the last byte must be moved first
    65  21a2 18                 	CLC          			;start at the final pages of from & to
    66  21a3 8a                 	TXA
    67  21a4 6546               	ADC @FROM + 1
    68  21a6 8546               	STA @FROM + 1
    69  21a8 18                 	CLC
    70  21a9 8a                 	TXA
    71  21aa 6548               	ADC @TO + 1
    72  21ac 8548               	STA @TO + 1
    73  21ae e8                 	INX          			;allows use of bne after dex below
    74  21af a449               	LDY @NUM
    75  21b1 f00e               	BEQ ++
    76  21b3 88                 	DEY          			;move bytes on the last page first
    77  21b4 f007               	BEQ +
    78  21b6 b145               -	LDA (@FROM),Y
    79  21b8 9147               	STA (@TO),Y
    80  21ba 88                 	DEY
    81  21bb d0f9               	BNE -
    82  21bd b145               +	LDA (@FROM),Y 			;handle y = 0 separately
    83  21bf 9147               	STA (@TO),Y
    84  21c1 88                 ++	DEY
    85  21c2 c646               	DEC @FROM + 1	  		;move the next page (if any)
    86  21c4 c648               	DEC @TO + 1
    87  21c6 ca                 	DEX
    88  21c7 d0ed               	BNE -
    89  21c9 a000               	LDY # 0
    90  21cb 60                 	RTS
    91                          }
    92                          
    93                          !ifdef	caml_AUX__caml_blkcpy {
    94                          	;; caml_blkcpy
    95                          	;; Aux. routine to copy all fields from ACCU to BLK; C:Y = 2 * size.
    96                          	;; The block's header is not copied!
    97                          caml_blkcpy
    98                          	BCC +				; less than 256 bytes (<128 fields)
    99                          	BEQ ++				; exactly 256 bytes   (=128 fields)
   100                          	INC ACCU + 1			; more than 256 bytes (>128 fields)
   101                          	INC BLK + 1
   102                          --
   103                          +	DEY
   104                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y
   105                          	STA (BLK),Y
   106                          	DEY
   107                          	BNE -
   108                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			; handle Y = 0 apart
   109                          	STA (BLK),Y
   110                          	BCC +
   111                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   112                          	DEC BLK + 1
   113                          ++	CLC
   114                          	BCC --
   115                          +	RTS
   116                          }
   117                          
   118                          }	;; !zone AUX_TOOLS
   119                          

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib.asm
     6                           !source "/home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_compare.asm"

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_compare.asm
     1                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
     2                          ;; Progetto BreadCaml / The BreadCaml Project
     3                          ;; Copyright (C) 21-Apr-2026 Piero Furiesi
     4                          ;;
     5                          ;; Questo  programma è  software libero;  è possibile  ridistribuirlo e/o
     6                          ;; modificarlo secondo i  termini della GNU General  Public License (GPL)
     7                          ;; versione  2,  come specificato  nel  file  LICENZA-it nella  directory
     8                          ;; principale del progetto.
     9                          ;;
    10                          ;; This program is  free software; you can redistribute  it and/or modify
    11                          ;; it under the terms of the  GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2,
    12                          ;; as specified in the LICENSE-en file in the project root.
    13                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
    14                          
    15                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    16                          ;;; COMPARISONS
    17                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    18                          
    19                          !zone caml_COMPARISONS {
    20                          
    21                          !ifndef caml_compare_warn {
    22                          caml_compare_warn
    23                            !warn "\nbreadcaml> TODO: caml_compare_val_custom_tag"
    24                            !warn "\nbreadcaml> TODO: caml_compare_val_double_array_tag"
    25                            !warn "\nbreadcaml> TODO: caml_compare_val_object_tag"
    26                          }
    27                          
    28                          .dummy = $1234					;dummy address for SMC
    29                          	
    30                          !macro	beq .adr { BNE + : JMP .adr :+ }	;Long branch if equal
    31                          !macro	bne .adr { BEQ + : JMP .adr :+ }	;Long branch if not equal
    32                          
    33                          .V1	= ACCU					;word, 1st argument
    34                          .V2	= TMP					;word, 2nd argument
    35                          .SAVESP	= TMP + 2 				;word, SP backup
    36                          .CMP	= TMP + 4				;byte, result/temp
    37                          .COMPARE= TMP + 5				;byte, total ordering flag
    38                          .FLTMP	= TMP + 6				;5 bytes, float temp area
    39                          	;; TMP + 11 ...				;free
    40                          
    41                          	;;
    42                          	;; int
    43                          	;;
    44                          
    45                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_int_compare {
    46                          caml_int_compare
    47                                  LDA ACCU + 1				;Compare hi bytes by subtraction
    48                          	INY
    49                                  SEC
    50                                  SBC (SP),Y
    51                          	BEQ ++					;if A = arg0h-arg1h <> 0 then
    52                                  BVC +					;  A_7 <- N xor V
    53                                  EOR #$80				;  (A_7=1 <==> arg0 < arg1)
    54                          +	STA ACCU + 1				;  store it in ACCUh
    55                           	DEY
    56                           	RTS					;  exit (ACCUl unchanged);	
    57                          ++	DEY					;else
    58                          	LDA (SP),Y				;  compare lo bytes
    59                          	CMP ACCU				;  (C=1 <==> arg0 <= arg1)
    60                          	BEQ caml_return_zero			;  if equal, return Val_zero;
    61                          	ROR ACCU + 1				;  else rotate C -> ACCUh_7
    62                          	RTS					;  and exit (ACCUl unchanged);
    63                          }
    64                          
    65                          	;;
    66                          	;; floats
    67                          	;;
    68                          
    69                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_eq_float {
    70                          caml_eq_float
    71                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
    72                          	BEQ caml_return_true
    73                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
    74                          	BEQ caml_return_true
    75                          	BNE caml_return_false
    76                          }
    77                          
    78                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_neq_float {
    79                          caml_neq_float
    80                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
    81                          	BEQ caml_return_false
    82                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
    83                          	BEQ caml_return_false
    84                          	BNE caml_return_true
    85                          }
    86                          
    87                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_le_float {
    88                          caml_le_float
    89                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
    90                          	BEQ caml_return_true
    91                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
    92                          	BMI caml_return_true
    93                          	BPL caml_return_false
    94                          }
    95                          
    96                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_lt_float {
    97                          caml_lt_float
    98                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
    99                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   100                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
   101                          	BMI caml_return_true
   102                          	BPL caml_return_false
   103                          }
   104                          
   105                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_ge_float {
   106                          caml_ge_float
   107                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   108                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   109                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
   110                          	BMI caml_return_false
   111                          	BPL caml_return_true
   112                          }
   113                          
   114                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_gt_float {
   115                          caml_gt_float
   116                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   117                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   118                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
   119                          	BMI caml_return_false
   120                          	BPL caml_return_true
   121                          }
   122                          
   123                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_float_compare {
   124                          caml_float_compare
   125                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   126                          	BEQ caml_return_zero
   127                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
   128                          	JMP caml_compare_set_result
   129                          }
   130                          
   131                          	;;
   132                          	;; bytes/string
   133                          	;;
   134                          
   135                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_equal {
   136                          caml_bytes_equal
   137                          caml_string_equal
   138                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   139                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   140                          	JSR caml_string_eq_neq
   141                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   142                          	BNE caml_return_false
   143                          }
   144                          
   145                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_notequal {
   146                          caml_bytes_notequal
   147                          caml_string_notequal
   148                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   149                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   150                          	JSR caml_string_eq_neq
   151                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   152                          	BNE caml_return_true
   153                          }
   154                          
   155                          ;;; --------------------------------------	;Auxiliary routines for saving
   156                          !ifdef	caml_AUX__caml_return_true {		;the comparison result in ACCU.
   157                          caml_return_true				;Placed here due to the branch
   158                          	STY ACCU + 1				;instruction offset limitations.
   159                          	LDA # <Val_true
   160                          	STA ACCU
   161                          	RTS
   162                          }
   163                          !ifdef	caml_AUX__caml_return_false_zero {
   164                          caml_return_false
   165                          caml_return_zero
   166                          	STY ACCU + 1
   167                          	LDA # <Val_false			;Val_false = Val_zero
   168                          	STA ACCU
   169                          	RTS
   170                          }
   171                          ;;; --------------------------------------
   172                          
   173                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_lessthan {
   174                          caml_bytes_lessthan
   175                          caml_string_lessthan
   176                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   177                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   178                          	JSR caml_compare_val_string_tag
   179                          	BMI caml_return_true
   180                          	BPL caml_return_false
   181                          }
   182                          
   183                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_greaterequal {
   184                          caml_bytes_greaterequal
   185                          caml_string_greaterequal
   186                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   187                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   188                          	JSR caml_compare_val_string_tag
   189                          	BMI caml_return_false
   190                          	BPL caml_return_true
   191                          }
   192                          
   193                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_lessequal {
   194                          caml_bytes_lessequal
   195                          caml_string_lessequal
   196                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   197                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   198                          	JSR caml_compare_val_string_tag
   199                          	BMI caml_return_true
   200                          	BPL caml_return_false
   201                          }
   202                          
   203                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_greaterthan {
   204                          caml_bytes_greaterthan
   205                          caml_string_greaterthan
   206                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   207                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   208                          	JSR caml_compare_val_string_tag
   209                          	BMI caml_return_false
   210                          	BPL caml_return_true
   211                          }
   212                          
   213                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_string_compare {
   214                          caml_bytes_compare
   215                          caml_string_compare
   216                          	JSR caml_compare_identity_setV2
   217                          	BEQ caml_return_zero
   218                          	JSR caml_compare_val_string_tag
   219                          	JMP caml_compare_set_result
   220                          }
   221                          
   222                          	;;
   223                          	;; polymorphic comparisons
   224                          	;;
   225                          
   226                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_equal {
   227                          caml_equal
   228                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   229                          	BNE caml_return_false
   230                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   231                          }
   232                          
   233                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_notequal {
   234                          caml_notequal
   235                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   236                          	BNE caml_return_true
   237                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   238                          }
   239                          
   240                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_lessthan {
   241                          caml_lessthan
   242                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   243                          	BPL caml_return_false
   244                          	BMI caml_return_true
   245                          }
   246                          
   247                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_greaterequal {
   248                          caml_greaterequal
   249                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   250                          	BPL caml_return_true
   251                          	BMI caml_return_false
   252                          }
   253                          
   254                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_lessequal {
   255                          caml_lessequal
   256                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   257                          	BMI caml_return_true
   258                          	BNE caml_return_false
   259                          	BEQ caml_return_true
   260                          }
   261                          
   262                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_greaterthan {
   263                          caml_greaterthan
   264                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   265                          	BMI caml_return_false
   266                          	BNE caml_return_true
   267                          	BEQ caml_return_false
   268                          }
   269                          
   270                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_compare {
   271                          caml_compare
   272                          	INY					;set .COMPARE=1
   273                          	JSR caml_compare_val
   274                          	;; FALLTHROUGH caml_compare_set_result
   275                          }
   276                          
   277                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_set_result {
   278                          caml_compare_set_result
   279                          	BPL +
   280                          	LDA # -1
   281                          	STA ACCU
   282                          	STA ACCU + 1
   283                          	RTS
   284                          +	SEC
   285                          	ROL
   286                          	STA ACCU
   287                          	STY ACCU + 1
   288                          	RTS
   289                          }
   290                          
   291                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_identity_setV2 {
   292                          caml_compare_identity_setV2
   293                          	;; check if ACCU == SP[0] (physical identity)
   294                          	;; yes: return Z = 1
   295                          	;; no:  return Z = 0, .V2 = SP[0]
   296                          	LDA (SP),Y
   297                          	TAX
   298                          	INY
   299                          	LDA (SP),Y
   300                          	DEY
   301                          	CPX .V1
   302                          	BNE +
   303                          	CMP .V1 + 1
   304                          	BNE +
   305                          	RTS
   306                          +	STX .V2
   307                          	STA .V2 + 1
   308                          	RTS
   309                          }
   310                          
   311                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_val {
   312                          caml_compare_val
   313                          	;; Compare values in ACCU and SP[0].
   314                          	;; PREREQUISITE: Y <> 0 if called by caml_compare, Y = 0 otherwise.
   315                          	;; Result: A </=/> 0 according to the OCaml semantics of compare.
   316                          	;; Status byte is set according to A.
   317                          	STY .COMPARE				;Y <> 0 iif called by caml_compare
   318                          	LDY # 0
   319                          	LDA SP
   320                          	STA .SAVESP
   321                          	LDA SP + 1
   322                          	STA .SAVESP + 1
   323                          	LDA (SP),Y
   324                          	STA .V2
   325                          	INY
   326                          	LDA (SP),Y
   327                          	STA .V2 + 1
   328                          .loop	LDY # 0
   329                          	STY .CMP
   330                          	LDA .V1 + 1
   331                          	LDX .V1
   332                          	CPX .V2
   333                          	BEQ .eq_tst
   334                          	SBC .V2 + 1
   335                          .neq	BVC +					;(signed) v1<v2 iif V xor N = 1
   336                          	ORA # $80
   337                          +	BMI +
   338                          	INC .CMP				;v1 > v2 => CMP := 1
   339                          	BNE .int_or_block			;bne=jmp
   340                          +	DEC .CMP				;v1 < v2 => CMP := -1
   341                          	BNE .int_or_block			;bne=jmp
   342                          .eq_tst	SBC .V2 + 1
   343                          	BNE .neq
   344                          	CMP .COMPARE				;v1==v2; called by caml_compare?
   345                          	BEQ .int_or_block			;no: go deep, maybe raise exn :(
   346                          	JMP .next_item				;yes: speed up, go to next_item
   347                          .int_or_block
   348                          	TXA
   349                          	BIT caml_is_block
   350                          	BEQ .v1_block
   351                          	LDA .V2
   352                          	BIT caml_is_block
   353                          	BEQ .v1_int_v2_block
   354                          	LDA .CMP
   355                          	JMP .return_or_next
   356                          .v1_int_v2_block
   357                          	LDY # -2
   358                          	DEC .V2 + 1
   359                          	LDA (.V2),Y				;A := Tag(v2)
   360                          	INC .V2 + 1
   361                          	CMP # Forward_tag			;check for special cases
   362                          	BEQ .v2_forward
   363                          	CMP # Custom_tag
   364                          	BEQ .v2_custom
   365                          	LDA # -1
   366                          	JMP .return				;int < block => RETURN LESS
   367                          .v2_forward
   368                          	LDY # 1
   369                          	LDA (.V2),Y				;v2 := Field(v2,0)
   370                          	TAX
   371                          	DEY
   372                          	LDA (.V2),Y
   373                          	STX .V2 + 1
   374                          	STA .V2
   375                          	JMP .loop				;continue
   376                          .v2_custom
   377                          	LDY # 1
   378                          	LDA (.V2),Y				;load jmptbl address
   379                          	STA .v2jsr + 2
   380                          	DEY
   381                          	LDA (.V2),Y
   382                          	STA .v2jsr + 1
   383                          .v2jsr	JSR .dummy				;call custom_compare, res. in A
   384                          	JMP .return_or_next
   385                          .v1_block
   386                          	LDA .V2
   387                          	BIT caml_is_block
   388                          	BEQ .v1_block_v2_block
   389                          	LDY # -2				;v1:block, v2:int
   390                          	DEC .V1 + 1
   391                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;A := Tag(v1)
   392                          	INC .V1 + 1
   393                          	CMP # Forward_tag			;check for special cases
   394                          	BEQ .v1_forward
   395                          	CMP # Custom_tag
   396                          	BEQ .v1_cust_tst
   397                          	LDA # 1
   398                          	JMP .return				;block > int => RETURN GREATER
   399                          .v1_forward
   400                          	LDY # 1
   401                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;v1 := Field(v1,0)
   402                          	TAX
   403                          	DEY
   404                          	LDA (.V1),Y
   405                          	STX .V1 + 1
   406                          	STA .V1
   407                          	JMP .loop				;continue
   408                          .v1_cust_tst
   409                          	LDY # 1
   410                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;load jmptbl address
   411                          	STA .v1jsr + 2
   412                          	DEY
   413                          	LDA (.V1),Y
   414                          	STA .v1jsr + 1
   415                          .v1jsr	JSR .dummy				;call custom_compare, res. in A
   416                          	JMP .return_or_next
   417                          .v1_block_v2_block
   418                          	LDY # -2
   419                          	DEC .V1 + 1
   420                          	DEC .V2 + 1
   421                          	LDA (.V2),Y
   422                          	TAX					;X := Tag_v2
   423                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;A := Tag_v1
   424                          	INC .V1 + 1
   425                          	INC .V2 + 1
   426                          	CMP # Forward_tag
   427                          	BEQ .v1_forward				;jump if Tag_v1=Forward_tag
   428                          	CPX # Forward_tag
   429                          	+beq .v2_forward			;jump if Tag_v2=Forward_tag
   430                          	STX .CMP
   431                          	SEC
   432                          	SBC .CMP
   433                          	BEQ .switch_on_tag    			;Tag_v1=Tag_v2 =>choose routine
   434                          	JMP .return				;Tag_v1!=Tag_v2=>RETURN
   435                          .switch_on_tag
   436                          	CPX # String_tag			;dichotomic switch
   437                          	BCC .t249
   438                          	BNE .t254
   439                          	JSR caml_compare_val_string_tag
   440                          	JMP .return_or_next
   441                          .t249	CPX # Infix_tag
   442                          	BCC .t247
   443                          	BNE +
   444                          -	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "compare: functional value"
   445                          +	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "compare: abstract value"
   446                          .t247	CPX # Closure_tag
   447                          	BCC .default
   448                          	BEQ -
   449                          	JSR caml_compare_val_object_tag
   450                          	JMP .return_or_next
   451                          .t254	CPX # Double_array_tag
   452                          	BCC .t253
   453                          	BNE .t255
   454                          	JSR caml_compare_val_double_array_tag
   455                          	JMP .return_or_next
   456                          .t253	JSR caml_compare_val_double_tag
   457                          	JMP .return_or_next
   458                          .t255	JSR caml_compare_val_custom_tag
   459                          	JMP .return_or_next
   460                          .default
   461                          	;; compare sizes first
   462                          	LDY # -1
   463                          	DEC .V1 + 1
   464                          	DEC .V2 + 1
   465                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;A := size(v1)
   466                          	TAX					;save it
   467                          	SEC
   468                          	SBC (.V2),Y				;A := size(v1) - size(v2)
   469                          	BNE .return				;A <> 0 ==> return(A)
   470                          	TXA					;reload size(v1)
   471                          	BEQ .next_item				;v1, v2 atoms ==> next_item
   472                          	INC .V1 + 1
   473                          	INC .V2 + 1
   474                          	DEX					;only one field?
   475                          	BEQ .field0				;yes:compare Fld(v1,0) Fld(v2,0)
   476                          	+caml_grow_stack 3			;no: save data on stack:
   477                          	LDY # 0
   478                          	CLC
   479                          	LDA .V1
   480                          	ADC # 2
   481                          	STA (SP),Y
   482                          	INY
   483                          	LDA .V1 + 1
   484                          	ADC # 0
   485                          	STA (SP),Y			 	;address of Field(v1,1) in SP[0]
   486                          	INY
   487                          	CLC
   488                          	LDA .V2
   489                          	ADC # 2
   490                          	STA (SP),Y
   491                          	INY
   492                          	LDA .V2 + 1
   493                          	ADC # 0
   494                          	STA (SP),Y				;address of Field(v2,1) in SP[1]
   495                          	INY
   496                          	DEX					;# of following fields in SP[2]
   497                          	TXA
   498                          	STA (SP),Y
   499                          .field0	LDY # 0
   500                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;get <Field(v1,0)
   501                          	TAX					;save it
   502                          	LDA (.V2),Y				;get <Field(v2,0)
   503                          	STA .CMP				;save it
   504                          	INY
   505                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;get >Field(v1,0)
   506                          	STA .V1 + 1				;.V1 + 1 :=  >Field(v1,0)
   507                          	LDA (.V2),Y				;get >Field(v2,0)
   508                          	STA .V2 + 1				;.V2 + 1  := >Field(v2,0)
   509                          	STX .V1					;.V1 := Field(v1,0)
   510                          	LDA .CMP
   511                          	STA .V2					;.V2 := Field(v2,0)
   512                          	JMP .loop				;continue comparison on v1, v2
   513                          .return_or_next
   514                          	ORA # 0					;set status byte according to A
   515                          	BEQ .next_item				;if A=0 then compare nexts
   516                          .return	LDX .SAVESP				;else
   517                          	STX SP					; restore SP
   518                          	LDX .SAVESP + 1
   519                          	STX SP + 1
   520                          	LDY # 0
   521                          	ORA # 0					; set status byte according to A
   522                          	RTS					; exit
   523                          .next_item
   524                          	LDA SP					;if SP = .SAVESP
   525                          	CMP .SAVESP
   526                          	BNE +
   527                          	LDA SP + 1
   528                          	CMP .SAVESP + 1
   529                          	BNE +
   530                          	LDA # 0					;then RETURN EQUAL
   531                          	BEQ .return				;BEQ=JMP
   532                          +	LDY # 0					;else get next item from stack:
   533                          	LDA (SP),Y				;V1 := SP[0] (lo byte)
   534                          	STA .V1
   535                          	CLC
   536                          	ADC # 2
   537                          	STA (SP),Y				;SP[0] := &next field (lo byte)
   538                          	INY
   539                          	LDA (SP),Y				;as above, hi byte
   540                          	STA .V1 + 1
   541                          	ADC # 0
   542                          	STA (SP),Y
   543                          	INY
   544                          	LDA (SP),Y				;V2 := SP[1] (lo byte)
   545                          	STA .V2
   546                          	CLC
   547                          	ADC # 2
   548                          	STA (SP),Y				;SP[1] := &next field (lo byte)
   549                          	INY
   550                          	LDA (SP),Y				;as above, hi byte
   551                          	STA .V2 + 1
   552                          	ADC # 0
   553                          	STA (SP),Y
   554                          	INY
   555                          	LDA (SP),Y				;get counter of remaining fields
   556                          	BEQ +					;if counter = 0, continue loop
   557                          	SEC
   558                          	SBC # 1					;else decrement the counter
   559                          	STA (SP),Y
   560                          	CLC
   561                          	LDA # 6
   562                          	ADC SP
   563                          	STA SP
   564                          	BCC +
   565                          	INC SP + 1				;and pop items from stack
   566                          +	LDY # 1					;get curr. Fld(v1,x), Fld(v2,x)
   567                          	LDA (.V1),Y
   568                          	TAX
   569                          	LDA (.V2),Y
   570                          	STA .CMP
   571                          	DEY
   572                          	LDA (.V1),Y
   573                          	STA .V1
   574                          	STX .V1 + 1
   575                          	LDA (.V2),Y
   576                          	STA .V2
   577                          	LDA .CMP
   578                          	STA .V2 + 1
   579                          	JMP .loop				;continue loop
   580                          }
   581                          
   582                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_val_double_tag {
   583                          caml_compare_val_double_tag
   584                          	;; Compare floats in ACCU and SP[0].
   585                          	;; Result: A </=/> 0 according to the OCaml semantics of compare.
   586                          	;; Status byte is set according to A.
   587                          	LDA .V1
   588                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   589                          	LDA .V1 + 1
   590                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   591                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   592                          	LDY .V2 + 1
   593                          	LDA .V2
   594                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FCOMP
   595                          	LDY # 0
   596                          	ORA # 0					;set status byte according to A
   597                          	RTS
   598                          }
   599                          
   600                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_val_string_tag {
   601                          caml_compare_val_string_tag
   602                          	;; Compare strings in ACCU and SP[0].
   603                          	;; Result: A </=/> 0 according to the OCaml semantics of compare.
   604                          	;; Status byte is set according to A.
   605                          	LDY # -1
   606                          	DEC .V1 + 1
   607                          	DEC .V2 + 1
   608                          	LDA (.V1),Y
   609                          	TAX
   610                          	SEC
   611                          	SBC (.V2),Y
   612                          	STA .CMP				;CMP = size(v1) - size(v2)
   613                          	BCC +
   614                          	LDA (.V2),Y
   615                          	TAX					;X := min(size(v1), size(v2))
   616                          +	INY					;Y := 0
   617                          --	INC .V1 + 1				;for Y := 0 to X - 1 {
   618                          	INC .V2 + 1				;  compare char by char:
   619                          -	DEX
   620                          	BEQ ++
   621                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;  1st byte
   622                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   623                          	BCC @lt
   624                          	BNE @gt
   625                          	INY
   626                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;  2nd byte
   627                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   628                          	BCC @lt
   629                          	BNE @gt
   630                          	INY
   631                          	BNE -
   632                          	BEQ --					;}
   633                          ++	LDA (.V1),Y				;last word, 1st char
   634                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   635                          	BCC @lt
   636                          	BNE @gt
   637                          						;(sub)strings are =, return CMP
   638                          	LDA .CMP				;CMP is size(v1)-size(v2),
   639                          	BNE +			      		;if CMP = 0, adjust result
   640                          	INY					;according to string paddings:
   641                          	CLC					;len_v1-len_v2=-pad_v1+pad_v2
   642                          	ADC (.V2),Y
   643                          	SEC
   644                          	SBC (.V1),Y
   645                          +	LDY # 0
   646                          	ORA # 0					;set status byte according to A
   647                          	RTS
   648                          @lt	LDY # 0
   649                          	LDA # -1
   650                          	RTS
   651                          @gt	LDY # 0
   652                          	LDA # 1
   653                          	RTS
   654                          }
   655                          
   656                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_val_custom_tag {
   657                          caml_compare_val_custom_tag
   658                          	;; Compare custom values in ACCU and SP[0].
   659                          	;; Result: A </=/> 0 according to the OCaml semantics of compare.
   660                          	;; Status byte is set according to A.
   661                          	+caml_raise Not_found
   662                          }
   663                          
   664                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_val_double_array_tag {
   665                          caml_compare_val_double_array_tag
   666                          	;; Compare floatarrays in ACCU and SP[0].
   667                          	;; Result: A </=/> 0 according to the OCaml semantics of compare.
   668                          	;; Status byte is set according to A.
   669                          	+caml_raise Not_found
   670                          }
   671                          
   672                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_compare_val_object_tag {
   673                          caml_compare_val_object_tag
   674                          	;; Compare objects in ACCU and SP[0].
   675                          	;; Result: A </=/> 0 according to the OCaml semantics of compare.
   676                          	;; Status byte is set according to A.
   677                          	+caml_raise Not_found
   678                          }
   679                          
   680                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_string_eq_neq {		;caml_compare_val_string_tag is
   681                          caml_string_eq_neq				; slower for equality tests
   682                          	LDY # -1
   683                          	DEC .V1 + 1
   684                          	DEC .V2 + 1
   685                          	LDA (.V1),Y
   686                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   687                          	BNE @neq
   688                          	TAX
   689                          	INY					;Y := 0
   690                          --	INC .V1 + 1				;loop:
   691                          	INC .V2 + 1				; compare strings chr by chr
   692                          -	DEX
   693                          	BEQ +
   694                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;1st byte
   695                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   696                          	BNE @neq
   697                          	INY
   698                          	LDA (.V1),Y				;2nd byte
   699                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   700                          	BNE @neq
   701                          	INY
   702                          	BEQ --
   703                          	BNE -
   704                          +	LDA (.V1),Y				;last word, 1st char
   705                          	CMP (.V2),Y
   706                          	BNE @neq
   707                          	LDY # 0
   708                          	TYA
   709                          	RTS
   710                          @neq	LDY # 0
   711                          	LDA # -1
   712                          	RTS
   713                          }
   714                          
   715                          }	;; !zone caml_COMPARISONS
   716                          

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib.asm
     7                           !source "/home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_dummy.asm"

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_dummy.asm

    14                          
    15                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    16                          :;; ALLOC DUMMY (ocaml-4.04.1/byterun/alloc.c)
    17                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    18                          
    19                          !zone caml_DUMMY {
    20                          
    21                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_alloc_dummy {
    22                          	;; allocate a dummy block for a recursive value (or function)
    23                          	;; ACCU = size, (SP[0] = function arity, ignored)
    24                          caml_alloc_dummy
    25                          caml_alloc_dummy_function
    26                          	LSR ACCU + 1
    27                          	LDA ACCU
    28                          	ROR
    29                          	BEQ +				; size = 0
    30                          	;; allocate block
    31                          	TAX
    32                          	TYA
    33                          	JSR caml_alloc
    34                          	LDA BLK
    35                          	STA ACCU
    36                          	LDA BLK + 1
    37                          	STA ACCU + 1
    38                          	RTS
    39                          	;; Atom(0)
    40                          +	LDA # < caml_atom0
    41                          	STA ACCU
    42                          	LDA # > caml_atom0
    43                          	STA ACCU + 1
    44                          	RTS
    45                          }
    46                          
    47                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_alloc_dummy_float {
    48                          	;; allocate a dummy block for a recursive array/record of floats
    49                          	;; ACCU = no. of floats
    50                          caml_alloc_dummy_float
    51                          	;; ignore ACCU + 1, as 0 <= no. of floats <= 85
    52                          	LDA ACCU
    53                          	LSR
    54                          	BEQ +				; Atom(0)
    55                          	;; X <- no. of floats * Double_wosize
    56                          	CLC
    57                          	ADC ACCU
    58                          	TAX
    59                          	DEX
    60                          	;; allocate block
    61                          	TYA				; A = Y = 0
    62                          	JSR caml_alloc
    63                          	LDA BLK
    64                          	STA ACCU
    65                          	LDA BLK + 1
    66                          	STA ACCU + 1
    67                          	RTS
    68                          	;; Atom(0)
    69                          +	LDA # < caml_atom0
    70                          	STA ACCU
    71                          	LDA # > caml_atom0
    72                          	STA ACCU + 1
    73                          	RTS
    74                          }
    75                          
    76                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_update_dummy {
    77                          	;; update a dummy block with given value
    78                          	;; ACCU = dummy, SP[0] = newval
    79                          caml_update_dummy
    80                          	;; load newval size
    81                          	LDA (SP),Y
    82                          	STA TMP
    83                          	INY
    84                          	LDA (SP),Y
    85                          	STA TMP + 1
    86                          	LDY # -1
    87                          	DEC TMP + 1
    88                          	LDA (TMP),y
    89                          	BNE +
    90                          	;; size = 0, update nothing
    91                          	INY				; Y = 0
    92                          	BEQ ++
    93                          	;; tag(dummy) <- tag(newval)
    94                          +	TAX				; save size
    95                          	DEY
    96                          	DEC ACCU + 1
    97                          	LDA (TMP),y
    98                          	STA (ACCU),y
    99                          	INC ACCU + 1
   100                          	INC TMP + 1
   101                          	;; copy newval fields into dummy ones
   102                          	TXA				; reload size
   103                          	ASL
   104                          	TAY				; Y = 2 * size, Carry = MSB
   105                          	JSR caml_blkcpy
   106                          	;; ACCU <- ()
   107                          ++	STY ACCU + 1			; Y = 0
   108                          	LDA # <Val_unit
   109                          	STA ACCU
   110                          	RTS
   111                          }
   112                          
   113                          }	;; !zone caml_DUMMY
   114                          

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib.asm
     8                           !source "/home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_floats.asm"

; ******** Source: /home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_floats.asm
     1                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
     2                          ;; Progetto BreadCaml / The BreadCaml Project
     3                          ;; Copyright (C) 21-Apr-2026 Piero Furiesi
     4                          ;;
     5                          ;; Questo  programma è  software libero;  è possibile  ridistribuirlo e/o
     6                          ;; modificarlo secondo i  termini della GNU General  Public License (GPL)
     7                          ;; versione  2,  come specificato  nel  file  LICENZA-it nella  directory
     8                          ;; principale del progetto.
     9                          ;;
    10                          ;; This program is  free software; you can redistribute  it and/or modify
    11                          ;; it under the terms of the  GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2,
    12                          ;; as specified in the LICENSE-en file in the project root.
    13                          ;; ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
    14                          
    15                          ;;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16                          ;;; FLOATS
    17                          ;;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18                          
    19                          ;;; ZEROPAGE LOCATIONS
    20                          ;;; used by the C64's BASIC ROM floating point routines:
    21                          ;;;
    22                          ;;; $12		used by tan and (in preparation for tan) by sin & cos routines
    23                          ;;; $22-$23	used to move variables into the accumulators and back to memory
    24                          ;;; $24-$25 	used during FP comparisons and when converting PETSCII into FP
    25                          ;;; $26-$2A	result of multiplication or division
    26                          ;;; $47		used by FOUT
    27                          ;;; $56		used in addition and subtraction, and also the exp function
    28                          ;;; $5C-$60	used by the PETSCII conversion routines
    29                          ;;; $61 	FAC1 exponent
    30                          ;;; $62-$65	FAC1 mantissa
    31                          ;;; $66 	FAC1 sign in bit 7
    32                          ;;; $67		used by trig, exp, log functions and PETSCII to FP conversion
    33                          ;;; $68		used during normalisation and FP to integer conversion
    34                          ;;; $69		FAC2 exponent
    35                          ;;; $6A-$6D 	FAC2 mantissa
    36                          ;;; $6E		FAC2 sign in bit 7
    37                          ;;; $6F		sign result of arithmetic operations, set when FAC2 is loaded
    38                          ;;; $70 	low order rounding byte for FAC1, cleared when FAC1 is loaded
    39                          ;;; $71-$72	used during series eval. and when converting PETSCII into FP
    40                          ;;; $73-$8A	CHRGET routine, used when converting a PETSCII string into FP
    41                          
    42                          !zone caml_FLOATS {
    43                          
    44                          .dummy	= $1234					;dummy operand for self-modifying
    45                          						;code (SMC in comments)
    46                          
    47                          !ifndef caml_float_zp_check {
    48                          caml_float_zp_check
    49                            !for .i in [[$12,$12],[$22,$2A],[$47,$47],[$56,$56],[$5C,$8A]] {
    50                              !if (caml_zp_start <= .i[1]) & (.i[0] < caml_zp_end) {
    51                                !warn "ZP storage overlaps FLPT workspace", .i
    52                              }
    53                            }
    54                          }
    55                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_nonstd_sign_float {
    56                          caml_nonstd_sign_float
    57                          	;; Stdlib.sign_float
    58                          	LDA (ACCU),Y				;Read byte #0 (exponent)
    59                          	BEQ @zero				;Exponent=0 <=> float=0.
    60                          	INY
    61                          	LDA (ACCU),Y				;Read byte #1 (mantissa, msb)
    62                          	BPL @pos				;If the mantissa is negative,
    63                          	LDY # $FF				; set ACCU=Val_Int(-1)
    64                          	STY ACCU + 1
    65                          	STY ACCU
    66                          	INY
    67                          	RTS
    68                          @pos	DEY					;else
    69                          	LDA # Val_one				; set ACCU=Val_Int(1)
    70                          	BNE @store				; BNE=JMP.
    71                          @zero	LDA # Val_zero				;Zero: set ACCU=Val_Int(0).
    72                          @store	STA ACCU
    73                          	STY ACCU + 1
    74                          	RTS					;Y=0 at exit.
    75                          }
    76                          
    77                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_neg_float {
    78                          caml_neg_float
    79                          	LDA ACCU
    80                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
    81                          	LDA ACCU + 1
    82                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
    83                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
    84                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_NEGOP
    85                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
    86                          }
    87

    93                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
    94                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
    95                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_ABS
    96                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
    97                          }

   114                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   115                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   116                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   117                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_EXP
   118                          	LDA # <C64_M1
   119                          	LDY # >C64_M1
   120                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADD
   121                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   122                          }

   136                          caml_log1p_float

   138                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   139                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   140                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   141                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   142                          	LDA # <C64_ONE
   143                          	LDY # >C64_ONE
   144                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADD
   145                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_LOG
   146                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   147                          }
   148                          
   149                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_log10_float {
   150                          caml_log10_float
   151                          	;; log10 x = ln x / ln 10
   152                          	LDA ACCU
   153                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   154                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   155                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   156                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   157                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_LOG
   158                          	LDA # <@rln10
   159                          	LDY # >@rln10
   160                          	BNE +
   161                          @rln10	!h 7f 5e 5b d8 a9       ;1/(ln 10)
   162                          +	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FMUL
   163                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   164                          }

   231                          
   232                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_ceil_float {
   233                          caml_ceil_float
   234                                  ;; let fl = floor x in if fl = x then fl else fl +. 1.
   235                          	LDA ACCU
   236                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   237                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   238                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   239                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   240                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_INT
   241                          	LDA # ACCU
   242                          	LDY # ACCU + 1
   243                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FCOMP
   244                          	BEQ +
   245                          	LDA # <C64_ONE
   246                          	LDY # >C64_ONE
   247                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADD
   248                          +	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   249                          }
   250                          
   251                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_classify_float {
   252                          caml_classify_float
   253                          	+Val_Int ~@FP_normal, 0
   254                          	+Val_Int ~@FP_subnormal, 1
   255                          	+Val_Int ~@FP_zero, 2
   256                          	+Val_Int ~@FP_infinite, 3
   257                          	+Val_Int ~@FP_nan, 4
   258                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   259                          	STY ACCU + 1		;.Y = 0
   260                          	BEQ +
   261                          	LDA # @FP_normal
   262                          	STA ACCU
   263                          	RTS
   264                          +	LDA # @FP_zero
   265                          	STA ACCU
   266                          	RTS
   267                          }
   268                          
   269                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_int_of_float {
   270                          caml_int_of_float
   271                          	LDA ACCU
   272                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   273                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   274                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   275                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   276                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FACINX		; result in Y(lo), A(hi)
   277                          	STY ACCU
   278                          	SEC
   279                          	ROL ACCU			; OCaml int repr
   280                          	ROL
   281                          	STA ACCU + 1
   282                          	LDY # 0
   283                          	RTS
   284                          }
   285                          
   286                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_float_of_int {
   287                          caml_float_of_int
   288                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   289                          	CMP # $80			        ;CMP + ROR = arithm. shift right
   290                          	ROR
   291                          	TAX
   292                          	ROR ACCU
   293                          	LDY ACCU
   294                          	TXA
   295                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_GIVAYF
   296                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   297                          }
   298                          
   299                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_copysign_float {
   300                          caml_copysign_float
   301                          	LDA ACCU
   302                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   303                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   304                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   305                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   306                          	LDA (SP),Y
   307                          	STA ACCU
   308                          	INY
   309                          	LDA (SP),Y
   310                          	STA ACCU + 1
   311                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;.Y = 1, load 1st mantissa byte
   312                          	STA C64_FAC + 5			;copy it to FAC sign byte
   313                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   314                          }
   315                          
   316                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_float_of_string {
   317                          caml_float_of_string
   318                          	LDA C64_CHRPTR
   319                          	STA TMP
   320                          	LDA C64_CHRPTR + 1
   321                          	STA TMP + 1
   322                          	LDA ACCU
   323                          	STA C64_CHRPTR
   324                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   325                          	STA C64_CHRPTR + 1
   326                          	JSR C64_CHRGOT			;not a BASIC ROM routine
   327                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FIN
   328                          	LDA TMP
   329                          	STA C64_CHRPTR
   330                          	LDA TMP + 1
   331                          	STA C64_CHRPTR
   332                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   333                          }
   334                          
   335                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_ldexp_float {
   336                          	;; compute ACCU * 2 ^ N, -255 < N < 255.
   337                          	;; To be called with 	SP[0] = Val_int(N) if N >= 0
   338                          	;; 			SP[0] = Val_int(256-N) if N < 0
   339                          caml_ldexp_float
   340                          	LDA # Double_tag
   341                          	LDX # Double_wosize
   342                          	JSR caml_alloc
   343                          	INY
   344                          	LDA (SP),Y
   345                          	DEY
   346                          	LSR				;.A := Int_val(>SP[0])
   347                          	BEQ @add			;N >= 0 ?
   348                          	LDA (SP),Y			;no:
   349                          	ROR				;   .A := Int_val(SP[0])
   350                          	SEC
   351                          	EOR # $FF			;   subtract .A from exponent
   352                          	ADC (ACCU),Y			;   (eor/adc = inverse sbc)
   353                          	BCS @save			;   if underflow,
   354                          	LDA # 0				;   set exp = 0 (result = 0.0)
   355                          @save	STA (BLK),Y			;save exp byte
   356                          	BEQ +				;skip copy of mantissa if underflow
   357                          	LDY # 4
   358                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y			;copy mantissa
   359                          	STA (BLK),Y
   360                          	DEY
   361                          	BNE -
   362                          +	LDA BLK
   363                          	STA ACCU
   364                          	LDA BLK + 1
   365                          	STA ACCU + 1		 	;ACCU := BLK
   366                          	RTS
   367                          @add	LDA (SP),Y			;yes:
   368                          	ROR				;   .A := Int_val(SP[0])
   369                          	CLC
   370                          	ADC (ACCU),Y			;   add .A to exponent
   371                          	BCC @save			;   go to @save
   372                          	LDX # C64_ERR_OVERFLOW		;   manage overflow (error)
   373                          	JMP (C64_IERROR)
   374                          }
   375                          
   376                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_frexp_float {
   377                          caml_frexp_float
   378                          	@NEW = BLK			;used by caml_alloc
   379                          	@FLO = TMP
   380                          	;; allocate a new float with same mantissa and exp=0
   381                          	LDA # Double_tag		;tag of new float
   382                          	LDX # Double_wosize		;size of new float
   383                          	JSR caml_alloc			;alloc new float
   384                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;load (biased) exponent
   385                          	PHA				;save it for later
   386                          	BNE @nz				;float is 0.0?
   387                          	STA (@NEW),Y			;yes: set new float exp = 0
   388                          	BEQ @pair			;     and go further
   389                          @nz	LDA # $80			;no: set new float exp = $80
   390                          	STA (@NEW),Y
   391                          	LDY # 4				;    then copy the mantissa
   392                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y
   393                          	STA (@NEW),Y
   394                          	DEY
   395                          	BNE -
   396                          	;; allocate a new pair (float * int)
   397                          @pair	LDA @NEW
   398                          	STA @FLO
   399                          	LDA @NEW + 1
   400                          	STA @FLO + 1			;save new float ptr in @FLO
   401                          	LDA # 0				;tag of new pair
   402                          	LDX # 2				;size of new pair
   403                          	JSR caml_alloc			;alloc new pair
   404                          	;; set pair elements
   405                          	LDA @FLO
   406                          	STA (@NEW),Y
   407                          	INY
   408                          	LDA @FLO + 1
   409                          	STA (@NEW),Y			;field0 := new float
   410                          	INY
   411                          	LDX # 0
   412                          	PLA				;reload biased exponent
   413                          	BNE @debias			;exp = 0?
   414                          	LDA # <Val_zero			;yes: set field1,lo := <Val_int(0)
   415                          	STA (@NEW),Y
   416                          	LDA # >Val_zero
   417                          	BEQ @fld1h			;     beq=jmp to set field1,hi
   418                          @debias	SEC				;no:  compute debiased exponent
   419                          	SBC # $80
   420                          	BCS @valint			;     if negative,
   421                          	DEX				;     set hi byte = $FF
   422                          	SEC
   423                          @valint	ROL				;compute <Val_int(exponent)
   424                          	STA (@NEW),Y			;field1,lo := <Val_int(exponent)
   425                          	TXA
   426                          	ROL			   	;compute >Val_int(exponent)
   427                          @fld1h	INY
   428                          	STA (@NEW),Y			;field1,hi := >Val_int(exponent)
   429                          	LDA @NEW
   430                          	STA ACCU
   431                          	LDA @NEW + 1
   432                          	STA ACCU + 1			;ACCU := new pair
   433                          	LDY # 0
   434                          	RTS
   435                          }
   436                          
   437                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_add_float {
   438                          caml_add_float
   439                          	LDA (SP),Y
   440                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   441                          	INY
   442                          	LDA (SP),Y
   443                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   444                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   445                          	LDA ACCU
   446                          	STA caml_float_loadARG_addr
   447                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   448                          	STA caml_float_loadARG_addr + 1
   449                          	JSR caml_float_loadARG
   450                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADDT
   451                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   452                          }

   466                          	JSR caml_float_loadARG

   468                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   469                          }

   521                          
   522                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_float_alloc_result {
   523                          caml_float_alloc_result
   524                          	;; store result in a new allocated float
   525                          	LDA # Double_tag
   526                          	LDX # Double_wosize
   527                          	LDY # 0
   528                          	JSR caml_alloc
   529                          	LDX BLK
   530                          	LDY BLK + 1
   531                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_MOVMF
   532                          	LDA BLK
   533                          	STA ACCU
   534                          	LDA BLK + 1
   535                          	STA ACCU + 1
   536                          	LDY # 0
   537                          	RTS
   538                          }
   539                          
   540                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_float_loadFAC {
   541                          	;; how to use:
   542                          	;; 1) set  caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   543                          	;; 2) call caml_float_loadFAC
   544                          caml_float_loadFAC
   545                          	LDX # 4
   546                          caml_float_loadFAC_addr = * + 1
   547                          -	LDA .dummy,X		;SMC: replaced with real address
   548                          	STA C64_FAC,X
   549                          	DEX
   550                          	BPL -
   551                          	LDA C64_FAC + 1		;copy 1st byte of mantissa
   552                          	STA C64_FAC + 5		;to FAC sign byte
   553                          	ORA # $80
   554                          	STA C64_FAC + 1		;set 1st bit of mantissa = 1
   555                          	INX
   556                          	STX C64_FACRND		;FAC round byte := 0
   557                          	RTS
   558                          }
   559                          
   560                          !ifdef caml_AUX__caml_float_loadARG {
   561                          	;; how to use:
   562                          	;; 1) set  caml_float_loadARG_addr
   563                          	;; 2) call caml_float_loadARG
   564                          caml_float_loadARG
   565                          	LDX # 4
   566                          caml_float_loadARG_addr = * + 1
   567                          -	LDA .dummy,X		;SMC: replaced with real address
   568                          	STA C64_ARG,X
   569                          	DEX
   570                          	BPL -
   571                          	LDX C64_ARG + 1		;copy 1st byte of mantissa
   572                          	STX C64_ARG + 5		;to ARG sign byte
   573                          	TXA
   574                          	EOR C64_FAC + 5		;compare with FAC sign byte
   575                          	STA C64_ARISGN		;store result of comparison
   576                          	TXA
   577                          	ORA # $80
   578                          	STA C64_ARG + 1		;set 1st bit of mantissa = 1
   579                          	LDA C64_FAC		;.A := FAC exponent
   580                          	RTS
   581                          }
   582                          
   583                          }      ;; !zone caml_FLOATS
   584

     9                           !source "/home/pifu/.opam/4.14.3/lib/breadcaml/stdlib_integers.asm"

    19                          !zone caml_INT32_64 {
    20                          
    21                          	;; Int32
    22                          	;; header: tag Custom_tag, size 3
    23                          	;; field0: ptr to caml_int32_custom
    24                          	;; field1, field2: 32-bit number, little-endian
    25                          
    26                          !macro caml_int32_alloc {
    27                          	LDA # Custom_tag
    28                          	LDX # 3
    29                          	JSR caml_alloc
    30                          }
    31                          
    32                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_neg {
    33                          caml_int32_neg
    34                          	+caml_int32_alloc
    35                          	LDX # 0
    36                          	SEC
    37                          	LDA # < caml_int32_custom
    38                          	STA (BLK),Y
    39                          	INY
    40                          	LDA # > caml_int32_custom
    41                          	STA (BLK),Y
    42                            !for @i, 1, 4 {
    43                          	INY
    44                          	TXA
    45                          	SBC (ACCU),Y
    46                          	STA (BLK),Y
    47                            }
    48                          	LDA BLK
    49                          	STA ACCU
    50                          	LDA BLK + 1
    51                          	STA ACCU + 1
    52                          	LDY # 0
    53                          	RTS
    54                          }
    55                          
    56                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_add {
    57                          caml_int32_add
    58                          	+caml_int32_alloc
    59                          	LDA (SP),Y
    60                          	STA TMP
    61                          	INY
    62                          	LDA (SP),Y
    63                          	STA TMP + 1
    64                          	CLC
    65                            !for @i, 1, 4 {
    66                          	INY
    67                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
    68                          	ADC (TMP),Y
    69                          	STA (BLK),Y
    70                            }
    71                          	LDY # 1
    72                          	LDA # > caml_int32_custom
    73                          	STA (BLK),Y
    74                          	DEY
    75                          	LDA # < caml_int32_custom
    76                          	STA (BLK),Y
    77                          	LDA BLK
    78                          	STA ACCU
    79                          	LDA BLK + 1
    80                          	STA ACCU + 1
    81                          	RTS
    82                          }
    83

    88                          	STA TMP
    89                          	ONY
    90                          	LDA (SP),Y
    91                          	STA TMP + 1
    92                          	SEC
    93                            !for @i, 1, 4 {
    94                          	INY
    95                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
    96                          	SBC (TMP),Y
    97                          	STA (BLK),Y
    98                            }
    99                          	LDY # 1
   100                          	LDA # > caml_int32_custom
   101                          	STA (BLK),Y
   102                          	DEY
   103                          	LDA # < caml_int32_custom
   104                          	STA (BLK),Y
   105                          	LDA BLK
   106                          	STA ACCU
   107                          	LDA BLK + 1
   108                          	STA ACCU + 1
   109                          	RTS
   110                          }
   111

   118                          	LDA (SP),Y

   193                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_shift_left {
   194                          caml_int32_shift_left
   195                          	+caml_int32_alloc
   196                          	LDA (SP),Y
   197                          	LSR
   198                          	AND # 31
   199                          	BNE +
   200                          	LDY # 5
   201                            !for @i, 1, 4 {
   202                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   203                          	STA (BLK),Y
   204                          	DEY
   205                            }
   206                          --	LDA # > caml_int32_custom
   207                          	STA (BLK),Y
   208                          	DEY
   209                          	LDA # < caml_int32_custom
   210                          	STA (BLK),Y
   211                          	LDA BLK
   212                          	STA ACCU
   213                          	LDA BLK + 1
   214                          	STA ACCU + 1
   215                          	RTS
   216                          +	TAX
   217                          -	LDY # 2
   218                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   219                          	ASL
   220                          	STA (BLK),Y
   221                            !for @i, 1, 3 {
   222                          	INY

   225                          	STA (BLK),Y
   226                            }

   228                          	BNE -

   230                          	BNE --				;jmp
   231                          }
   232                          
   233                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_shift_right {

   237                          	LSR
   238                          	AND # 31
