   313                          
   314                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_mul {
   315                          caml_int32_mul
   316                          @M 	= TMP					;4 bytes
   317                          @P 	= TMP + 4				;4 bytes
   318                          @NPTR	= TMP + 8				;2 bytes
   319                          	+caml_int32_alloc
   320                          	SEC
   321                          	LDA (SP),Y
   322                          	SBC # $FF - 5			:!warn "COS'E'? COMMENTARE!"
   323                          	STA @NPTR
   324                          	INY
   325                          	LDA (SP),Y
   326                          	SBC # 0
   327                          	STA @NPTR + 1
   328                          	LDX # 0
   329                          	LDY # 5
   330                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   331                          	LSR
   332                          	STA @M + 3
   333                          	STX @P + 3
   334                            !for @i, 2, 0 {
   335                          	DEY
   336                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   337                          	ROR
   338                          	STA @M + @i
   339                          	STX @P + @i
   340                            }
   341                          ;; 	ldx #32
   342                          ;; --	bcc +
   343                          ;; 	clc
   344                          ;; 	ldy #$FF - 3
   345                          ;; -	lda (@NPTR),Y
   346                          ;; 	adc @P - $FF + 3,Y
   347                          ;; 	sta @P - $FF + 3,Y
   348                          ;; 	iny
   349                          ;; 	bne -
   350                          ;; +	lsr @P + 3
   351                          ;;  !for @i, 2, 0 {ror @P + @i}
   352                          ;;  !for @i, 3, 0 {ror @M + @i}
   353                          ;; 	dex
   354                          ;; 	bne --
   355                          	LDX # 8
   356                          --	BCC +
   357                          	CLC
   358                          	LDY # $FF-3
   359                          -	LDA (@NPTR),Y
   360                          	ADC @P - $FF + 3,Y
   361                          	STA @P - $FF + 3,Y
   362                          	INY
   363                          	BNE -
   364                          +	LSR @P + 3
   365                            !for @i, 2, 0 {
   366                          	ROR @P + @i
   367                            }
   368                            !for @i, 3, 0 {
   369                          	ROR @M + @i
   370                            }
   371                          	DEX
   372                          	BNE --
   373                          	LDA @NPTR
   374                          	BNE +
   375                          	DEC @NPTR + 1
   376                          +	DEC @NPTR
   377                          	LDX # 8
   378                          --	BCC +
   379                          	CLC
   380                          	LDY # $FF-2
   381                          -	LDA (@NPTR),Y
   382                          	ADC @P - $FF + 2,Y
   383                          	STA @P - $FF + 2,Y
   384                          	INY
   385                          	BNE -
   386                          +	LSR @P + 2
   387                            !for @i, 1, 0 {
   388                          	ROR @P + @i
   389                            }
   390                            !for @i, 3, 0 {
   391                          	ROR @M + @i
   392                            }
   393                          	DEX
   394                          	BNE --
   395                          	LDA @NPTR
   396                          	BNE +
   397                          	DEC @NPTR + 1
   398                          +	DEC @NPTR
   399                          	LDX # 8
   400                          --	BCC +
   401                          	CLC
   402                          	LDY # $FF - 1
   403                          -	LDA (@NPTR),Y
   404                          	ADC @P - $FF + 1,Y
   405                          	STA @P - $FF + 1,Y
   406                          	INY
   407                          	BNE -
   408                          +	LSR @P + 1
   409                          	ROR @P
   410                            !for @i, 3, 0 {
   411                          	ROR @M + @i
   412                            }
   413                          	DEX
   414                          	BNE --
   415                          	LDA @NPTR
   416                          	BNE +
   417                          	DEC @NPTR + 1
   418                          +	DEC @NPTR
   419                          	LDX # 8
   420                          --	BCC +
   421                          	CLC
   422                          	LDY # $FF
   423                          	LDA (@NPTR),Y
   424                          	ADC @P - $FF,Y
   425                          	STA @P - $FF,Y
   426                          +	LSR @P
   427                            !for @i, 3, 0 {
   428                          	ROR @M + @i
   429                            }
   430                          	DEX
   431                          	BNE --
   432                          	LDY # 5
   433                          -	LDA @M - 2,Y
   434                          	STA (BLK),Y
   435                          	DEY
   436                          	CPY # 2
   437                          	BCS -
   438                          	LDA BLK
   439                          	STA ACCU
   440                          	LDA BLK + 1
   441                          	STA ACCU + 1
   442                          	LDY # 0
   443                          	RTS
   444                          }
   445                          
   446                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_of_float {
   447                          caml_int32_of_float
   448                          	+caml_int32_alloc
   449                          	LDA ACCU
   450                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   451                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   452                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   453                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   454                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_QINT
   455                          	LDY # 2
   456                          	LDX # 3
   457                          -	LDA C64_FAC + 1,X
   458                          	STA (BLK),Y
   459                          	INY
   460                          	DEX
   461                          	BPL -
   462                          	LDY # 0
   463                          	LDA BLK
   464                          	STA ACCU
   465                          	LDA BLK + 1
   466                          	STA ACCU + 1
   467                          	RTS
   468                          }
   469                          
   470                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_to_float {
   471                          caml_int32_to_float
   472                          	STY C64_FAC + 5			;clear FAC sign
   473                          	STY C64_FACRND			;clear FAC round byte
   474                          	LDA # 32 + $80			;set exponent
   475                          	STA C64_FAC
   476                          	LDY # 2
   477                          	LDX # 3
   478                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y			;copy int32 into FAC mantissa
   479                          	STA C64_FAC + 1,X
   480                          	INY
   481                          	DEX
   482                          	BPL -
   483                          	EOR # $80
   484                          	CMP # $80			;set carry if int32 is positive
   485                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADFLT	;normalize
   486                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
   487                          }
   488                          
   489                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_of_int {
   490                          caml_int32_of_int
   491                          	+caml_int32_alloc
   492                          	LDY # 5
   493                          	LDA # 0
   494                          	STA (BLK),Y
   495                          	DEY
   496                          	STA (BLK),Y
   497                          	DEY
   498                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   499                          	LSR
   500                          	STA (BLK),Y
   501                          	DEY
   502                          	LDA ACCU
   503                          	ROR
   504                          	STA (BLK),Y
   505                          	LDY # 0
   506                          	LDA BLK
   507                          	STA ACCU
   508                          	LDA BLK + 1
   509                          	STA ACCU + 1
   510                          	RTS
   511                          }
   512                          
   513                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_to_int {
   514                          caml_int32_to_int
   515                          	LDY # 2
   516                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   517                          	SEC
   518                          	ROL
   519                          	TAX
   520                          	INY
   521                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   522                          	ROL
   523                          	STA ACCU + 1
   524                          	STX ACCU
   525                          	LDY # 0
   526                          	RTS
   527                          }
   528                          
   529                          	;; Conversion from IEEE754 binary32 to C64FLP and vice-versa.
   530                          	;; See en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Single-precision_floating-point_format
   531                          	;; &   www.c64-wiki.com/wiki/Floating_point_arithmetic
   532                          	;;
   533                          	;; IEEE754:      |±¦e07_e01|e00¦m22_m16|m15_m08|m07_m00|
   534                          	;; little-endian |m07_m00|m15_m08|e00¦m22_m16|±¦e07_e01| Int32.t
   535                          	;; exponent representation: excess-127
   536                          	;; 	exp = $01...$FE -> ± (2^(exp-127) * 1.mantissa)
   537                          	;; 	exp = $FF -> special numbers: NaN, +infinity, -infinity
   538                          	;; 	exp = $00, mantissa =  0 -> +0.0, -0.0
   539                          	;; 	exp = $00, mantissa <> 0 ->  ± (2^(-126) * 0.mantissa)
   540                          	;; range:   ±1.17549435E-38 ... ±3.40282346E+38 (normal)
   541                          	;;          ±1.40129846E-45 ... ±1.17549421E-38 (subnormal)
   542                          	;; example: 1.0= |0¦0111111|1¦0000000|00000000|00000000|
   543                          	;; little-endian |00000000|00000000|1¦0000000|0¦0111111| Int32.t
   544                          	;;
   545                          	;; C64 (in RAM): |E07_E00|±¦M30_M24|M23_M16|M15_M08|M07_M00|
   546                          	;; C64 (in FAC): |E07_E00|1¦M30_M24|M23_M16|M15_M08|M07_M00|±///////|
   547                          	;; exponent representation: excess-128
   548                          	;; 	exp = $01...$FF -> ± (2^(exp-128) * 0.1mantissa)
   549                          	;; 	exp = $00 -> 0.0
   550                          	;; range:   ±2.93873588E-39 ... ±1.70141183E+38
   551                          	;; example: 1.0= |10000001|0¦0000000|00000000|00000000|00000000|  (RAM)
   552                          	;;          1.0= |10000001|1¦0000000|00000000|00000000|00000000|0|(FAC)
   553                          
   554                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_bits_of_float {
   555                          caml_int32_bits_of_float
   556                          	+caml_int32_alloc
   557                          	LDA ACCU
   558                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
   559                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   560                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
   561                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
   562                          	LDY # 5				; (BLK),Y points to int32 last byte
   563                          	LDX C64_FAC			; load c64 exponent
   564                          	BEQ @exp0			; switch
   565                          	DEX
   566                          	BEQ @exp1
   567                          	DEX
   568                          	BEQ @exp2
   569                          	;; c64 exponent > 2:
   570                          	;; ieee_exp = c64_exp - 2, ieee_mant = asl c64_mant (drop leftmost 1)
   571                          	;; normal representation - rounding may increment exponent by one
   572                          	CLC				;flag: .C=1 if called from @exp2
   573                          @round	BIT C64_FAC + 4			;round mantissa
   574                           	BPL +
   575                           	INC C64_FAC + 3
   576                           	BNE +
   577                           	INC C64_FAC + 2
   578                           	BNE +
   579                           	INC C64_FAC + 1
   580                           	BNE +
   581                           	INX				;increment exponent if needed
   582                          +	BCS @exp2r			;return if called from @exp2
   583                          	ASL C64_FAC + 1			;remove leftmost 1 from mantissa
   584                          	ASL C64_FAC + 5			;.C := sign bit
   585                          	TXA				;.A := exponent |e07_e00|
   586                          	ROR				;.A := |±¦e07_e01|, .C := e00
   587                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |±¦e07_e01|
   588                          	LDA C64_FAC + 1			;.A := |m22_m16¦0|
   589                          	ROR				;.A := |e00¦m22_m16|
   590                          	DEY
   591                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |e00¦m22_m16|
   592                          	LDA C64_FAC + 2			;.A := |m15_m08|
   593                          	DEY
   594                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |m15_m08|
   595                          	LDA C64_FAC + 3			;.A := |m07_m00|
   596                          @end	DEY
   597                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |m07_m00|
   598                          	LDY # 0
   599                          	LDA BLK
   600                          	STA ACCU
   601                          	LDA BLK + 1
   602                          	STA ACCU + 1
   603                          	;ACCU := int32
   604                          	RTS				;return
   605                          	;; c64_exp = 0: ieee_exp = 0, ieee_mant = 0
   606                          @exp0	TXA				;.A := 0
   607                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store zero into all bytes
   608                          	DEY
   609                          	STA (BLK),Y
   610                          	DEY
   611                          	STA (BLK),Y
   612                          	JMP @end			;...continue
   613                          	;; c64_exp = 1: ieee_exp = 0, ieee_mant = lsr c64_mant (subnormal)
   614                          	;; rounding doesn't affect exponent, as mantissa is 0.0mmm...
   615                          @exp1	LSR C64_FAC + 1			;lsr mantissa
   616                          	ROR C64_FAC + 2
   617                          	ROR C64_FAC + 3
   618                          	ROR C64_FAC + 4			;fallthrough @exp2
   619                          	;; c64_exp = 2: ieee_exp = 0, ieee_mant = c64_mant (subnormal)
   620                          	;; rounding may incr. exponent and cause a switch from
   621                          	;; subnormal repr. (2^(-126) * 0.mantissa, 0 implicit)
   622                          	;; to normal one (2^(-126) * 1.rnd_mantissa, 1 implicit)
   623                          @exp2	SEC				;use .C as a return flag
   624                          	BCS @round			;round mantissa
   625                          @exp2r	TXA				;.A := exponent |e07_e00|
   626                          	ASL C64_FAC + 5			;.C := sign bit
   627                          	ROR				;.A := |±¦e07_e01|, .C := e00
   628                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |±¦e07_e01|
   629                          	LDA C64_FAC + 1
   630                          	ROR
   631                          	DEY
   632                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |e00¦m22_m16|
   633                          	LDA C64_FAC + 2
   634                          	ROR
   635                          	DEY
   636                          	STA (BLK),Y			;store |m15_m08|
   637                          	LDA C64_FAC + 3
   638                          	ROR
   639                          	JMP @end			;...continue
   640                          }
   641                          
   642                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_float_of_bits {
   643                          caml_int32_float_of_bits
   644                          	LDY # 4
   645                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;.A <- e00¦m22_m16
   646                          	CMP # $80			;.C <- e00
   647                          	ORA # $80			;.A <- 1¦m22_m16
   648                          	STA C64_FAC + 1			;store into FAC
   649                          	INY
   650                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;.A <- sign¦e07_e01
   651                          	ROL				;.C <- sign, .A <- e07_e00
   652                          	ROR C64_FAC + 5			;put sign into FAC sign byte
   653                          	CMP # $FE			;raise exn if NaN, +-infinity, or
   654                          	BCS @exn			;if conversion would overflow
   655                          	TAX				;.X <- exp
   656                          	LDY # 3
   657                          	LDA (ACCU),Y		       	;.A <- m15_m08
   658                          	STA C64_FAC + 2			;store into FAC
   659                          	DEY
   660                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;.A <- m07_m00
   661                          	STA C64_FAC + 3			;store into FAC
   662                          	LDY # 0
   663                          	STY C64_FAC + 4			;clear FAC unused mantissa bits
   664                          	STY C64_FACRND			;and FAC round byte
   665                          	CPX # 1
   666                          	BCC @zero			;jump if +0.0, -0.0 or subnormal
   667                          	INX
   668                          	INX				;adjust exp bias
   669                          -	STX C64_FAC			;set FAC exp
   670                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result	;allocate float and return
   671                          @zero	LDA C64_FAC + 3			;check if +0.0 or -0.0
   672                          	BNE @subnrm			;jump if subnormal
   673                          	LDA C64_FAC + 2
   674                          	BNE @subnrm			;jump if subnormal
   675                          	LDA C64_FAC + 1
   676                          	AND # $7F			;ignore leftmost bit of mantissa (1)
   677                          	BNE @subnrm			;jump if subnormal
   678                          	STA C64_FAC + 1
   679                          	STA C64_FAC + 5			;clear minus sign, if any
   680                          	BEQ -				;set FAC exp, allocate float and return
   681                          @subnrm	LDX # 2				;subnormal: set biased exp = -126
   682                          	STX C64_FAC
   683                          -	ASL C64_FAC + 3			;try to normalize (FAC+4 ignored as null)
   684                          	ROL C64_FAC + 2
   685                          	ROL C64_FAC + 1
   686                          	BMI +				;ok, leftmost bit is 1
   687                          	DEC C64_FAC
   688                          	BNE -
   689                          	LDY # 0				;ko, result is zero
   690                          	STY C64_FAC + 5			;clear minus sign, if any
   691                          +	JMP caml_float_alloc_result	;allocate float and return
   692                          @exn	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Int32.float_of_bits"
   693                          }
   694                          
   695                          ; caml_int32_div(value v1, value v2)
   696                          ; caml_int32_mod(value v1, value v2)
   697                          ; caml_int32_bswap(value v)
   698                          
   699                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int32_custom 	{
   700                          !align $01, $00
   701                          caml_int32_custom
   702                          	!word caml_int32_compare
   703                          	!word caml_int32_hash
   704                          caml_int32_compare
   705                          	STY TMP + 2
   706                          	LDA (SP),Y
   707                          	STA TMP
   708                          	INY
   709                          	LDA (SP),Y
   710                          	STA TMP + 1
   711                          	SEC
   712                          	LDX # 3
   713                          -	INY
   714                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   715                          	SBC (TMP),Y
   716                          	ORA TMP + 2
   717                          	STA TMP + 2
   718                          	DEX
   719                          	BNE -
   720                          	INY
   721                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   722                          	SBC (TMP),Y
   723                          	BVC +
   724                          	EOR # $80
   725                          +	BMI ++				;jump if <
   726                          	LDY # 0
   727                          	STY ACCU + 1
   728                          	ORA TMP + 2
   729                          	BNE +				;jump if >
   730                          	LDA # <Val_zero
   731                          	STA ACCU
   732                          	RTS
   733                          +	LDA # <Val_one
   734                          	STA ACCU
   735                          	RTS
   736                          ++	LDY # $FF
   737                          	STY ACCU
   738                          	STY ACCU + 1
   739                          	INY
   740                          	RTS
   741                          caml_int32_hash
   742                          	LDY # 5
   743                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   744                          	DEY
   745                          	EOR (ACCU),Y
   746                          	TAX
   747                          	DEY
   748                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   749                          	DEY
   750                          	EOR (ACCU),Y
   751                          	SEC
   752                          	ROL
   753                          	STA ACCU
   754                          	TXA
   755                          	ROL
   756                          	STA ACCU + 1
   757                          	LDY # 0
   758                          	RTS
   759                          }
   760                          
   761                          	;; Int64
   762                          	;; header: tag Custom_tag, size 5
   763                          	;; field0: ptr to caml_int64_custom
   764                          	;; field1 ... field4: 64-bit number, little-endian
   765                          
   766                          !macro caml_int64_alloc {
   767                          	LDA # Custom_tag
   768                          	LDX # 5
   769                          	JSR caml_alloc
   770                          }
   771                          
   772                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_neg {
   773                          caml_int64_neg
   774                          	+caml_int64_alloc
   775                          	LDX # 0
   776                          	SEC
   777                          	LDA # < caml_int64_custom
   778                          	STA (BLK),Y
   779                          	INY
   780                          	LDA # > caml_int64_custom
   781                          	STA (BLK),Y
   782                            !for @i, 1, 8 {
   783                          	INY
   784                          	TXA
   785                          	SBC (ACCU),Y
   786                          	STA (BLK),Y
   787                            }
   788                          	LDA BLK
   789                          	STA ACCU
   790                          	LDA BLK + 1
   791                          	STA ACCU + 1
   792                          	LDY # 0
   793                          	RTS
   794                          }
   795                          
   796                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_add {
   797                          caml_int64_add

   799                          	LDA (SP),Y
   800                          	STA TMP
   801                          	INY
   802                          	LDA (SP),Y
   803                          	STA TMP + 1
   804                          	CLC
   805                            !for @i, 1, 8 {
   806                          	INY
   807                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   808                          	ADC (TMP),Y
   809                          	STA (BLK),Y
   810                            }
   811                          	LDY # 1
   812                          	LDA # > caml_int64_custom
   813                          	STA (BLK),Y
   814                          	DEY
   815                          	LDA # < caml_int64_custom
   816                          	STA (BLK),Y

   818                          	STA ACCU
   819                          	LDA BLK + 1
   820                          	STA ACCU + 1
   821                          	RTS
   822                          }
   823                          
   824                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_sub {

   834                          	INY

   836                          	SBC (TMP),Y

   838                            }
   839                          	LDY # 1

   851

   904                          }
   905                          
   906                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_xor {
   907                          caml_int64_xor
   908                          	+caml_int64_alloc
   909                          	LDA (SP),Y
   910                          	STA TMP
   911                          	INY
   912                          	LDA (SP),Y
   913                          	STA TMP + 1
   914                            !for @i, 1, 8 {
   915                          	INY
   916                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   917                          	EOR (TMP),Y
   918                          	STA (BLK),Y
   919                            }
   920                          	LDY # 1
   921                          	LDA # > caml_int64_custom
   922                          	STA (BLK),Y
   923                          	DEY
   924                          	LDA # < caml_int64_custom
   925                          	STA (BLK),Y
   926                          	LDA BLK
   927                          	STA ACCU

   929                          	STA ACCU + 1

   931                          }
   932                          
   933                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_shift_left {
   934                          caml_int64_shift_left
   935                          	+caml_int64_alloc
   936                          	LDA (SP),Y
   937                          	LSR
   938                          	AND # 63
   939                          	BNE +
   940                          	LDY # 9
   941                            !for @i, 1, 8 {
   942                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   943                          	STA (BLK),Y
   944                          	DEY
   945                            }
   946                          --	LDA # > caml_int64_custom
   947                          	STA (BLK),Y
   948                          	DEY
   949                          	LDA # < caml_int64_custom
   950                          	STA (BLK),Y
   951                          	LDA BLK
   952                          	STA ACCU
   953                          	LDA BLK + 1
   954                          	STA ACCU + 1
   955                          	RTS
   956                          +	TAX
   957                          -	LDY # 2
   958                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   959                          	ASL
   960                          	STA (BLK),Y
   961                            !for @i, 1, 7 {
   962                          	INY
   963                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   964                          	ROL
   965                          	STA (BLK),Y
   966                            }
   967                          	DEX
   968                          	BNE -
   969                          	LDY # 1
   970                          	BNE --				;jmp
   971                          }
   972                          
   973                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_shift_right {
   974                          caml_int64_shift_right
   975                          	+caml_int64_alloc
   976                          	LDA (SP),Y
   977                          	LSR
   978                          	AND # 63
   979                          	BNE +
   980                          	LDY # 9
   981                            !for @i, 1, 8 {
   982                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   983                          	STA (BLK),Y
   984                          	DEY
   985                            }
   986                          --	LDA # > caml_int64_custom
   987                          	STA (BLK),Y
   988                          	DEY
   989                          	LDA # < caml_int64_custom
   990                          	STA (BLK),Y
   991                          	LDA BLK
   992                          	STA ACCU
   993                          	LDA BLK + 1
   994                          	STA ACCU + 1
   995                          	RTS
   996                          +	TAX
   997                          -	LDY # 9
   998                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   999                          	CMP # $80
  1000                          	ROR
  1001                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1002                            !for @i, 1, 7 {
  1003                          	DEY
  1004                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1005                          	ROR
  1006                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1007                            }
  1008                          	DEX
  1009                          	BNE -
  1010                          	LDY # 1
  1011                          	BNE --				;jmp
  1012                          }
  1013                          
  1014                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_shift_right_unsigned {
  1015                          caml_int64_shift_right_unsigned
  1016                          	+caml_int64_alloc
  1017                          	LDA (SP),Y
  1018                          	LSR
  1019                          	AND # 63
  1020                          	BNE +

  1024                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1025                          	DEY
  1026                            }

  1028                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1029                          	DEY

  1031                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1032                          	LDA BLK
  1033                          	STA ACCU

  1035                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1036                          	RTS

  1038                          -	LDY # 9

  1040                          	LSR
  1041                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1042                            !for @i, 1, 7 {
  1043                          	DEY

  1046                          	STA (BLK),Y

  1051                          	BNE --				;jmp
  1052                          }
  1053                          
  1054                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_mul {
  1055                          caml_int64_mul
  1056                          @M 	= TMP					;8 bytes
  1057                          @P 	= TMP + 8				;8 bytes
  1058                          @NPTR 	= TMP + 16				;2 bytes
  1059                          	+caml_int64_alloc
  1060                          	SEC
  1061                          	LDA (SP),Y
  1062                          	SBC # $FF - 9			:!warn "COS'E'? COMMENTARE!"
  1063                          	STA @NPTR
  1064                          	INY
  1065                          	LDA (SP),Y
  1066                          	SBC # 0
  1067                          	STA @NPTR + 1
  1068                          	LDX # 0
  1069                          	LDY # 9
  1070                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1071                          	LSR
  1072                          	STA @M + 7
  1073                          	STX @P + 7
  1074                            !for @i, 6, 0 {
  1075                          	DEY
  1076                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1077                          	ROR
  1078                          	STA @M + @i
  1079                          	STX @P + @i
  1080                            }
  1081                          	LDX # 64
  1082                          --	BCC +
  1083                          	CLC
  1084                          	LDY # $FF - 7
  1085                          -	LDA (@NPTR),Y
  1086                          	ADC @P - $FF + 7,Y
  1087                          	STA @P - $FF + 7,Y
  1088                          	INY
  1089                          	BNE -
  1090                          +	LSR @P + 7
  1091                            !for @i, 6, 0 {
  1092                          	ROR @P + @i
  1093                            }
  1094                            !for @i, 7, 0 {
  1095                          	ROR @M + @i
  1096                            }
  1097                          	DEX
  1098                          	BNE --
  1099                          	LDY # 9
  1100                          -	LDA @M - 2,Y
  1101                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1102                          	DEY
  1103                          	CPY # 2
  1104                          	BCS -
  1105                          	LDA BLK
  1106                          	STA ACCU
  1107                          	LDA BLK + 1
  1108                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1109                          	LDY # 0
  1110                          	RTS
  1111                          }
  1112                          
  1113                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_to_float {
  1114                          caml_int64_to_float
  1115                          	STY C64_FAC + 5			;clear FAC sign
  1116                          	STY C64_FACRND			;clear FAC round byte
  1117                          	LDA # 64 + $80
  1118                          	STA C64_FAC			;set exponent (64)
  1119                          	LDY # 6
  1120                          	LDX # 3
  1121                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y			;copy int64 hi bytes into FAC mantissa
  1122                          	STA C64_FAC + 1,X
  1123                          	INY
  1124                          	DEX
  1125                          	BPL -
  1126                          	EOR # $80
  1127                          	CMP # $80			;set carry if int64 is positive
  1128                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADFLT	;normalize
  1129                          	LDX # <TMP
  1130                          	LDY # >TMP
  1131                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_MOVMF	;copy FAC to TMP
  1132                          ;	ldy #0				;Y = 0 by MOVMF
  1133                          	STY C64_FAC + 5			;clear FAC sign
  1134                          	STY C64_FACRND			;clear FAC round byte
  1135                          	LDA # 32 + $80
  1136                          	STA C64_FAC			;set exponent (32)
  1137                          	LDY # 2
  1138                          	LDX # 3
  1139                          -	LDA (ACCU),Y			;copy int64 lo bytes into FAC mantissa
  1140                          	STA C64_FAC + 1,X
  1141                          	INY
  1142                          	DEX
  1143                          	BPL -
  1144                          	SEC				;set carry (positive)
  1145                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADFLT	;normalize
  1146                          	LDA # <TMP
  1147                          	LDY # >TMP
  1148                          	+caml_JSR_BASROM C64_FADD	;FAC := TMP + FAC
  1149                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result
  1150                          }
  1151                          
  1152                          	;; Conversion from IEEE754 binary64 to C64FLP and vice-versa.
  1153                          	;; See en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Double-precision_floating-point_format
  1154                          	;; &   www.c64-wiki.com/wiki/Floating_point_arithmetic
  1155                          	;;
  1156                          	;; IEEE754:      |±¦e10_e04|e03_e00¦m51_m48|m47_m40|...|m07_m00|
  1157                          	;; little-endian |m07_m00|...|m47_m40|e03_e00¦m51_m48|±¦e10_e04| Int64.t
  1158                          	;; exponent representation: excess-1023
  1159                          	;; 	exp = $001...$7FE -> ± (2^(exp-1023) * 1.mantissa)
  1160                          	;; 	exp = $7FF -> special numbers: NaN, +infinity, -infinity
  1161                          	;; 	exp = $000, mantissa =  0 -> +0.0, -0.0
  1162                          	;; 	exp = $000, mantissa <> 0 ->  ± (2^(-1022) * 0.mantissa)
  1163                          	;; range:   ±2.22507386E-308 ... ±1.79769313E+308 (normal)
  1164                          	;;          ±4.94065646E-324 ... ±2.22507386E-308 (subnormal)
  1165                          	;; example: 1.0= |0¦0111111|1111¦0000|00000000|...|00000000|
  1166                          	;; little-endian |00000000|...|00000000|1111¦0000|0¦0111111| Int64.t
  1167                          	;;
  1168                          	;; C64 (in RAM): |E07_E00|±¦M30_M24|M23_M16|M15_M08|M07_M00|
  1169                          	;; C64 (in FAC): |E07_E00|1¦M30_M24|M23_M16|M15_M08|M07_M00|±///////|
  1170                          	;; exponent representation: excess-128
  1171                          	;; 	exp = $01...$FF -> ± (2^(exp-128) * 0.1mantissa)
  1172                          	;; 	exp = $00 -> 0.0
  1173                          	;; range:   ±2.93873588E-39 ... ±1.70141183E+38
  1174                          	;; example: 1.0= |10000001|0¦0000000|00000000|00000000|00000000|  (RAM)
  1175                          	;;          1.0= |10000001|1¦0000000|00000000|00000000|00000000|0|(FAC)
  1176                          
  1177                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_bits_of_float {
  1178                          caml_int64_bits_of_float
  1179                          @EXPHI 	= TMP
  1180                          	+caml_int64_alloc
  1181                          	LDA ACCU
  1182                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr
  1183                          	LDA ACCU + 1
  1184                          	STA caml_float_loadFAC_addr + 1
  1185                          	JSR caml_float_loadFAC
  1186                          	LDA C64_FAC			;load exp
  1187                          	CLC
  1188                          	ADC # <(1023 - 128 - 1)		;adjust bias, lo bits
  1189                          	STA C64_FAC			;save
  1190                          	LDA # 0
  1191                          	ADC # >(1023 - 128 - 1)		;idem, hi bits
  1192                          	LDX # 3				;shift left exp 4 times
  1193                          -	ASL C64_FAC
  1194                          	ROL
  1195                          	DEX
  1196                          	BPL -
  1197                          	STA @EXPHI
  1198                          	LDA C64_FAC + 5			;load sign byte
  1199                          	AND # %10000000			;get bit 7
  1200                          	ORA @EXPHI			;merge with exp
  1201                          	LDY # 9
  1202                          	STA (BLK),Y			;save |±¦e10_e04|
  1203                          	LDX # 4				;shift left mantissa 5 times
  1204                          -	ASL C64_FAC + 4
  1205                            !for @i, 3, 1 {
  1206                          	ROL C64_FAC + @i
  1207                            }
  1208                          	ROL
  1209                          	DEX
  1210                          	BPL -
  1211                          	AND # %00001111			;merge m51_m48
  1212                          	ORA C64_FAC			;with e03_e00
  1213                          	DEY
  1214                            !for @i, 1, 4 {
  1215                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1216                          	LDA C64_FAC + @i
  1217                          	DEY
  1218                            }
  1219                          	LDA # 0
  1220                          	STA (BLK),Y			;put 0 in last 3 bytes
  1221                          	DEY
  1222                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1223                          	DEY
  1224                          	STA (BLK),Y
  1225                          	TAY
  1226                          	LDA BLK
  1227                          	STA ACCU
  1228                          	LDA BLK + 1
  1229                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1230                           	;return result
  1231                          	RTS
  1232                          }
  1233                          
  1234                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_float_of_bits {
  1235                          caml_int64_float_of_bits
  1236                          	LDY # 9
  1237                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;.A <- sign¦e10_e04
  1238                          	STA C64_FAC + 5			;put sign into FAC sign byte
  1239                          	AND # %01111111			;clear sign bit
  1240                          	TAX
  1241                          	DEY
  1242                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;.A <- e03_e00¦m51_m48
  1243                          	STA C64_FAC + 1
  1244                          	SEC
  1245                          	SBC # <((1023-128-1) << 4) 	;adjust exp bias, lo bits
  1246                          	STA C64_FAC
  1247                          	TXA
  1248                          	SBC # >((1023-128-1) << 4) 	;idem, hi bits
  1249                          	BCS +
  1250                          	LDA # 0				;treat floats under C64 repr.
  1251                          	STA C64_FAC			;lower limit as zero:
  1252                          @zero	STA C64_FAC + 5		    	;clear minus sign, if any;
  1253                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result	;allocate float and return
  1254                          @exn	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Int64.float_of_bits"
  1255                          @mask  !byte %11110000
  1256                          +	BIT @mask
  1257                          	BNE @exn			;if NaN, ±inf or overflow, raise exn
  1258                            !for @i, 1, 4 {
  1259                          	LSR				;shift result into FAC exp byte
  1260                          	ROR C64_FAC
  1261                            }
  1262                          	BEQ @zero			;if zero skip mantissa loading
  1263                          	DEY
  1264                          	LDA (ACCU),Y			;load significative part of mantissa
  1265                          	STA C64_FAC + 2
  1266                          	DEY
  1267                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1268                          	STA C64_FAC + 3
  1269                          	DEY
  1270                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1271                          	STA C64_FAC + 4
  1272                          	DEY
  1273                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1274                          	STA C64_FACRND
  1275                          	LDX # 2				;shift left 3 times
  1276                          -	ASL C64_FACRND
  1277                            !for @i, 4, 1 {
  1278                          	ROL C64_FAC + @i
  1279                            }
  1280                          	DEX
  1281                          	BPL -
  1282                          	LDA C64_FAC + 1
  1283                          	ORA # $80		    	;set leftmost bit of mantissa
  1284                          	STA C64_FAC + 1
  1285                          	JMP caml_float_alloc_result	;allocate float and return
  1286                          }
  1287                          
  1288                          ; caml_int64_bits_of_float(value vd)
  1289                          ; caml_int64_div(value v1, value v2)
  1290                          ; caml_int64_mod(value v1, value v2)
  1291                          ; caml_int64_bswap(value v)
  1292                          ; caml_int64_of_int(value v)
  1293                          ; caml_int64_to_int(value v)
  1294                          ; caml_int64_of_float
  1295                          ; caml_int64_of_int32(value v)
  1296                          ; caml_int64_to_int32(value v)
  1297                          
  1298                          !ifdef	caml_PRIM__caml_int64_custom 	{
  1299                          !align $01, $00
  1300                          caml_int64_custom
  1301                          	!word caml_int64_compare
  1302                          	!word caml_int64_hash
  1303                          caml_int64_compare
  1304                          	STY TMP + 2
  1305                          	LDA (SP),Y
  1306                          	STA TMP
  1307                          	INY
  1308                          	LDA (SP),Y
  1309                          	STA TMP + 1
  1310                          	SEC
  1311                          	LDX # 7
  1312                          -	INY
  1313                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1314                          	SBC (TMP),Y
  1315                          	ORA TMP + 2
  1316                          	STA TMP + 2
  1317                          	DEX
  1318                          	BNE -
  1319                          	INY
  1320                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1321                          	SBC (TMP),Y
  1322                          	BVC +
  1323                          	EOR # $80
  1324                          +	BMI ++				;jump if <
  1325                          	LDY # 0
  1326                          	STY ACCU + 1
  1327                          	ORA TMP + 2
  1328                          	BNE +				;jump if >
  1329                          	LDA # <Val_zero
  1330                          	STA ACCU
  1331                          	RTS
  1332                          +	LDA # <Val_one
  1333                          	STA ACCU
  1334                          	RTS
  1335                          ++	LDY # $FF
  1336                          	STY ACCU
  1337                          	STY ACCU + 1
  1338                          	INY
  1339                          	RTS
  1340                          caml_int64_hash
  1341                          	LDY # 9
  1342                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1343                            !for @i, 1, 3 {
  1344                          	DEY
  1345                          	EOR (ACCU),Y
  1346                            }
  1347                          	TAX
  1348                          	DEY
  1349                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
  1350                            !for @i, 1, 3 {
  1351                          	DEY
  1352                          	EOR (ACCU),Y
  1353                            }
  1354                          	SEC
  1355                          	ROL
  1356                          	STA ACCU
  1357                          	TXA
  1358                          	ROL
  1359                          	STA ACCU + 1
  1360                          	LDY # 0
  1361                          	RTS
  1362                          }
  1363                          
  1364                          }	;; zone caml_INT32_64
  1365

    15                          ;;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16                          ;;; INPUT-OUTPUT
    17                          ;;; ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18                          
    19                          !zone caml_IO {
    20                          
    21                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_nonstd_print_char {
    22                          caml_nonstd_print_char
    23  21cc 462d               	LSR ACCU + 1
    24  21ce a52c               	LDA ACCU
    25  21d0 6a                 	ROR
    26  21d1 842d               	STY ACCU + 1
    27  21d3 a201               	LDX # <Val_unit
    28  21d5 862c               	STX ACCU
    29  21d7 4ccaf1             	JMP C64_CHROUT				;JMP = JSR+RTS
    30                          }
    31                          
    32                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_nonstd_read_line {
    33                          caml_nonstd_read_line
    34                          	;; Stdlib.read_line
    35                          @CNT	= TMP					;string length
    36                          @PTR	= TMP + 2				;buffer pointer
    37                          	LDA # String_tag
    38                          	LDX # $FF
    39                          	JSR caml_alloc				;allocate buffer, addr in BLK
    40                          	LDA BLK
    41                          	STA @PTR
    42                          	LDA BLK + 1
    43                          	STA @PTR + 1				;init buffer pointer
    44                          	STY @CNT				;reset char counter
    45                          	STY @CNT + 1
    46                                  STY C64_BLNSW                           ;enable cursor blink
    47                          -	JSR C64_GETIN				;A:=char from keyboard; X,Y:=?
    48                          	BEQ -					;no char entered
    49                          	TAX					;save char in X
    50                          	CMP # $14
    51                          	BEQ @delete				;DELETE
    52                          	CMP # $0D
    53                          	BEQ @return				;RETURN
    54                          	AND # %01111111
    55                          	CMP # $20
    56                          	BCC -				        ;NON-PRINTABLE
    57                          	LDA @CNT + 1				;check counter
    58                          	BEQ +					;ok, cnt < 256
    59                          	LDA @CNT
    60                          	CMP # <509
    61                                  BEQ -                                   ;cnt=509, only DEL/CR admitted:
    62                          +	TXA					;reload char in A
    63                          	LDY # $00				;(Y used by C64_GETIN)
    64                          	STA (@PTR),Y				;put char into the buffer
    65                          	INC @PTR				;increment the buffer pointer
    66                          	BNE +
    67                          	INC @PTR + 1
    68                          +	INC @CNT				;increment the counter
    69                          	BNE +
    70                          	INC @CNT + 1
    71                          +	JSR C64_CHROUT				;print char
    72                          	JMP -					;process next char
    73                          @delete	LDA @CNT				;if counter_lo = 0
    74                          	BNE +
    75                          	ORA @CNT + 1				;then if counter_hi = 0
    76                          	BEQ -					;    then nothing to del, jmp -
    77                          	DEC @CNT + 1				;    else decr counter_hi;
    78                          +	DEC @CNT				;decr counter_lo
    79                          	LDA @PTR				;if pointer_lo = 0
    80                          	BNE +
    81                          	DEC @PTR + 1				;then decr pointer_hi
    82                          +	DEC @PTR				;decr pointer_lo
    83                          	TXA					;reload char in A
    84                          	JSR C64_CHROUT				;print char
    85                          	JMP -					;process next char
    86                          @return DEC C64_BLNSW                           ;disable cursor blink
    87                                  JSR C64_CHROUT                          ;print newline
    88                          	LSR @CNT + 1
    89                          	ROR @CNT				;counter := counter / 2
    90                                  LDY # 0
    91                          	TYA                                     ;add string padding:
    92                          	STA (@PTR),Y				;1st padding byte = 0
    93                          	BCS +					;is counter even?
    94                          	INY
    95                          	TYA
    96                          	STA (@PTR),Y				;yes: 2nd padding byte = 1
    97                          	DEY					;Y := 0
    98                          +	LDX @CNT
    99                          	INX					;X := # words of padded string
   100                          	JSR caml_shrink_latest_alloc		;shrink allocated block
   101                          	LDA BLK
   102                          	STA ACCU
   103                          	LDA BLK + 1
   104                          	STA ACCU + 1				;return string in ACCU
   105                          	RTS
   106                          }
   107                          
   108                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_nonstd_print_string {
   109                          caml_nonstd_print_string
   110                          	;; Stdlib.print_string
   111  21da a0ff               	LDY # -1
   112  21dc c62d               	DEC ACCU + 1
   113  21de b12c               	LDA (ACCU),Y				;get block size
   114  21e0 e62d               	INC ACCU + 1
   115  21e2 c8                 	INY
   116  21e3 aa                 	TAX				   	;X := size
   117  21e4 ca                 -	DEX                                     ;X := X - 1
   118  21e5 f012               	BEQ +					;Exit loop when X=0
   119  21e7 b12c               	LDA (ACCU),Y				;Loop: print 2 chars a time
   120  21e9 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT				; first char
   121  21ec c8                 	INY
   122  21ed b12c               	LDA (ACCU),Y
   123  21ef 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT				; second one
   124  21f2 c8                 	INY
   125  21f3 d0ef               	BNE -					;Continue loop
   126  21f5 e62d               	INC ACCU + 1
   127  21f7 d0eb               	BNE -			      		;BNE=JMP, continue loop
   128  21f9 c8                 +	INY
   129  21fa b12c               	LDA (ACCU),Y				;Load last byte
   130  21fc d006               	BNE +					;If last byte = 0
   131  21fe 88                 	DEY
   132  21ff b12c               	LDA (ACCU),Y				;then load previous one
   133  2201 20caf1             	JSR C64_CHROUT				; and print it.
   134  2204 a901               +	LDA # Val_unit
   135  2206 852c                       STA ACCU
   136  2208 a000               	LDY # 0
   137  220a 842d                       STY ACCU + 1                            ;ACCU := Val_unit
   138  220c 60                 	RTS
   139                          }
   140                          
   141                          }	;; !zone caml_IO
   142

    15                          ;;; -----------------------------------------------------------
    16                          ;;; OBJECTS / INTERNALOO (ocaml-4.04.1/byterun/obj.c)

    18                          
    19                          !zone caml_OBJ_OO {
    20                          
    21                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_is_block {
    22                          	;; return true if value is a block
    23                          	;; ACCU = value
    24                          caml_obj_is_block
    25                          	LDA # Val_true
    26                          	LSR ACCU
    27                          	BCC +
    28                          	LDA # Val_false
    29                          +	STA ACCU
    30                          	STY ACCU + 1
    31                          	RTS
    32                          }
    33                          
    34                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_tag {
    35                          	;; return tag(value)
    36                          	;; ACCU = value
    37                          caml_obj_tag
    38                          	LDA ACCU
    39                          	BIT caml_is_block
    40                          	BNE @int
    41                          	LDX ACCU + 1
    42                          	CPX # > caml_heap_start
    43                          	BCC @ooh
    44                          	BNE +
    45                          	CMP # < caml_heap_start
    46                          	BCC @ooh
    47                          +	CPX # > caml_heap_end
    48                          	BCC +
    49                          	BNE @ooh
    50                          	CMP # < caml_heap_end
    51                          	BCS @ooh
    52                          	;; Val_int(tag(ACCU))
    53                          +	LDY # -2
    54                          	DEC ACCU + 1
    55                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
    56                          	SEC
    57                          	ROL
    58                          	STA ACCU
    59                          	LDY # 0
    60                          	STY ACCU + 1
    61                          	ROL ACCU + 1
    62                          	RTS
    63                          @ooh	+Val_Int ~@oohtag, Out_of_heap_tag
    64                          	LDA # > @ohtag
    65                          	LDX # < @oohtag
    66                          	BNE @res				;BNE = JMP
    67                          @int	+Val_Int ~@inttag, Int_tag
    68                          	LDA # > @inttag
    69                          	LDX # < @inttag
    70                          @res	STA ACCU + 1
    71                          	STX ACCU
    72                          	RTS
    73                          }
    74                          
    75                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_set_tag {
    76                          	;; ACCU = value
    77                          	;; SP[0] = new tag
    78                          caml_obj_set_tag
    79                          	INY
    80                          	LDA (SP),Y
    81                          	LSR
    82                          	DEY
    83                          	LDA (SP),Y
    84                          	ROR
    85                          	LDY # -2
    86                          	DEC ACCU + 1
    87                          	STA (ACCU),Y
    88                          	LDY # <Val_unit
    89                          	STY ACCU
    90                          	DEY
    91                          	STY ACCU + 1
    92                          	RTS
    93                          }
    94                          
    95                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_block {
    96                          	;; ACCU = tag
    97                          	;; SP[0] = size
    98                          caml_obj_block
    99                          	INY
   100                          	LDA (SP),Y
   101                          	LSR
   102                          	DEY
   103                          	LDA (SP),Y
   104                          	ROR
   105                          	BNE +
   106                          	;; return Atom(0) if size = 0
   107                          	LDA # < caml_atom0
   108                          	STA ACCU
   109                          	LDA # > caml_atom0
   110                          	STA ACCU + 1
   111                          	RTS
   112                          	;; allocate a new block if size > 0
   113                          +	TAX
   114                          	LSR ACCU + 1
   115                          	LDA ACCU
   116                          	ROR
   117                          	JSR caml_alloc
   118                          	LDA BLK
   119                          	STA ACCU
   120                          	LDA BLK + 1
   121                          	STA ACCU + 1
   122                          	;; fill fields with Val_int(0)
   123                          -	LDA # < Val_zero
   124                          	STA (BLK),Y
   125                          	INY
   126                          	LDA # > Val_zero
   127                          	STA (BLK),Y
   128                          	INY
   129                          	BNE +
   130                          	INC BLK + 1
   131                          +	DEX
   132                          	BNE -
   133                          	LDY # 0
   134                          	RTS
   135                          }
   136                          
   137                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_dup {
   138                          	;; ACCU = arg
   139                          caml_obj_dup
   140                          	DEY
   141                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   142                          	LDA (ACCU),Y                            ; A := size
   143                          	BEQ @atom		                ; exit if size = 0
   144                          	TAX                                     ; X := size
   145                          	DEY
   146                          	LDA (ACCU),Y                            ; A := tag
   147                          	INC ACCU + 1                            ; restore pointer
   148                          	LDY # 0                                 ;   and Y register
   149                          	JSR caml_alloc                          ; allocate a new block
   150                          	TXA 	                		; A := size
   151                          	ASL
   152                          	TAY                                     ; Y,C := 2 * size
   153                          	JSR caml_blkcpy 			; copy the blk pointed by ACCU
   154                          	LDA BLK
   155                          	STA ACCU
   156                          	LDA BLK + 1
   157                          	STA ACCU + 1
   158                          	RTS
   159                          @atom	INC ACCU + 1
   160                          	INY
   161                          	RTS
   162                          }
   163                          
   164                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_set_oo_id {
   165                          	!set caml_use_ooid=1
   166                          	;; ACCU = obj
   167                          caml_set_oo_id
   168                          	LDY # 3
   169                          	LDA caml_OOID + 1
   170                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   171                          	DEY
   172                          	LDA caml_OOID
   173                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   174                          	LDY # 0
   175                          	CLC
   176                          	ADC # 2
   177                          	STA caml_OOID
   178                          	BCC +
   179                          	INC caml_OOID + 1
   180                          +	RTS
   181                          }
   182                          
   183                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_fresh_oo_id {
   184                          	!set caml_use_ooid=1
   185                          	;; ACCU = value
   186                          caml_fresh_oo_id
   187  220d ad2422             	LDA caml_OOID + 1
   188  2210 852d               	STA ACCU + 1
   189  2212 ad2322             	LDA caml_OOID
   190  2215 852c               	STA ACCU
   191  2217 18                 	CLC
   192  2218 6902               	ADC # 2
   193  221a 8d2322             	STA caml_OOID
   194  221d 9003               	BCC +
   195  221f ee2422             	INC caml_OOID + 1
   196  2222 60                 +	RTS
   197                          }
   198                          
   199                          !ifdef	caml_use_ooid {
   200                          caml_OOID
   201  2223 0100               	!word Val_zero
   202                          }
   203                          
   204                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_int_as_pointer {
   205                          	;; ACCU = n
   206                          caml_int_as_pointer
   207                          	DEC ACCU
   208                          	RTS
   209                          }
   210                          
   211                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_truncate {
   212                          	;; truncate a block to newsize
   213                          	;; ACCU = value
   214                          	;; SP[0] = newsize
   215                          
   216                          	;; Obj.truncate is deprecated!
   217                          
   218                          	;; WARNING: Obj.truncate o s  when  Obj.size o = s + 1
   219                          	;; will leave an atom on the heap, which could cause the garbage
   220                          	;; collector to crash if it is reachable from some root!
   221                          
   222                          caml_obj_truncate
   223                          	@NEWSZ = TMP
   224                          	;; load tag and size
   225                          	DEY
   226                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   227                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   228                          	TAX					;X := size
   229                          	DEY
   230                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   231                          	CMP # Double_array_tag
   232                          	BEQ @floatarray
   233                          	;; calculate Int_val(newsize)
   234                          	LDY # 1
   235                          	LDA (SP),Y
   236                          	DEY
   237                          	LSR
   238                          	BNE @error				;error if newsize > 255 or < 0
   239                          	LDA (SP),Y
   240                          	ROR
   241                          	BEQ @error				;error if newsize = 0
   242                          	STA @NEWSZ
   243                          	CPX @NEWSZ
   244                          	BEQ @exit				;exit if newsize = size
   245                          	BCC @error				;error if newsize > size
   246                          	;; 0 < NEWSZ < size, write NEWSZ into header
   247                          @trunc	DEY
   248                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   249                          	INC ACCU + 1
   250                          	;; set (ACCU),Y to point to Field(ACCU, newsize)
   251                          	ASL
   252                          	BCC +
   253                          	INC ACCU + 1
   254                          +	TAY
   255                          	;; header for the leftovers: tag = No_scan_tag, sz = size-1-newsize
   256                          	;; WARNING: sz could be 0, the GC won't be happy if block is reachable!
   257                          	LDA # No_scan_tag
   258                          	STA (ACCU),Y				;tag = No_scan_tag
   259                          	INY
   260                          	DEX
   261                          	TXA
   262                          	SEC
   263                          	SBC @NEWSZ				;sz = size-1-NEWSZ
   264                          	STA (ACCU),Y
   265                          @exit	LDY # <Val_unit
   266                          	STY ACCU				;ACCU := ()
   267                          	DEY
   268                          	STY ACCU + 1
   269                          	RTS
   270                          	;; calculate Int_val(newsize) * Double_wosize
   271                          @floatarray
   272                          	LDY # 1
   273                          	LDA (SP),Y
   274                          	BNE @error				;error if newsize > 127 or < 0
   275                          	DEY
   276                          	LDA (SP),Y
   277                          	AND # %11111110				;A = 2 * newsize
   278                          	BEQ @error				;error if newsize = 0
   279                          	STA @NEWSZ				;NEWSZ = 2 * newsize
   280                          	LSR
   281                          	;CLC					;C=0 because of previous AND
   282                          	ADC @NEWSZ				;A = Double_wosize * newsize
   283                          	BCS @error				;error if > 255
   284                          	STA @NEWSZ				;NEWSZ=Double_wosize * newsize
   285                          	CPX @NEWSZ
   286                          	BEQ @exit				;exit if NEWSZ = size
   287                          	BCS @trunc				;error if NEWSZ > size
   288                          @error	+caml_raise Invalid_argument, "Obj.truncate"
   289                          }
   290                          
   291                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_obj_add_offset {
   292                          	;; ACCU = value
   293                          	;; SP[0] = offset
   294                          caml_obj_add_offset
   295                          	LDA (SP),Y
   296                          	STA TMP
   297                          	INY
   298                          	LDA (SP),Y
   299                          	STA TMP + 1
   300                          	DEY
   301                          	LSR TMP + 1
   302                          	ROR TMP
   303                          	CLC
   304                          	LDA TMP
   305                          	ADC ACCU
   306                          	STA ACCU
   307                          	LDA TMP + 1
   308                          	ADC ACCU + 1
   309                          	STA ACCU + 1
   310                          	RTS
   311                          }
   312                          
   313                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_lazy_follow_forward {
   314                          	;; ACCU = value
   315                          caml_lazy_follow_forward
   316                          	;; is value a block?
   317                          	LDA ACCU
   318                          	BIT caml_is_block
   319                          	BNE @exit
   320                          	;; tag(value) = Forward_tag?
   321                          	LDY # -2
   322                          	DEC ACCU + 1
   323                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   324                          	INC ACCU + 1
   325                          	LDY # 0
   326                          	CMP # Forward_tag
   327                          	BNE @exit
   328                          	;; is value in heap?
   329                          	SEC
   330                          	LDA # < caml_heap_start
   331                          	SBC ACCU
   332                          	STA TMP
   333                          	LDA # > caml_heap_start
   334                          	SBC ACCU + 1
   335                          	STA TMP + 1
   336                          	LDA TMP
   337                          	CMP # < caml_heap_sz
   338                          	LDA TMP + 1
   339                          	SBC # > caml_heap_sz
   340                          	BCS @exit
   341                          	;; ACCU <- Field(value,0)
   342                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   343                          	TAX
   344                          	INY
   345                          	LDA (ACCU),Y
   346                          	STA ACCU + 1
   347                          	STX ACCU
   348                          	DEY
   349                          @exit	RTS
   350                          }
   351                          
   352                          !ifdef caml_PRIM__caml_lazy_make_forward {
   353                          	;; ACCU = value
   354                          caml_lazy_make_forward
   355                          	LDA # Forward_tag
   356                          	LDX # 1
   357                          	JSR caml_alloc
   358                          	LDA ACCU
   359                          	STA (BLK),Y
   360                          	INY
   361                          	LDA ACCU + 1
   362                          	STA (BLK),Y
   363                          	DEY
   364                          	LDA BLK
   365                          	STA ACCU
   366                          	LDA BLK + 1
   367                          	STA ACCU + 1
   368                          	RTS
   369                          }
   370                          
   371                          }      ;; !zone caml_OBJ_OO
   372                          
   374                          	
   375
